СйєУ┐ЎС╗ХС║ІТюгУ║ФТў»тЈ»тЂџуџё№╝їТѕЉти▓у╗ЈТіітЁ│жћ«ТіђТю»жЮбТаИт«ъС║є№╝џ

- `awesome-design-md` тЈ»С╗ЦуЏ┤ТјЦСйюСИ║уЋїжЮбтЈѓУђЃТ║љ№╝їжђѓтљѕу╗ЎУ┐ЎСИфТЈњС╗ХУАЦСИђСИфТўјуА«уџё `DESIGN.md` УДєУДЅу║дТЮЪ№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇтЂџТѕљжђџућеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈ UIсђѓ
- OpenRouter т«ўТќ╣Тћ»ТїЂ `POST /api/v1/chat/completions`№╝їт╣ХТћ»ТїЂ `stream: true` уџёТхЂт╝ЈУЙЊтЄ║сђѓ
- NVIDIA NIM / build уџёУЂітцЕТјЦтЈБС╣ЪТў» OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣уџё№╝їуФ»уѓ╣Тў» `https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions`№╝їтљїТаиТћ»ТїЂ `stream: true` тњї SSEсђѓ
- тдѓТъюСйатйЊтЅЇжА╣уЏ«Ух░уџёТў» WPS WebOffice/JSAPI Таѕ№╝їт«ўТќ╣ТќЄТАБти▓у╗ЈТћ»ТїЂжђџУ┐Є `Range.Text` У»╗тєЎТГБТќЄтї║тЪЪ№╝їжђѓтљѕтЂџРђюAI УЙ╣ућЪТѕљУЙ╣тєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄРђЮсђѓ

ТѕЉт╗║У««СйаУ┐ЎСИфжА╣уЏ«Тюђу╗ѕУљйТѕљСИІжЮбУ┐ЎтЦЌу╗ЊТъё№╝џ

- `provider` ТійУ▒АСИђт▒ѓ№╝їтЈфС┐ЮуЋЎ `baseURL / apiKey / model / extraHeaders`сђѓ
- UI жЄїтЂџСИђСИфжЁЇуй«жЮбТЮ┐№╝їТћ»ТїЂтѕЄТЇб `OpenRouter` тњї `NVIDIA`№╝їт╣ХС┐ЮтГў `apiKey`сђЂ`model`сђЂтЈ»жђЅ `baseURL`сђѓ
- ТхЂт╝ЈУЙЊтЄ║СИЇУдЂРђюТ»ЈСИф token уЏ┤ТјЦТЈњтЁЦтЁЅТаЄРђЮ№╝їУђїТў»тЁѕуА«т«џСИђСИфТГБТќЄжћџуѓ╣сђѓ
  Тюђуе│уџёТў»жђЅтї║ `Range`сђЂС╣дуГЙТѕќтєЁт«╣ТјДС╗Хсђѓ
- AI У┐ћтЏъТхЂТЌХу┤»У«АТѕљ `buffer`№╝їТїЅ 50 тѕ░ 100ms УіѓТхЂУдєуЏќ `range.Text = buffer`сђѓ
  У┐ЎТаиТГБТќЄТў»т«ъТЌХтѕиТќ░уџё№╝їСйєСИЇС╝џтЏаСИ║тЁЅТаЄТ╝ѓуД╗сђЂТњцжћђТаѕТииС╣▒Тѕќ chunk С╣▒т║ЈУђїтЄ║жЌ«жбўсђѓ
- тЅЇуФ»Таит╝ЈтЈ»С╗ЦуЏ┤ТјЦжђЅ `awesome-design-md` жЄїуџёСИђтЦЌт╝ђтЈЉтиЦтЁижБјТа╝№╝їТ»ћтдѓ `Linear`сђЂ`Notion` Тѕќ `Stripe`№╝їжђѓжЁЇ WPS СЙДУЙ╣ТаЈуфёт«йт║дтЂџТѕљСИцТ«хт╝ЈтИЃт▒ђ№╝џ
  СИітЇітї║Тў»ТеАтъІ/т»єжњЦ/ТЈљуц║У»ЇжЁЇуй«№╝їСИІтЇітї║Тў»С╝џУ»ЮСИјРђюТЈњтЁЦТГБТќЄРђЮуіХТђЂсђѓ

тдѓТъюСйаТііСИІжЮбУ┐ЎС║ЏТќЄС╗ХУ┤┤тЄ║ТЮЦ№╝їТѕЉСИІСИђТЮАт░▒УЃйуЏ┤ТјЦТїЅУ┐ЎСИфТќ╣ТАѕТћ╣№╝џ

- `package.json`
- `vite.config.*` ТѕќТъёт╗║жЁЇуй«
- `manifest.xml` / `ribbon.xml`
- тЁЦтЈБТќЄС╗Х№╝їТ»ћтдѓ `src/main.*`сђЂ`src/App.*`
- тйЊтЅЇтњї WPS ТќЄТАБС║цС║њуџёжѓБтЄаСИфТќЄС╗Х

тдѓТъюСйаТЏ┤ТЃ│тЁѕУ«ЕТѕЉу╗ЎтЄ║СИђуЅѕтЈ»уЏ┤ТјЦУљйтю░уџёС╗БуаЂжфеТъХ№╝їТѕЉС╣ЪтЈ»С╗ЦтЁѕТїЅ `Vite + wpsjs + React/Vue` уџётЂЄУ«Й№╝їТіі providerсђЂSSE УДБТъљтЎесђЂWPS ТГБТќЄтєЎтЁЦТАЦТјЦт▒ѓтњїУ«Йуй«жЮбТЮ┐уџёС╗БуаЂСИђТгАТђДу╗ЎСйасђѓ

```diff
+export function loadStored<T>(key: string, fallback: T): T {
+  if (typeof window === "undefined") {
+    return fallback;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
+    if (!raw) {
+      return fallback;
+    }
+
+    return JSON.parse(raw) as T;
+  } catch {
+    return fallback;
+  }
+}
+
+export function saveStored<T>(key: string, value: T) {
+  if (typeof window === "undefined") {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
+  } catch {
+    // Ignore quota or serialization errors in the sidebar runtime.
+  }
+}
```

+export function buildUserPrompt(input: {
+  prompt: string;
+  selectionText: string;
+  useSelectionAsContext: boolean;
+}) {
+  const prompt = input.prompt.trim();
+  const selectionText = input.selectionText.trim();
+
+  if (!input.useSelectionAsContext || !selectionText) {
+    return prompt;
+  }
+
+  return [
+    "С╗ЦСИІТў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџётєЁт«╣№╝їУ»ит░єтЁХСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇтјЪТќЄ№╝џ",
+    "",
+    "--- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ---",
+    selectionText,
+    "--- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ---",
+    "",
+    "ућеТѕиУдЂТ▒ѓ№╝џ",
+    prompt
+  ].join("\n");
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/src/lib/providers.ts`**

```diff
+export type ProviderId = "openrouter" | "nvidia";
+
+export interface ProviderSettings {
+  providerId: ProviderId;
+  apiKey: string;
+  baseUrl: string;
+  model: string;
+  temperature: number;
+  maxTokens: number;
+  systemPrompt: string;
+  siteUrl: string;
+  siteName: string;
+  useSelectionAsContext: boolean;
+  replaceSelection: boolean;
+}
+
+export interface ChatMessage {
+  role: "system" | "user" | "assistant";
+  content: string;
+}
+
+export interface ChatRequest {
+  settings: ProviderSettings;
+  messages: ChatMessage[];
+  signal?: AbortSignal;
+}
+
+const OPENROUTER_BASE_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1";
+const NVIDIA_BASE_URL = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1";
+
+export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS: ProviderSettings = {
+  providerId: "openrouter",
+  apiKey: "",
+  baseUrl: OPENROUTER_BASE_URL,
+  model: "",
+  temperature: 0.5,
+  maxTokens: 4096,
+  systemPrompt:
+    "СйаТў» WPS ТќЄТАБтіЕТЅІсђѓУЙЊтЄ║жђѓтљѕуЏ┤ТјЦтєЎтЁЦТГБт╝ЈТќЄТАБТГБТќЄуџёСИГТќЄтєЁт«╣№╝їу╗ЊТъёТИЁТЎ░№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇтцџСйЎт»њТџёсђѓ",
+  siteUrl: import.meta.env.VITE_OPENROUTER_SITE_URL ?? window.location.origin,
+  siteName: import.meta.env.VITE_OPENROUTER_SITE_NAME ?? "WPS AI Task Pane",
+  useSelectionAsContext: true,
+  replaceSelection: true
+};
+
+export const PROVIDER_OPTIONS: Array<{
+  id: ProviderId;
+  label: string;
+  description: string;
+  defaultBaseUrl: string;
+}> = [
+  {
+    id: "openrouter",
+    label: "OpenRouter",
+    description: "OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣ТјЦтЈБ№╝їжђѓтљѕтцџТеАтъІтѕЄТЇбсђѓ",
+    defaultBaseUrl: OPENROUTER_BASE_URL
+  },
+  {
+    id: "nvidia",
+    label: "NVIDIA Build",
+    description: "NVIDIA NIM / Build уџё OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣УЂітцЕТјЦтЈБсђѓ",
+    defaultBaseUrl: NVIDIA_BASE_URL
+  }
+];
+
+export function applyProviderDefaults(
+  current: ProviderSettings,
+  providerId: ProviderId
+): ProviderSettings {
+  const provider = PROVIDER_OPTIONS.find((item) => item.id === providerId);
+  if (!provider) {
+    return current;
+  }
+
+  return {
+    ...current,
+    providerId,
+    baseUrl: provider.defaultBaseUrl
+  };
+}
+
+export function buildRequestInit(input: ChatRequest): RequestInit & { url: string } {
+  const { settings, messages, signal } = input;
+  const baseUrl = settings.baseUrl.trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
+  const url = `${baseUrl}/chat/completions`;
+
+  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
+    "Content-Type": "application/json",
+    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
+  };
+
+  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
+    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.siteUrl.trim() || window.location.origin;
+    headers["X-Title"] = settings.siteName.trim() || "WPS AI Task Pane";
+  }
+
+  const body = {
+    model: settings.model.trim(),
+    stream: true,
+    temperature: settings.temperature,
+    max_tokens: settings.maxTokens,
+    messages
+  };
+
+  return {
+    url,
+    method: "POST",
+    headers,
+    body: JSON.stringify(body),
+    signal
+  };
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/src/lib/sse.ts`**

```diff
+import { buildRequestInit, type ChatRequest } from "./providers";
+
+function normalizeContent(content: unknown): string {
+  if (typeof content === "string") {
+    return content;
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return content
+    .map((item) => {
+      if (typeof item === "string") {
+        return item;
+      }
+
+      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
+        return String(item.text ?? "");
+      }
+
+      return "";
+    })
+    .join("");
+}
+
+function extractTextChunk(payload: any): string {
+  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
+  if (!choice) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return (
+    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
+    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
+    ""
+  );
+}
+
+async function parseJsonError(response: Response) {
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+
+  try {
+    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
+      const json = await response.json();
+      return json?.error?.message ?? JSON.stringify(json);
+    }
+
+    return await response.text();
+  } catch {
+    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
+  }
+}
+
+export async function* streamChatText(input: ChatRequest): AsyncGenerator<string> {
+  const request = buildRequestInit(input);
+  const response = await fetch(request.url, request);
+
+  if (!response.ok) {
+    const detail = await parseJsonError(response);
+    throw new Error(detail || `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
+  }
+
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+
+  if (!response.body || !contentType.includes("text/event-stream")) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const text = extractTextChunk(json);
+    if (text) {
+      yield text;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const reader = response.body.getReader();
+  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
+  let buffer = "";
+
+  while (true) {
+    const { value, done } = await reader.read();
+
+    if (done) {
+      buffer += decoder.decode();
+      break;
+    }
+
+    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
+
+    const segments = buffer.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/);
+    buffer = segments.pop() ?? "";
+
+    for (const segment of segments) {
+      const data = segment
+        .split(/\r?\n/)
+        .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+        .map((line) => line.slice(5).trimStart())
+        .join("\n");
+
+      if (!data || data === "[DONE]") {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      const payload = JSON.parse(data);
+      const text = extractTextChunk(payload);
+      if (text) {
+        yield text;
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (buffer.trim()) {
+    const lines = buffer
+      .split(/\r?\n/)
+      .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+      .map((line) => line.slice(5).trimStart());
+
+    for (const line of lines) {
+      if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      const payload = JSON.parse(line);
+      const text = extractTextChunk(payload);
+      if (text) {
+        yield text;
+      }
+    }
+  }
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/src/lib/wps.ts`**

```diff
+type MaybePromise<T> = T | Promise<T>;
+
+async function maybe<T>(value: MaybePromise<T>): Promise<T> {
+  return await value;
+}
+
+function isWebOfficeHost() {
+  return Boolean(window.instance?.ready && window.instance?.Application);
+}
+
+function isLocalWpsHost() {
+  return Boolean(window.wps?.Application || window.Application);
+}
+
+async function getApplication() {
+  if (isWebOfficeHost()) {
+    await window.instance!.ready();
+    return window.instance!.Application;
+  }
+
+  return window.wps?.Application ?? window.Application ?? null;
+}
+
+async function getSelectionRange(app: any) {
+  const selection = await maybe(app.ActiveDocument.ActiveWindow.Selection);
+  return await maybe(selection.Range);
+}
+
+async function getSelectionText(app: any) {
+  const range = await getSelectionRange(app);
+  return String((await maybe(range.Text)) ?? "");
+}
+
+export interface StreamingWriter {
+  update: (text: string) => Promise<void>;
+  finish: () => Promise<void>;
+  cancel: () => Promise<void>;
+  locationLabel: string;
+}
+
+export interface WpsBridge {
+  kind: "weboffice" | "wps" | "mock";
+  label: string;
+  readSelectionText: () => Promise<string>;
+  createStreamingWriter: (options: { replaceSelection: boolean }) => Promise<StreamingWriter>;
+}
+
+class MockBridge implements WpsBridge {
+  kind = "mock" as const;
+  label = "Browser Preview";
+
+  async readSelectionText() {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  async createStreamingWriter() {
+    return {
+      locationLabel: "ТюфТБђТхІтѕ░ WPS Host№╝їС╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ",
+      update: async () => undefined,
+      finish: async () => undefined,
+      cancel: async () => undefined
+    };
+  }
+}
+
+class RuntimeWpsBridge implements WpsBridge {
+  constructor(
+    public kind: "weboffice" | "wps",
+    public label: string
+  ) {}
+
+  async readSelectionText() {
+    const app = await getApplication();
+    if (!app) {
+      return "";
+    }
+
+    return await getSelectionText(app);
+  }
+
+  async createStreamingWriter(options: { replaceSelection: boolean }) {
+    const app = await getApplication();
+    if (!app) {
+      throw new Error("тйЊтЅЇжАхжЮбТюфТБђТхІтѕ░тЈ»тєЎтЁЦуџё WPS ТќЄТАБт«ъСЙІсђѓ");
+    }
+
+    const selectionRange = await getSelectionRange(app);
+    const start = Number(await maybe(selectionRange.Start));
+    const end = Number(await maybe(selectionRange.End));
+    const originalText = String((await maybe(selectionRange.Text)) ?? "");
+    const anchor = start;
+    let latestText = "";
+    let queuedText = "";
+    let flushTimer: number | null = null;
+    let isFlushing = false;
+
+    if (options.replaceSelection && end > start) {
+      selectionRange.Text = "";
+    }
+
+    const flush = async () => {
+      if (isFlushing) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      isFlushing = true;
+
+      try {
+        if (latestText === queuedText) {
+          return;
+        }
+
+        latestText = queuedText;
+        const range = await maybe(
+          app.ActiveDocument.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length)
+        );
+        range.Text = latestText;
+      } finally {
+        isFlushing = false;
+      }
+    };
+
+    const scheduleFlush = async () => {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
+        flushTimer = null;
+        await flush();
+      }, 60);
+    };
+
+    return {
+      locationLabel: options.replaceSelection
+        ? "т«ъТЌХУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║"
+        : "т«ъТЌХТЈњтЁЦтѕ░тйЊтЅЇтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«",
+      update: async (text: string) => {
+        queuedText = text;
+        await scheduleFlush();
+      },
+      finish: async () => {
+        if (flushTimer !== null) {
+          window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+          flushTimer = null;
+        }
+
+        await flush();
+      },
+      cancel: async () => {
+        if (flushTimer !== null) {
+          window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+          flushTimer = null;
+        }
+
+        if (!latestText && options.replaceSelection && originalText) {
+          const restoreRange = await maybe(app.ActiveDocument.Range(anchor, anchor));
+          restoreRange.Text = originalText;
+        }
+      }
+    };
+  }
+}
+
+export async function detectWpsBridge(): Promise<WpsBridge> {
+  if (isWebOfficeHost()) {
+    return new RuntimeWpsBridge("weboffice", "WPS WebOffice");
+  }
+
+  if (isLocalWpsHost()) {
+    return new RuntimeWpsBridge("wps", "WPS Тюгтю░т«┐СИ╗");
+  }
+
+  return new MockBridge();
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/src/App.tsx`**

```diff
+import {
+  startTransition,
+  useEffect,
+  useMemo,
+  useRef,
+  useState
+} from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDER_OPTIONS,
+  applyProviderDefaults,
+  type ProviderId,
+  type ProviderSettings
+} from "./lib/providers";
+import { buildUserPrompt } from "./lib/prompt";
+import { streamChatText } from "./lib/sse";
+import { loadStored, saveStored } from "./lib/storage";
+import { detectWpsBridge, type StreamingWriter, type WpsBridge } from "./lib/wps";
+
+const SETTINGS_KEY = "rebuild-wps-ai.settings";
+const PROMPT_KEY = "rebuild-wps-ai.prompt";
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<ProviderSettings>(() =>
+    loadStored(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS)
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
+    loadStored(
+      PROMPT_KEY,
+      "У»иТа╣ТЇ«тйЊтЅЇСИ╗жбўућЪТѕљжђѓтљѕуЏ┤ТјЦтєЎтЁЦТГБт╝ЈТќЄТАБТГБТќЄуџётєЁт«╣сђѓ"
+    )
+  );
+  const [selectionPreview, setSelectionPreview] = useState("");
+  const [output, setOutput] = useState("");
+  const [hostLabel, setHostLabel] = useState("ТБђТхІСИГ");
+  const [docStatus, setDocStatus] = useState("уГЅтЙЁУ┐ъТјЦ");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+
+  const bridgeRef = useRef<WpsBridge | null>(null);
+  const writerRef = useRef<StreamingWriter | null>(null);
+  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStored(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStored(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    let mounted = true;
+
+    async function bootstrap() {
+      const bridge = await detectWpsBridge();
+      if (!mounted) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      bridgeRef.current = bridge;
+      setHostLabel(bridge.label);
+
+      if (bridge.kind === "mock") {
+        setDocStatus("тйЊтЅЇС╗ЁСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ№╝їТюфУ┐ъТјЦ WPS ТќЄТАБт«┐СИ╗");
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setDocStatus("ти▓У┐ъТјЦТќЄТАБт«┐СИ╗№╝їтЈ»т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ");
+
+      try {
+        const selected = await bridge.readSelectionText();
+        if (mounted) {
+          setSelectionPreview(selected);
+        }
+      } catch {
+        if (mounted) {
+          setDocStatus("т«┐СИ╗ти▓У┐ъТјЦ№╝їСйєТџѓТЌХТЌаТ│ЋУ»╗тЈќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║");
+        }
+      }
+    }
+
+    void bootstrap();
+
+    return () => {
+      mounted = false;
+    };
+  }, []);
+
+  const providerMeta = useMemo(
+    () =>
+      PROVIDER_OPTIONS.find((item) => item.id === settings.providerId) ??
+      PROVIDER_OPTIONS[0],
+    [settings.providerId]
+  );
+
+  async function refreshSelection() {
+    const bridge = bridgeRef.current ?? (await detectWpsBridge());
+    bridgeRef.current = bridge;
+    setHostLabel(bridge.label);
+
+    try {
+      const text = await bridge.readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionPreview(text);
+      setDocStatus(
+        text ? "ти▓тљїТГЦтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║тєЁт«╣" : "тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СИ║уЕ║№╝їт░єТїЅтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«тєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ"
+      );
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const message =
+        caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Ц";
+      setError(message);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function updateSettings<K extends keyof ProviderSettings>(
+    key: K,
+    value: ProviderSettings[K]
+  ) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function onProviderChange(value: ProviderId) {
+    setSettings((current) => applyProviderDefaults(current, value));
+  }
+
+  async function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+    setDocStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    const trimmedPrompt = prompt.trim();
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!trimmedPrompt) {
+      setError("У»иУЙЊтЁЦС╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setOutput("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    const bridge = bridgeRef.current ?? (await detectWpsBridge());
+    bridgeRef.current = bridge;
+    setHostLabel(bridge.label);
+
+    let currentSelection = selectionPreview;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext && !currentSelection) {
+      try {
+        currentSelection = await bridge.readSelectionText();
+        setSelectionPreview(currentSelection);
+      } catch {
+        currentSelection = "";
+      }
+    }
+
+    const writer = await bridge.createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+    writerRef.current = writer;
+    setDocStatus(writer.locationLabel);
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+
+    try {
+      const messages = [
+        {
+          role: "system" as const,
+          content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
+        },
+        {
+          role: "user" as const,
+          content: buildUserPrompt({
+            prompt: trimmedPrompt,
+            selectionText: currentSelection,
+            useSelectionAsContext: settings.useSelectionAsContext
+          })
+        }
+      ];
+
+      let fullText = "";
+
+      for await (const chunk of streamChatText({
+        settings,
+        messages,
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        fullText += chunk;
+        await writer.update(fullText);
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setOutput(fullText);
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish();
+      setDocStatus(
+        bridge.kind === "mock"
+          ? "ТюгТгАућЪТѕљС╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ"
+          : "тєЁт«╣ти▓т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ"
+      );
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const isAbort =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+      if (isAbort) {
+        await writer.cancel();
+        setDocStatus("ти▓тЂюТГб№╝їС┐ЮуЋЎтйЊтЅЇти▓тєЎтЁЦтєЁт«╣");
+      } else {
+        const message =
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц";
+        setError(message);
+        setDocStatus("ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц");
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      writerRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <main className="shell">
+      <section className="hero panel">
+        <div className="hero-copy">
+          <span className="eyebrow">WPS AI TASK PANE</span>
+          <h1>Тіі AI УЙЊтЄ║т«ъТЌХтєЎУ┐Џ WPS ТГБТќЄ</h1>
+          <p>
+            у╗ЪСИђТјЦ OpenRouter тњї NVIDIA Build№╝їТеАтъІУЙЊтЄ║СИђУЙ╣ућЪТѕљ№╝їСИђУЙ╣УдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║ТѕќТЈњтЁЦтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«сђѓ
+          </p>
+        </div>
+        <div className="hero-meta">
+          <span className="pill accent">{hostLabel}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{providerMeta.label}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{isGenerating ? "ућЪТѕљСИГ" : "тЙЁтЉй"}</span>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+
+      <section className="layout">
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Prompt</span>
+                <h2>С╗╗тіАУЙЊтЁЦ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <button className="ghost-button" onClick={() => void refreshSelection()}>
+                У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║
+              </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>С╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓ</span>
+              <textarea
+                value={prompt}
+                onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="СЙІтдѓ№╝џтЪ║С║јтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║№╝їТЋ┤уљєТѕљТГБт╝ЈТќ╣ТАѕУ»┤Тўј№╝їС┐ЮуЋЎУдЂуѓ╣т╣ХУАЦтЁЁТЅДУАїТГЦжфцсђѓ"
+                rows={9}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>у│╗у╗ЪТЈљуц║У»Ї</span>
+              <textarea
+                value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                onChange={(event) =>
+                  updateSettings("systemPrompt", event.target.value)
+                }
+                rows={5}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <div className="toggle-grid">
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSettings("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>ТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ</span>
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSettings("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>уЏ┤ТјЦУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║</span>
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="action-row">
+              <button
+                className="primary-button"
+                disabled={isGenerating}
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+              >
+                ућЪТѕљт╣ХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ
+              </button>
+              <button
+                className="secondary-button"
+                disabled={!isGenerating}
+                onClick={() => void stopGeneration()}
+              >
+                тЂюТГб
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Context</span>
+                <h2>тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║</h2>
+              </div>
+              <span className="status-text">{docStatus}</span>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box selection-box">
+              {selectionPreview || "тйЊтЅЇТ▓АТюЅтЈ»УДЂжђЅтї║тєЁт«╣№╝їућЪТѕљТЌХт░єТїЅтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«ТЈњтЁЦсђѓ"}
+            </pre>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Provider</span>
+                <h2>ТеАтъІСИјТјЦтЈБ</h2>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Provider</span>
+              <select
+                value={settings.providerId}
+                onChange={(event) => onProviderChange(event.target.value as ProviderId)}
+              >
+                {PROVIDER_OPTIONS.map((item) => (
+                  <option key={item.id} value={item.id}>
+                    {item.label}
+                  </option>
+                ))}
+              </select>
+              <small>{providerMeta.description}</small>
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>API Key</span>
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSettings("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="sk-..."
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Base URL</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSettings("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Model</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSettings("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="СЙІтдѓ№╝џopenai/gpt-4.1-mini Тѕќ provider СИіти▓т╝ђжђџуџёТеАтъІ ID"
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <div className="numeric-grid">
+              <label className="field">
+                <span>Temperature</span>
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"
+                  step="0.1"
+                  value={settings.temperature}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSettings("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="field">
+                <span>Max Tokens</span>
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="1"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSettings("maxTokens", Number(event.target.value || 1))
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+              <div className="numeric-grid">
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>HTTP-Referer</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.siteUrl}
+                    onChange={(event) =>
+                      updateSettings("siteUrl", event.target.value)
+                    }
+                  />
+                </label>
+
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>X-Title</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.siteName}
+                    onChange={(event) =>
+                      updateSettings("siteName", event.target.value)
+                    }
+                  />
+                </label>
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Live Output</span>
+                <h2>ТхЂт╝Ју╗ЊТъю</h2>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box output-box">
+              {output || "ТеАтъІт╝ђтДІУ┐ћтЏътєЁт«╣тљј№╝їУ┐ЎжЄїС╝џтњї WPS ТГБТќЄтљїТГЦтѕиТќ░сђѓ"}
+            </pre>
+
+            {error ? <div className="error-box">{error}</div> : null}
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+    </main>
+  );
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/src/styles.css`**

```diff
+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #f4efe4;
+  --bg-deep: #e7ddcb;
+  --surface: rgba(255, 250, 241, 0.82);
+  --surface-strong: rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.95);
+  --border: rgba(66, 46, 24, 0.12);
+  --border-strong: rgba(66, 46, 24, 0.2);
+  --text: #21170d;
+  --muted: #6f5d4d;
+  --accent: #d45f26;
+  --accent-strong: #ab4415;
+  --accent-soft: rgba(212, 95, 38, 0.12);
+  --shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(54, 31, 14, 0.08);
+  --radius: 24px;
+  --radius-sm: 16px;
+  --font-sans: "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Microsoft YaHei",
+    sans-serif;
+  --font-serif: "Cambria", "STSong", serif;
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body,
+#root {
+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: var(--font-sans);
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(244, 170, 83, 0.22), transparent 26%),
+    radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(158, 121, 62, 0.18), transparent 28%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg) 0%, var(--bg-deep) 100%);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+.shell {
+  width: min(1320px, 100%);
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 24px;
+}
+
+.layout {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.92fr;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.column {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.panel {
+  position: relative;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  background: linear-gradient(
+    180deg,
+    rgba(255, 251, 244, 0.94) 0%,
+    rgba(255, 246, 231, 0.82) 100%
+  );
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
+}
+
+.panel::before {
+  content: "";
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0 auto auto 0;
+  width: 180px;
+  height: 180px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(212, 95, 38, 0.12), transparent 72%);
+  transform: translate(-30%, -30%);
+  pointer-events: none;
+}
+
+.stack {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 18px;
+  padding: 22px;
+}
+
+.hero {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 24px;
+  margin-bottom: 20px;
+  padding: 28px 28px 26px;
+}
+
+.hero h1 {
+  margin: 8px 0 10px;
+  font-family: var(--font-serif);
+  font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 46px);
+  line-height: 1.02;
+  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
+}
+
+.hero p {
+  max-width: 720px;
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.65;
+}
+
+.hero-copy {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 4px;
+}
+
+.hero-meta {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 10px;
+  min-width: 220px;
+}
+
+.eyebrow,
+.section-kicker {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.section-head {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 16px;
+}
+
+.section-head h2 {
+  margin: 6px 0 0;
+  font-size: 22px;
+  line-height: 1.1;
+}
+
+.field {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.field span {
+  font-size: 13px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.field small {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.5;
+}
+
+textarea,
+input,
+select {
+  width: 100%;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  outline: none;
+  transition:
+    border-color 160ms ease,
+    box-shadow 160ms ease,
+    transform 160ms ease;
+}
+
+textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+  min-height: 120px;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+}
+
+textarea:focus,
+input:focus,
+select:focus {
+  border-color: rgba(212, 95, 38, 0.48);
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(212, 95, 38, 0.12);
+}
+
+.numeric-grid,
+.toggle-grid,
+.action-row {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.numeric-grid {
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.toggle-grid {
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.toggle {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+}
+
+.toggle input {
+  width: 18px;
+  height: 18px;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.action-row {
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
+}
+
+.primary-button,
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  border: 0;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  padding: 13px 20px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition:
+    transform 160ms ease,
+    opacity 160ms ease,
+    box-shadow 160ms ease;
+}
+
+.primary-button:hover,
+.secondary-button:hover,
+.ghost-button:hover {
+  transform: translateY(-1px);
+}
+
+.primary-button:disabled,
+.secondary-button:disabled,
+.ghost-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.45;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+}
+
+.primary-button {
+  color: #fffaf4;
+  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent-strong) 100%);
+  box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(171, 68, 21, 0.22);
+}
+
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: rgba(255, 250, 243, 0.72);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.pill {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  min-height: 34px;
+  padding: 8px 14px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: rgba(255, 252, 246, 0.72);
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.pill.accent {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  background: var(--accent-soft);
+  border-color: rgba(212, 95, 38, 0.18);
+}
+
+.content-box {
+  min-height: 220px;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 18px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background:
+    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 252, 247, 0.96), rgba(255, 247, 235, 0.88)),
+    var(--surface-strong);
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: "Consolas", "Cascadia Mono", "Microsoft YaHei UI", monospace;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.65;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.selection-box {
+  min-height: 180px;
+}
+
+.output-box {
+  min-height: 320px;
+}
+
+.error-box {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(154, 34, 0, 0.18);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  color: #8f2802;
+  background: rgba(188, 54, 18, 0.08);
+}
+
+.status-text {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+  text-align: right;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 1120px) {
+  .layout {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .hero-meta {
+    justify-content: flex-start;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .shell {
+    padding: 14px;
+  }
+
+  .hero,
+  .stack {
+    padding: 18px;
+  }
+
+  .numeric-grid,
+  .toggle-grid,
+  .action-row {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero h1 {
+    font-size: 32px;
+  }
+}
```

**Add: `rebuild-wps-ai/README.md`**

```diff
+# WPS AI жЄЇТъёуЅѕ
+
+У┐ЎТў»СИђСИфуІгуФІжЄЇт╗║уџё WPS СЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжА╣уЏ«№╝їуЏ«ТаЄТў»уЏ┤ТјЦТ╗АУХ│У┐ЎСИЅСИфжюђТ▒ѓ№╝џ
+
+- тюе WPS СИГСйюСИ║С╗╗тіАуфЌТа╝Сй┐уће
+- тЈ»тѕЄТЇб `OpenRouter` Тѕќ `NVIDIA Build` уџё OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣ТјЦтЈБ
+- ТеАтъІУЙЊтЄ║ТхЂт╝Јт«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ
+
+## уЏ«тйЋ
+
+- `src/lib/providers.ts`
+  Provider ТійУ▒Атњїж╗ўУ«цжЁЇуй«
+- `src/lib/sse.ts`
+  SSE ТхЂт╝ЈУДБТъљтњї OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣УЙЊтЄ║ТЈљтЈќ
+- `src/lib/wps.ts`
+  WPS ТќЄТАБТАЦТјЦсђѓС╝ўтЁѕТјбТхІ `window.instance` уџё WebOffice т«┐СИ╗№╝їтЁХТгАТјбТхІ `window.wps.Application` Тѕќ `window.Application`
+- `src/App.tsx`
+  СЙДУЙ╣ТаЈ UIсђЂУ«Йуй«жЮбТЮ┐сђЂТхЂт╝ЈтєЎтЁЦТхЂуеІ
+
+## тљ»тіе
+
+```bash
+npm install
+npm run dev
+```
+
+## Тъёт╗║
+
+```bash
+npm run build
+```
+
+Тъёт╗║С║ДуЅЕтЈ»С╗ЦуЏ┤ТјЦСйюСИ║С╗╗тіАуфЌТа╝жАхжЮбжЃеуй▓сђѓ
+
+## т«┐СИ╗ТјЦтЁЦ
+
+### WPS WebOffice
+
+тдѓТъюСйаТў» WebOffice жАхжЮбжЏєТѕљ№╝їтѕЮтДІтїќт«ъСЙІтљјТііт«ъСЙІТџ┤жю▓у╗ЎС╗╗тіАуфЌТа╝жАхжЮб№╝џ
+
+```ts
+const instance = WebOfficeSDK.init(config)
+window.instance = instance
+```
+
+жА╣уЏ«С╝џУЄфтіеУ░Ѓуће№╝џ
+
+- `instance.ready()`
+- `instance.Application`
+- `ActiveDocument.ActiveWindow.Selection.Range`
+- `Range.Text`
+
+### WPS Тюгтю░т«┐СИ╗
+
+тдѓТъюСйати▓ТюЅТюгтю░т«┐СИ╗ТАЦТјЦ№╝їУ»иуА«С┐ЮжАхжЮбтєЁУЃйУ«┐жЌ«СИІжЮбС╗╗СИђт»╣У▒А№╝џ
+
+```ts
+window.wps.Application
+window.Application
+```
+
+жА╣уЏ«С╝џтюеУ┐љУАїТЌХУЄфтіеТјбТхІ№╝їт╣ХСй┐ућеуЏИтљїуџё Range тєЎтЁЦжђ╗УЙЉсђѓ
+
+## тєЎтЁЦуГќуЋЦ
+
+СИ║С║єС┐ЮУ»ЂРђют«ъТЌХУЙЊтЄ║тѕ░ТГБТќЄРђЮТЌХСИЇтЏаСИ║ token жбЉу╣ЂтѕиТќ░т»╝УЄ┤тЁЅТаЄТ╝ѓуД╗№╝їУ┐ЎСИфт«ъуј░жЄЄућеС║єтЏ║т«џжћџуѓ╣уГќуЋЦ№╝џ
+
+1. У«░тйЋтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║ `Start/End`
+2. тЈ»жђЅТИЁуЕ║тјЪжђЅтї║
+3. ТеАтъІТхЂт╝ЈУ┐ћтЏъТЌХ№╝їТїЅ 60ms УіѓТхЂ
+4. Т»ЈТгАуће `ActiveDocument.Range(anchor, anchor + text.length).Text = text` УдєтєЎУ»ЦТ«хтї║тЪЪ
+
+У┐ЎТаиТГБТќЄУЃйТїЂу╗ГтѕиТќ░№╝їтљїТЌХТ»ћжђљ token У░ЃСИђТгАТЈњтЁЦ API ТЏ┤уе│т«џсђѓ
+
+## Provider жЁЇуй«
+

+
+- Base URL ж╗ўУ«ц№╝џ`https://openrouter.ai/api/v1`
+- жюђУдЂ `API Key`

Output:
# SpecStory Artifacts Directory
    
This directory is automatically created and maintained by the SpecStory extension to preserve your AI chat history.
    
## What's Here?
    
- `.specstory/history`: Contains auto-saved markdown files of your AI coding sessions
    - Each file represents a separate AI chat session
    - If you enable auto-save, files are automatically updated as you work
    - You can enable/disable the auto-save feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default
- `.specstory/.project.json`: Contains the persistent project identity for the current workspace
    - This file is only present if you enable AI rules derivation
    - This is used to provide consistent project identity of your project, even as the workspace is moved or renamed
- `.specstory/ai_rules_backups`: Contains backups of the `.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc` or the `.github/copilot-instructions.md` file
    - Backups are automatically created each time the `.cursor/rules/derived-cursor-rules.mdc` or the `.github/copilot-instructions.md` file is updated
    - You can enable/disable the AI Rules derivation feature in the SpecStory settings, it is disabled by default
- `.specstory/.gitignore`: Contains directives to exclude non-essential contents of the `.specstory` directory from version control
    - Add `/history` to exclude the auto-saved chat history from version control

## Valuable Uses
    
- Capture: Keep your context window up-to-date when starting new Chat/Composer sessions via @ references
- Search: For previous prompts and code snippets 
- Learn: Meta-analyze your patterns and learn from your past experiences
- Derive: Keep the AI on course with your past decisions by automatically deriving rules from your AI interactions
    
## Version Control
    
We recommend keeping this directory under version control to maintain a history of your AI interactions. However, if you prefer not to version these files, you can exclude them by adding this to your `.gitignore`:
    
```
.specstory/**
```

We recommend __not__ keeping the `.specstory/ai_rules_backups` directory under version control if you are already using git to version your AI rules, and committing regularly. You can exclude it by adding this to your `.gitignore`:

```
.specstory/ai_rules_backups
```

## Searching Your Codebase
    
When searching your codebase, search results may include your previous AI coding interactions. To focus solely on your actual code files, you can exclude the AI interaction history from search results.
    
To exclude AI interaction history:
    
1. Open the "Find in Files" search in Cursor or VSCode (Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + F)
2. Navigate to the "files to exclude" section
3. Add the following pattern:
    
```
.specstory/*
```
    
This will ensure your searches only return results from your working codebase files.

## Notes

- Auto-save only works when Cursor or VSCode flushes sqlite database data to disk. This results in a small delay after the AI response is complete before SpecStory can save the history.

## Settings
    
You can control auto-saving behavior in Cursor or VSCode:
    
1. Open Cursor/Code жѕФ?Settings жѕФ?VS Code Settings (Cmd/Ctrl + ,)
2. Search for "SpecStory"
3. Find "Auto Save" setting to enable/disable
    
Auto-save occurs when changes are detected in the sqlite database, or every 2 minutes as a safety net.
```
</details></tool-use>

// https://vitejs.dev/config/
export default defineConfig({
  base:'./',
  esbuild: {
    loader: "tsx",
    include: /src\/.*\.[jt]sx?$/,
    exclude: [],

import React, { Component } from 'react';
import { connect } from 'react-redux';
import { dockLeft, dockRight, hideTaskPane, addString, getDocName, setDemoSpan, openWeb } from '../actions/taskpane';
import './dialog.css';
import axios from 'axios';


class Taskpane extends Component {

  componentDidMount() {
    axios.get('/.debugTemp/NotifyDemoUrl').then((res) => {
      const { setDemoSpan } = this.props;
      setDemoSpan(res.data);
    });
  }

  onDockLeft = () => {
    const { dockLeft } = this.props;
    dockLeft();
  }

  onDockRight = () => {
    const { dockRight } = this.props;
    dockRight();
  }
  onHideTaskPane = () => {
    const { hideTaskPane } = this.props;
    hideTaskPane();
  }
  onAddString = () => {
    const { addString } = this.props;
    addString();
  }
  onGetDocName = () => {
    const { getDocName } = this.props;
    getDocName();
  }
  onOpenWeb = () => {
    const { openWeb } = this.props;
    openWeb();
  }

  render() {
    const { docName, demoSpan } = this.props;

    return (
      <div className="global">
        <div className="divItem">
          ТЮЕТгљТДИТХЊРѓгТХЊЬЂєуХЅТццубЅу┤ЮжјИ?span className="debug">"F12"</span>жЇЎЬѕЎС║њжјхТњ│у┤ЉуњІтєГуў»жЇБсёБРѓг?
        </div>
        <div className="divItem">
          ТЮЕТгјжЄюу╗ђУй░уиЦуЂъТЏасЂџТхютћџpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццтюГТ«ЉжљЕуе┐тЈДжЇЕУЎ╣ЬћЁжЉ│УЌЅтДЈжћЏт▒╝угїB/SТХЊТ░гтДЪу╗»УЇцу▓║жљетІфТ░дТхюТјъу┤ЮуњЄжБјТЋцте┤т┐џЬЮЇжЇБсёдтбдт»«РѓгжћЏ?
            <span className="docs" onClick={this.onOpenWeb}>{demoSpan}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="divItem">т»«РѓгжЇЎТѕъТъЃтдЌ? <span className="docs">https://open.wps.cn/docs/office</span></div>
        <hr />
        <div className="divItem">
          <button onClick={this.onDockLeft}>жЇІТ╗ѕТйгт«И№╣ЂуФЪ</button>
          <button onClick={this.onDockRight}>жЇІТ╗ѕТйгжЇЎт«ауФЪ</button>
          <button onClick={this.onHideTaskPane}>жЌЁТё»ТБїTaskPane</button>
          <button onClick={this.onAddString} > жЈѓтЏесђѓт»«РѓгТЙХтГўтЮіжЇћуі▓уЊДу╗Ќ№И┐Удє</button >
          <button onClick={this.onGetDocName} > жЇЎТаеТъЃТхаУи║ТѓЋ</button >
        </div >
        <hr />
        <div className="divItem">жЈѓтЏесђѓжЈѓтЏдТгбжЇџтХёУ┤ЪжћЏ?span>{docName}</span></div>
      </div>
    )
  }
}

const mapStateToProps = state => {
  return {
    docName: state.dialog.get('docName'),
    demoSpan: state.dialog.get('demoSpan'),
  }
}

export default connect(mapStateToProps, {
  dockLeft,
  dockRight,
  hideTaskPane,
  addString,
  getDocName,
  setDemoSpan,
  openWeb
})(Taskpane);
```
</details></tool-use>

export const DOCKLEFT = "dockLeft";
export const DOCKRIGHT = "dockRight";
export const HIDETASKPANE = "hideTaskPane";
export const ADDSTRING = "addString";
export const GETDOCNAME = "getDocName";
export const SETDEMOSPAN = "setDemoSpan";
export const OPENWEB = "openWeb";


export function dockLeft(data) {
    return { type: DOCKLEFT, data }
}

export function dockRight(data) {
    return { type: DOCKRIGHT, data }
}

export function hideTaskPane(data) {
    return { type: HIDETASKPANE, data }
}

export function addString(data) {
    return { type: ADDSTRING, data }
}

export function getDocName(data) {
    return { type: GETDOCNAME, data }
}

export function setDemoSpan(data) {
    return { type: SETDEMOSPAN, data }
}

export function openWeb(data) {
    return { type: OPENWEB, data }
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import Util from '../js/util.js'
import SystemDemo from '../js/systemdemo.js'
/* global wps:false */
var WebNotifycount = 0;

var ribbon = {
    //ТЮЕТгјжЄюжЇЉУіЦТџЪжЇдсёдТџБТХЊуЇЂpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏУЁЉжЈёЬѕюЬЃЄТХЊРѓгТХЊЬЂЁтбйуљЏт▓ђТ«Љ
    OnAddinLoad: function(ribbonUI) {
        if (typeof (window.Application.ribbonUI) != "object") {
            window.Application.ribbonUI = ribbonUI
        }

        if (typeof (window.Application.Enum) != "object") { // Т┐АтѓЏуЂЅтеїРёЃТ╣ЂжЇљтЉ»уќєжЈІТ░ФтдЄжЇі?
            window.Application.Enum = Util.WPS_Enum
        }

        //ТЮЕТгЈтџЉТХЊЬЂёЬЄ▒жЇЉтЊётџ▒жЈЂуЅѕТДИу╝ЂТгЈЬў╗жќ«сёцугЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝Ђує╗уџЪжљбсёДТ«Љ
        window.openOfficeFileFromSystemDemo = SystemDemo.openOfficeFileFromSystemDemo
        window.InvokeFromSystemDemo = SystemDemo.InvokeFromSystemDemo

        window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("EnableFlag", false) //т»░РѓгPluginStorageТХЊЬЁАЬєЋу╝ЃЬє╗уФ┤ТХЊЬЂЁуѕБуњЂтИ«у┤Южљбсёцу░гжј║ЛЃтЪЌТХЊсѓёжЄюжјИтцљТї│жљетІГуќєжљЈ?
        window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("ApiEventFlag", false) //т»░РѓгPluginStorageТХЊЬЁАЬєЋу╝ЃЬє╗уФ┤ТХЊЬЂЁуѕБуњЂтИ«у┤Южљбсёцу░гжј║ЛЃтЪЌApiEventжљетІгт»южќйућйabel
        return true
    },

    OnAction: function(control) {
        const eleId = control.Id
        switch (eleId) {
            case "btnShowMsg":
                {
                    const doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
                    if (!doc) {
                        alert("Уц░Тњ│тбатеїРёЃТ╣ЂжјхТњ│у┤ЉТхаУ«│уХЇжЈѓтЏесђѓ")
                        return
                    }
                    alert(doc.Name)
                }
                break;
            case "btnIsEnbable":
                {
                    let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("EnableFlag")
                    window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("EnableFlag", !bFlag)

                    //жќФТ░▒уЁАwpsжЇњжћІТЪіТхасЃцугЁжЇЉуі▒жЄюжјИтцљсѓ░жљетІГтДИжјг?
                    window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnIsEnbable")
                    window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnShowDialog")
                    window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnShowTaskPane")
                    //window.Application.ribbonUI.Invalidate(); ТЮЕТгњЬћЉТха№йЄуѕюжјхТњ│у┤ЉжЇњТгљТДИжЇњжћІТЪіжјхРѓгжЈѕтцїТ«ЉжјИтцљТї│жљўУѕхРѓг?
                    break
                }
            case "btnShowDialog":
                window.Application.ShowDialog(Util.GetUrlPath() + "dialog", "ТЮЕТгљТДИТХЊРѓгТХЊЬЂёЬЄ«уњЄТ┐ЄЬћІу╝ЃТѕдсђЅ", 400 * window.devicePixelRatio, 400 * window.devicePixelRatio, false)
                break
            case "btnShowTaskPane":
                {
                    let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                    if (!tsId) {
                        let tskpane = window.Application.CreateTaskPane(Util.GetUrlPath() + "taskpane")
                        let id = tskpane.ID
                        window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("taskpane_id", id)
                        tskpane.Visible = true
                    } else {
                        let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                        tskpane.Visible = !tskpane.Visible
                    }
                }
                break
            case "btnApiEvent":
                {
                    let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("ApiEventFlag")
                    let bRegister = bFlag ? false : true
                    window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("ApiEventFlag", bRegister)
                    if (bRegister){
                        window.Application.ApiEvent.AddApiEventListener('DocumentNew', 'ribbon.OnNewDocumentApiEvent')
                    }
                    else{
                        window.Application.ApiEvent.RemoveApiEventListener('DocumentNew', 'ribbon.OnNewDocumentApiEvent')
                    }
                    
                    window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnApiEvent") 
                }
                break
            case "btnWebNotify":
                {
                    let currentTime = new Date()
                    let timeStr = currentTime.getHours() + ':' + currentTime.getMinutes() + ":" + currentTime.getSeconds()
                    window.Application.OAAssist.WebNotify("ТЮЕТгњЬћЉжЇљтЉГЬєљжљбуюъpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏт»їжЇћсёЕРѓгСййТЈфу╝ЂТгјугЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝ЂуЄѓу┤ЮжЇЎЬѕЎС║њТхау╗ўтЅ░жЉиЬЂёуЋЙТХћ? тДБТќ┐ЬЏДжЈЃтаЋТБ┐жЇі?" + timeStr + "жћЏт▒ЙЬѓ╝жЈЂтИ«у┤░" + (++WebNotifycount), true)
                }
                break
            default:
                break
        }
        return true
    },

import React from 'react';
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom';
import { HashRouter, Route, Switch } from 'react-router-dom';
import App from './components/app';
import Dialog from './components/dialog';
import TaskPane from './components/taskpane';
import { Provider } from 'react-redux';
import { createStore } from "redux";
import rootReducer from './reducers';

const store = createStore(rootReducer, window.STATE_FROM_SERVER);

ReactDOM.render((
  <Provider store={store}>
    <HashRouter>
      <Switch>
        <Route path="/" exact component={App} />
        <Route path="/dialog" exact component={Dialog} />
        <Route path="/taskpane" exact component={TaskPane} />
      </Switch>
    </HashRouter>
  </Provider>
), document.getElementById("root")
);
```
</details></tool-use>

var WPS_Enum = {
    msoCTPDockPositionLeft: 0,
    msoCTPDockPositionRight: 2
}

function GetUrlPath() {
    let e = document.location.toString()
    e = decodeURI(e)
    if (-1 !== e.indexOf("/"))
        e = e.substring(0, e.lastIndexOf("/"))
    return e
}

export default {
    WPS_Enum,
    GetUrlPath
}

const inquirer = require('inquirer')
const fs = require('fs')
const fsEx = require('fs-extra')
const path = require('path')
const execa = require('execa')
const chalk = require('chalk');
const os = require('os')
var cp = require('child_process');
const jsUtil = require('./util.js')

const pluginsDirPath = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../packages', '@wps-jsapi')
let context = ""

async function create(projectName, options) {
	if (false == new RegExp("^[!-~]+$").test(projectName)){
		console.log(`${chalk.red("ТццтюГТ┤░жЇџтХЁтйДжЉ│УіЦТДИуђЏТЦЂуўЮжієСй╣ТџЪуђЏТЦђТІ░ТХЊтгфтъЮу╗Й?)}...`)
		return
	}
	const cwd = options.cwd || process.cwd()
	const targetDir = path.resolve(cwd, projectName || '.')
	if (fs.existsSync(targetDir)) {
		const { action } = await inquirer.prompt([
			{
				name: 'action',
				type: 'list',
				message: `жљЕЬєйуѕБжЈѓтЏдТгбТЙХ?${chalk.cyan(targetDir)} т«ИУїгу▓АуђЏТе║Т╣фжієтѓЮЬЄгжќФтцІтФежј┐тХёуХћ:`,
				choices: [
					{ name: 'жЇњуі╗ТФј', value: 'overwrite' },
					{ name: 'жЇЎТаеуДи', value: false }
				]
			}
		])
		if (!action)
			return false
		console.log(`\nжЇњуі╗ТФјжљЕЬє╝уХЇ ${chalk.cyan(targetDir)}...`)
		fsEx.removeSync(targetDir)
	}
	inquirer.prompt([{
		name: 'pluginType',
		type: 'list',
		message: `жќФтцІтФе WPS жЇћуі║ТхЄТццтюГУбФжЇе?`,
		choices: [
			{
				name: 'жЈѓтЏДуЊД',
				value: 'wps'
			},
			{
				name: 'тЕЋТЌѓсЂџ',
				value: 'wpp'
			},
			{
				name: 'жљбжЮЏуЊЎуљЏсёдуЅИ',
				value: 'et'
			}
		]
	}, {
		name: 'frameType',
		type: 'list',
		message: `жќФтцІтФеUIтдЌтЌўуЂд:`,
		choices: [
			{
				name: 'Vue(жј║сёет┤ў)',
				value: 'vue'
			},
			{
				name: 'React',
				value: 'react'
			},
			{
				name: 'жЈЃ?,
				value: 'none'
			}
		]
	}]).then(answers => {
		context = targetDir
		let demoType = answers.pluginType
		if (answers.frameType != "none")
			demoType = `${answers.pluginType}_${answers.frameType}`
		const pluginPath = path.resolve(pluginsDirPath, demoType)
		fs.readdir(pluginPath, (_, files) => {
			files.forEach(file => {
				const srcPath = path.resolve(pluginPath, file)
				const dstPath = path.resolve(targetDir, file)
				fsEx.copySync(srcPath, dstPath)
			})

			const cfgPath = path.resolve(targetDir, 'package.json')
			var cfgData = fsEx.readFileSync(cfgPath)
			var oldCfg = JSON.parse(cfgData)

			var projectCfg = { name: projectName, addonType: answers.pluginType, version: "1.0.0" }
			for (key in oldCfg)
				projectCfg[key] = oldCfg[key]
			projectCfg.name = projectName
			projectCfg.addonType = answers.pluginType
			projectCfg.version = "1.0.0"
			cfgData = JSON.stringify(projectCfg, "", "\t")
			fsEx.writeFileSync(cfgPath, cfgData)

			initAddOn(targetDir, projectName, answers)
		})
	})
}

async function initAddOn(targetDir, projectName, answers) {
	if (jsUtil.hasGit()) {
		await run('git init')
		await run('git add -A')
		await run('git', ['commit', '-m', 'init'])
	}

	if (os.platform()=='win32'){
		cp.spawnSync('cmd', ['/c', 'npm', 'i'], { stdio: 'inherit', cwd: targetDir })
	}else{
		cp.spawnSync(jsUtil.GetNpmCmd(), ['i'], { stdio: 'inherit', cwd: targetDir })
	}

	console.log(
		`\n==>>  жјхЛєЬћЉТхасЃцугЁжЇЏТѕњТіцТЮЕТХюЬћЉ WPS жЇћуі║ТхЄТццуЉ░у┤ЉжЇЎ?\n\n` +
		(chalk.cyan(` ${chalk.gray('$')} cd ${projectName}\n`)) +
		chalk.cyan(` ${chalk.gray('$')} wpsjs debug\n`)
	)
}

function run(command, args) {
	if (!args) { [command, ...args] = command.split(/\s+/) }
	return execa(command, args, { cwd: context })
}

module.exports = (...args) => {
	return create(...args).catch(err => {
		console.error(err)
		if (!process.env.VUE_CLI_TEST) {
			process.exit(1)
		}
	})
}
```
</details></tool-use>

'use strict'

const ts = require("typescript")
const fs = require("node:fs")
const fs_extra = require('fs-extra')
const { dirname } = require("node:path")
const { resolve } = require("node:path")

const functionNamePattern = new RegExp("^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$")

/**
 * @field {string} path
 * @field {string} namespace
 * @field {ts.SourceFile} sourceFile
 * @field {ts.Program} program
 * @field {ts.TypeChecker} typeChecker
 */
class TsParser {
    /**
     * @param {string} path
     */
    constructor(path) {
        this.path = resolve(path)
        this.program = ts.createProgram([this.path], { allowJs: true });
        this.sourceFile = this.program.getSourceFile(this.path)
        if (this.sourceFile === undefined) {
            throw new Error(`жЈѓтЏдТгб "${this.path}" жЈЃуі│уАХуЉЎ№йєуђй`)
        }
        this.typeChecker = this.program.getTypeChecker()
    }

    /**
     * @param {string | ts.NodeArray<ts.JSDocComment> | undefined} comment
     * @returns {string}
     * */
    parseComment(comment) {
        let comments = []
        if (typeof comment == "string") {
            comments.push(comment)
        } else if (comment) {
            for (const commentChild of comment) {
                comments.push(commentChild.text)
            }
        }
        return comments.join()
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.Type} type
     * @apram {number} [arrayLevel]
     * @returns {string}
     * */
    parseType(type, arrayLevel = 0) {
        const symbol = type.getSymbol()
        if (symbol && symbol.getName() === "Array") {
            arrayLevel += 1
            const params = this.typeChecker.getTypeArguments(type)
            if (params.length !== 1) {
                throw new Error("жЈЂТЅ«у▓Їу╗ФУ»▓уђижЇЈтєфуцїу╗ФУ»▓уђиТХЊтХєЬёюу║Г?)
            }
            const elementType = params[0]
            if (elementType?.getSymbol()?.getName() !== "Array") {
                if (arrayLevel > 2)
                    throw new Error("ТЙХТ░▒Ти«жЈЂТЅ«у▓ЇТХЊтХєТЋ«жјИ? жЈЂТЅ«у▓ЇУ╣ЄтЉ┤сђЈжЈёЬѕЎу░Еу╝ЂтГўТџЪу╝Ђ?)
                else if (arrayLevel === 1) 
                    throw new Error("ТХЊРѓгу╝ЂтГўТџЪу╝ЂтІфугЅжЈђЬѕЏт»ћ, жЈЂТЅ«у▓ЇУ╣ЄтЉ┤сђЈжЈёЬѕЎу░Еу╝ЂтГўТџЪу╝Ђ?)
            }

            return this.parseType(elementType, arrayLevel) + "[]"
        }
        if (type.isUnion()) {
            if (type.types.every(t => t.getFlags() === ts.TypeFlags.BooleanLiteral))
                return "boolean"
            return "any"
        }

        const flag = type.getFlags()
        if (flag & ts.TypeFlags.String)
            return "string"
        if (flag & ts.TypeFlags.Number)
            return "number"
        if (flag & ts.TypeFlags.Boolean)
            return "bool"
        if (flag & ts.TypeFlags.Enum)
            return "number"

        return "any"
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.TypeNode} typeNode
     * @returns {string}
     * */
    parseTypeNode(typeNode) {
        try {
            const type = this.typeChecker.getTypeFromTypeNode(typeNode)
            return this.parseType(type)
        } catch (e) {
            throw new Error(`у╗ФУ»▓уђиуЉЎ№йєуђйжќ┐ТгњЬЄц(${typeNode.getText()}): ` + e.message)
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.JSDocTypeExpression} typeExpr
     * @returns {string}
     * */
    parseTypeDoc(typeExpr) {
        return typeExpr.type && this.parseTypeNode(typeExpr.type)
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.TypeNode|undefined} typeNode
     * @param {ts.JSDocTypeExpression|undefined} typeExpr
     * @returns {string}
     * */
    parseTypeNodeOrDoc(typeNode, typeExpr) {
        return (typeNode && this.parseTypeNode(typeNode))
            ?? (typeExpr && this.parseTypeDoc(typeExpr))
            ?? "any"
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.ParameterDeclaration} node
     * @returns {{name: string, description: string, type: string}}
     * */
    parseParameter(node) {
        const doc = ts.getJSDocParameterTags(node)[0]

        let typeNode = node.type;
        let typeExpr = doc?.typeExpression;
        let type = (typeNode && this.parseTypeNode(typeNode))
            ?? (typeExpr && this.parseTypeDoc(typeExpr))
            ?? "any"

        let description = this.parseComment(doc?.comment)
        if (description.startsWith("-"))
            description = description.substring(1)
        description = description.trim()

        if (doc && doc.isBracketed || node.questionToken !== undefined)
            type += "?"

        return {
            name: node.name.text,
            description,
            type
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param {ts.FunctionDeclaration} node
     * @returns {{name: string, parameters: object[], description: string, result: {type: string}}}
     * */

        const name = node.name.text
        if (name.match(functi

/* global wps:false */

function openOfficeFileFromSystemDemo(param){
    let jsonObj = (typeof(param)=='string' ? JSON.parse(param) : param)
    alert("Тхат║ЮугЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝ЂуєХу┤ХТЮЕтЏеТйхжљетІФт╝гжЈЂжбЂУ┤ЪжћЏ? + JSON.stringify(jsonObj))
    return {wpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццтйњсђЇТЮЕТќ┐Т┤ќ: jsonObj.filepath + ", ТЮЕТгјжЄюжЇдТЮ┐ТйЃу╝ЂТгЉТ«ЉТХЊтХєЬёюу║Г?}
}

function InvokeFromSystemDemo(param){
    let jsonObj = (typeof(param)=='string' ? JSON.parse(param) : param)
    let handleInfo = jsonObj.Index
    switch (handleInfo){
        case "getDocumentName":{
            let docName = ""
            if (window.Application.ActiveDocument){
                docName = window.Application.ActiveDocument.Name
            }

            return {Уц░Тњ│тбажјхТњ│у┤ЉжљетІгТъЃТхаУи║ТѓЋТХЊ?docName}
        }

        case "newDocument":{
            let newDocName=""
            let doc = window.Application.Documents.Add()
            newDocName = doc.Name

            return {жј┐тХёуХћу╝ЂТњ┤уЂЅ:"жЈѓТЮ┐у╝ЊжЈѓтЏесђѓжј┤ТёгтДЏжћЏт▒ЙТъЃтдЌ№йЁТѓЋТХЊуї┤у┤░" + newDocName}
        }

        case "OpenFile":{
            let filePath = jsonObj.filepath
            window.Application.Documents.OpenFromUrl(filePath)
            return {жј┐тХёуХћу╝ЂТњ┤уЂЅ:"жјхТњ│у┤ЉжЈѓтЏдТгбжј┤ТёгтДЏ"}
        }
        default:
    }

    return {жЇЈУи║уЋаxxx:""}
}

export default{
    openOfficeFileFromSystemDemo,
    InvokeFromSystemDemo
}
```

import { DOCKLEFT, DOCKRIGHT, HIDETASKPANE, ADDSTRING, GETDOCNAME, SETDEMOSPAN, OPENWEB } from "../actions/taskpane";
import * as Immutable from "immutable";
import Util from "../js/util.js"

/* global wps:false */

const defaultState = Immutable.Map({
    docName: null,
    demoSpan: "waiting..."
});

export default function (state = defaultState, action) {
    switch (action.type) {
        case DOCKLEFT:
            {
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    let value;
                    if (window.Application.Enum)
                        value =  window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionLeft;
                    else
                        value = Util.WPS_Enum.msoCTPDockPositionLeft
                    tskpane.DockPosition = value
                }
                break
            }
        case DOCKRIGHT:
            {
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    let value;
                    if (window.Application.Enum)
                        value =  window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight;
                    else
                        value = Util.WPS_Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight
                    tskpane.DockPosition = value
                }
                break
            }
        case HIDETASKPANE:
            {
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.Visible = false
                }
                break
            }
        case ADDSTRING:
            {
                let doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
                if (doc){
                    doc.Range(0, 0).Text="Hello, wpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТцц?"
                    //Т┐ѓУЌЅтёџжЈёуЌ║psжљетѕАug, ТЮЕТгјУб▒жЇЎсЃеуўйуЉЎ№╣ђтйѓwpsжќ▓тХЄу▓»
                    let rgSel = window.Application.Selection.Range
                    if (rgSel)
                        rgSel.Select()
                }
                break;
            }
        case GETDOCNAME:
            {
                let docName = window.Application.ActiveDocument.Name
                let newState = state.set('docName', docName)
                return newState
            }
        case SETDEMOSPAN:
            {
                let newState = state.set('DemoSpan', action.data)
                return newState
            }
        case OPENWEB:
            {
                let param = state.get('demoSpan')
                window.Application.OAAssist.ShellExecute(param)
            }
        default:
    }
    return state;
}
```
</details></tool-use>

function onbuttonclick(idStr)
{
    if (typeof (window.Application.Enum) != "object") { // Т┐АтѓЏуЂЅтеїРёЃТ╣ЂжЇљтЉ»уќєжЈІТ░ФтдЄжЇі?
        window.Application.Enum = WPS_Enum
    }
    switch(idStr)
    {
        case "dockLeft":{
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.DockPosition = window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionLeft
                }
                break
            }
        case "dockRight":{
            let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.DockPosition = window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight
                }
                break
        }
        case "hideTaskPane":{
            let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.Visible = false
                }
                break
        }
        case "addString":{
            let doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
            if (doc){
                doc.Range(0, 0).Text="Hello, wpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТцц?"
                //Т┐ѓУЌЅтёџжЈёуЌ║psжљетѕАug, ТЮЕТгјУб▒жЇЎсЃеуўйуЉЎ№╣ђтйѓwpsжќ▓тХЄу▓»
                let rgSel = window.Application.Selection.Range
                if (rgSel)
                    rgSel.Select()
            }
            break;
        }
        case "getDocName":{
            let doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
                let textValue = "";
                if (!doc){
                    textValue = textValue + "Уц░Тњ│тбатеїРёЃТ╣ЂжјхТњ│у┤ЉТхаУ«│уХЇжЈѓтЏесђѓ"
                    return
                }
                textValue = textValue + doc.Name
                document.getElementById("text_p").innerHTML = textValue
                break
        }
    }
}

window.onload = function () {
    var xmlReq = WpsInvoke.CreateXHR();
    var url = location.origin + "/.debugTemp/NotifyDemoUrl"
    xmlReq.open("GET", url);
    xmlReq.onload = function (res) {
        var node = document.getElementById("DemoSpan");
        node.innerText = res.target.responseText;
    };
    xmlReq.send();
}
```
</details></tool-use>

//ТЮЕТгјжЄюжЇЉУіЦТџЪжЇдсёдТџБТХЊуЇЂpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏУЁЉжЈёЬѕюЬЃЄТХЊРѓгТХЊЬЂЁтбйуљЏт▓ђТ«Љ
function OnAddinLoad(ribbonUI){
    if (typeof (window.Application.ribbonUI) != "object"){
		window.Application.ribbonUI = ribbonUI
    }
    
    if (typeof (window.Application.Enum) != "object") { // Т┐АтѓЏуЂЅтеїРёЃТ╣ЂжЇљтЉ»уќєжЈІТ░ФтдЄжЇі?
        window.Application.Enum = WPS_Enum
    }

    window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("EnableFlag", false) //т»░РѓгPluginStorageТХЊЬЁАЬєЋу╝ЃЬє╗уФ┤ТХЊЬЂЁуѕБуњЂтИ«у┤Южљбсёцу░гжј║ЛЃтЪЌТХЊсѓёжЄюжјИтцљТї│жљетІГуќєжљЈ?
    window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("ApiEventFlag", false) //т»░РѓгPluginStorageТХЊЬЁАЬєЋу╝ЃЬє╗уФ┤ТХЊЬЂЁуѕБуњЂтИ«у┤Южљбсёцу░гжј║ЛЃтЪЌApiEventжљетІгт»южќйућйabel
    return true
}

var WebNotifycount = 0;
function OnAction(control) {
    const eleId = control.Id
    switch (eleId) {
        case "btnShowMsg":
            {
                const doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
                if (!doc) {
                    alert("Уц░Тњ│тбатеїРёЃТ╣ЂжјхТњ│у┤ЉТхаУ«│уХЇжЈѓтЏесђѓ")
                    return
                }
                alert(doc.Name)
            }
            break;
        case "btnIsEnbable":
            {
                let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("EnableFlag")
                window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("EnableFlag", !bFlag)
                
                //жќФТ░▒уЁАwpsжЇњжћІТЪіТхасЃцугЁжЇЉуі▒жЄюжјИтцљсѓ░жљетІГтДИжјг?
                window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnIsEnbable")
                window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnShowDialog") 
                window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnShowTaskPane") 
                //window.Application.ribbonUI.Invalidate(); ТЮЕТгњЬћЉТха№йЄуѕюжјхТњ│у┤ЉжЇњТгљТДИжЇњжћІТЪіжјхРѓгжЈѕтцїТ«ЉжјИтцљТї│жљўУѕхРѓг?
                break
            }
        case "btnShowDialog":
            window.Application.ShowDialog(GetUrlPath() + "/ui/dialog.html", "ТЮЕТгљТДИТХЊРѓгТХЊЬЂёЬЄ«уњЄТ┐ЄЬћІу╝ЃТѕдсђЅ", 400 * window.devicePixelRatio, 400 * window.devicePixelRatio, false)
            break
        case "btnShowTaskPane":
            {
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (!tsId) {
                    let tskpane = window.Application.CreateTaskPane(GetUrlPath() + "/ui/taskpane.html")
                    let id = tskpane.ID
                    window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("taskpane_id", id)
                    tskpane.Visible = true
                } else {
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.Visible = !tskpane.Visible
                }
            }
            break
        case "btnApiEvent":
            {
                let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("ApiEventFlag")
                let bRegister = bFlag ? false : true
                window.Application.PluginStorage.setItem("ApiEventFlag", bRegister)
                if (bRegister){
                    window.Application.ApiEvent.AddApiEventListener('DocumentNew', OnNewDocumentApiEvent)
                }
                else{
                    window.Application.ApiEvent.RemoveApiEventListener('DocumentNew', OnNewDocumentApiEvent)
                }

                window.Application.ribbonUI.InvalidateControl("btnApiEvent") 
            }
            break
        case "btnWebNotify":
            {
                let currentTime = new Date()
                let timeStr = currentTime.getHours() + ':' + currentTime.getMinutes() + ":" + currentTime.getSeconds()
                window.Application.OAAssist.WebNotify("ТЮЕТгњЬћЉжЇљтЉГЬєљжљбуюъpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏт»їжЇћсёЕРѓгСййТЈфу╝ЂТгјугЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝ЂуЄѓу┤ЮжЇЎЬѕЎС║њТхау╗ўтЅ░жЉиЬЂёуЋЙТХћ? тДБТќ┐ЬЏДжЈЃтаЋТБ┐жЇі?" + timeStr + "жћЏт▒ЙЬѓ╝жЈЂтИ«у┤░" + (++WebNotifycount), true)
            }
            break
        default:
            break
    }
    return true
}

function GetImage(control) {
    const eleId = control.Id
    switch (eleId) {
        case "btnShowMsg":
            return "images/1.svg"
        case "btnShowDialog":
            return "images/2.svg"
        case "btnShowTaskPane":
            return "images/3.svg"
        default:
            ;
    }
    return "images/newFromTemp.svg"
}

function OnGetEnabled(control) {

    switch (eleId) {

            return true
            break
        case "btnShowDialog":

                let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("EnableFlag")
                return bFlag
                break

            {
                let bFlag = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("EnableFlag")

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\ribbon\ribbon.js`**

```diff
+const STORAGE_KEY = "wps_ai_taskpane_id";
+
+function getDockRightValue() {
+  if (window.Application?.Enum?.msoCTPDockPositionRight !== undefined) {
+    return window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight;
+  }
+
+  return 2;
+}
+
+function getTaskPaneUrl() {
+  return new URL("./taskpane.html", window.location.href).href;
+}
+
+function ensureTaskPane() {
+  const storage = window.Application.PluginStorage;
+  const existingId = storage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
+
+  if (existingId) {
+    const existing = window.Application.GetTaskPane(existingId);
+    if (existing) {
+      return existing;
+    }
+  }
+
+  const taskPane = window.Application.CreateTaskPane(getTaskPaneUrl());
+  storage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, taskPane.ID);
+  taskPane.DockPosition = getDockRightValue();
+  return taskPane;
+}
+
+const ribbon = {
+  OnAddinLoad(ribbonUI) {
+    if (typeof window.Application.ribbonUI !== "object") {
+      window.Application.ribbonUI = ribbonUI;
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  },
+
+  OnAction(control) {
+    const doc = window.Application?.ActiveDocument;
+    if (!doc) {
+      alert("тйЊтЅЇТ▓АТюЅТЅЊт╝ђС╗╗СйЋТќЄтГЌТќЄТАБсђѓ");
+      return true;
+    }
+
+    const taskPane = ensureTaskPane();
+
+    switch (control.Id) {
+      case "btnToggleTaskPane":
+        taskPane.Visible = !taskPane.Visible;
+        break;
+      case "btnFocusTaskPane":
+        taskPane.Visible = true;
+        break;
+      default:
+        break;
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  },
+
+  GetImage(control) {
+    if (control.Id === "btnFocusTaskPane") {
+      return "images/ai-stream.svg";
+    }
+
+    return "images/ai-pane.svg";
+  },
+
+  OnGetEnabled() {
+    return Boolean(window.Application?.ActiveDocument);
+  }
+};
+
+export default ribbon;
```
