```diff
+const SETTINGS_KEY = "wps-ai.settings";
+const PROMPT_KEY = "wps-ai.prompt";
+
+export function loadStoredValue(key, fallbackValue) {
+  try {
+    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
+    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : fallbackValue;
+  } catch {
+    return fallbackValue;
+  }
+}
+
+export function saveStoredValue(key, value) {
+  try {
+    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
+  } catch {
+    // Ignore local storage failures in host environments with tighter quotas.
+  }
+}
+
+export { SETTINGS_KEY, PROMPT_KEY };
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\ai.js`**

```diff
+export const PROVIDERS = {
+  openrouter: {
+    id: "openrouter",
+    label: "OpenRouter",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
+  },
+  nvidia: {
+    id: "nvidia",
+    label: "NVIDIA Build",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct"
+  }
+};
+
+export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
+  providerId: "openrouter",
+  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
+  apiKey: "",
+  model: "",
+  temperature: 0.5,
+  maxTokens: 4096,
+  systemPrompt:
+    "СйаТў» WPS ТќЄТАБтіЕТЅІсђѓУ»иУЙЊтЄ║жђѓтљѕуЏ┤ТјЦтєЎтЁЦТГБт╝ЈТќЄТАБТГБТќЄуџёСИГТќЄтєЁт«╣№╝їу╗ЊТъёТИЁТЎ░№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇт»њТџётњїтЁЃтЈЎУ┐░сђѓ",
+  referer: "https://localhost",
+  title: "WPS AI Plugin",
+  useSelectionAsContext: true,
+  replaceSelection: true
+};
+
+function normalizeContent(content) {
+  if (typeof content === "string") {
+    return content;
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return content
+    .map((item) => {
+      if (typeof item === "string") {
+        return item;
+      }
+
+      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
+        return String(item.text ?? "");
+      }
+
+      return "";
+    })
+    .join("");
+}
+
+function extractChunk(payload) {
+  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
+  if (!choice) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return (
+    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
+    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
+    ""
+  );
+}
+
+async function buildError(response) {
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+
+  try {
+    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
+      const json = await response.json();
+      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
+    }
+
+    return await response.text();
+  } catch {
+    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
+  }
+}
+
+export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
+  const selectionBlock =
+    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
+      ? [
+          "С╗ЦСИІтєЁт«╣Тў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУ»ит░єтЁХСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇ№╝џ",
+          "",
+          "---- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ----",
+          selectionText.trim(),
+          "---- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ----",
+          ""
+        ].join("\n")
+      : "";
+
+  return [
+    {
+      role: "system",
+      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
+    },
+    {
+      role: "user",
+      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
+    }
+  ];
+}
+
+export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
+  const headers = {
+    "Content-Type": "application/json",
+    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
+  };
+
+  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
+    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
+    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
+  }
+
+  const response = await fetch(
+    `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
+    {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers,
+      body: JSON.stringify({
+        model: settings.model.trim(),
+        messages,
+        temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
+        max_tokens: Number(settings.maxTokens),
+        stream: true
+      }),
+      signal
+    }
+  );
+
+  if (!response.ok) {
+    throw new Error(await buildError(response));
+  }
+
+  if (!response.body) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+  if (!contentType.includes("text/event-stream")) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const reader = response.body.getReader();
+  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
+  let buffer = "";
+
+  while (true) {
+    const { value, done } = await reader.read();
+
+    if (done) {
+      buffer += decoder.decode();
+      break;
+    }
+
+    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
+    const parts = buffer.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/);
+    buffer = parts.pop() ?? "";
+
+    for (const part of parts) {
+      const lines = part
+        .split(/\r?\n/)
+        .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+        .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim());
+
+      for (const line of lines) {
+        if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        const payload = JSON.parse(line);
+        const text = extractChunk(payload);
+        if (text) {
+          yield text;
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (!buffer.trim()) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const lines = buffer
+    .split(/\r?\n/)
+    .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+    .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim());
+
+  for (const line of lines) {
+    if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const payload = JSON.parse(line);
+    const text = extractChunk(payload);
+    if (text) {
+      yield text;
+    }
+  }
+}
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\wps.js`**

```diff
+function getApplication() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return window.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return window.wps.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return window.instance.Application;
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function getSelectionRange(app) {
+  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
+}
+
+function forceRefresh(range) {
+  try {
+    if (range && typeof range.Select === "function") {
+      range.Select();
+    }
+  } catch {
+    // Ignore redraw issues on hosts that do not support Select.
+  }
+}
+
+export function detectHostLabel() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return "WPS Тюгтю░ТЈњС╗Х";
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return "WPS т«┐СИ╗";
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return "WebOffice т«┐СИ╗";
+  }
+
+  return "ТхЈУДѕтЎежбёУДѕ";
+}
+
+export function readSelectionText() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
+  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
+}
+
+export function hasWpsDocument() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
+}
+
+export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return {
+      locationLabel: "ТюфТБђТхІтѕ░ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ",
+      async update() {},
+      async finish() {},
+      async cancel() {}
+    };
+  }
+
+  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
+  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
+
+  if (!selectionRange) {
+    throw new Error("ТЌаТ│ЋУјитЈќтйЊтЅЇТќЄТАБжђЅтї║сђѓ");
+  }
+
+  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
+  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
+  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
+  const anchor = start;
+  let latestText = "";
+  let pendingText = "";
+  let flushTimer = null;
+  let flushing = false;
+
+  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
+    selectionRange.Text = "";
+  }
+
+  async function flushNow() {
+    if (flushing || latestText === pendingText) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    flushing = true;
+    try {
+      latestText = pendingText;
+      const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length);
+      target.Text = latestText;
+      forceRefresh(target);
+    } finally {
+      flushing = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    locationLabel: replaceSelection
+      ? "т«ъТЌХУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║"
+      : "т«ъТЌХТЈњтЁЦтѕ░тйЊтЅЇтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«",
+    async update(text) {
+      pendingText = text;
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
+        flushTimer = null;
+        await flushNow();
+      }, 70);
+    },
+    async finish() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      await flushNow();
+      const endRange = doc.Range(anchor + latestText.length, anchor + latestText.length);
+      forceRefresh(endRange);
+    },
+    async cancel() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      if (!latestText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
+        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
+      }
+    }
+  };
+}
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\App.jsx`**

```diff
+import {
+  startTransition,
+  useDeferredValue,
+  useEffect,
+  useRef,
+  useState
+} from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  streamCompletion
+} from "./ai";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  detectHostLabel,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+function providerLabel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.label ?? providerId;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS)
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(
+      PROMPT_KEY,
+      "У»итЪ║С║јтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║тєЁт«╣У┐ЏУАїТГБт╝ЈтїќТћ╣тєЎ№╝їт╣ХУАЦтЁЁт┐ЁУдЂуџёу╗ЊТъёСИјУАеУЙЙсђѓ"
+    )
+  );
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [hostLabel, setHostLabel] = useState("ТБђТхІСИГ");
+  const [status, setStatus] = useState("уГЅтЙЁУ┐ъТјЦ");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [output, setOutput] = useState("");
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+
+  const deferredOutput = useDeferredValue(output);
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setHostLabel(detectHostLabel());
+
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setStatus("ти▓У┐ъТјЦ WPS№╝їтЈ»т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ");
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    } else {
+      setStatus("тйЊтЅЇТюфУ┐ъТјЦ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁТћ»ТїЂСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ");
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({
+      ...current,
+      providerId,
+      baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+    }));
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      const text = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(text);
+      setStatus(text ? "ти▓У»╗тЈќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║" : "тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СИ║уЕ║№╝їт░єТїЅтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«тєЎтЁЦ");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Ц";
+      setError(message);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+    setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!prompt.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕУЙЊтЁЦС╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setOutput("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    setStatus(writer.locationLabel);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        await writer.update(aggregate);
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setOutput(aggregate);
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish();
+      setStatus(hasWpsDocument() ? "тєЁт«╣ти▓тєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ" : "С╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈт«їТѕљжбёУДѕ");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        await writer.cancel();
+        setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц";
+        setError(message);
+        setStatus("ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц");
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <main className="shell">
+      <section className="hero panel">
+        <div className="hero-copy">
+          <span className="eyebrow">WPS AI Writer</span>
+          <h1>У«Е AI УЙ╣ућЪТѕљ№╝їУЙ╣тєЎУ┐Џ WPS ТГБТќЄ</h1>
+          <p>
+            У┐ЎСИЇТў»УЂітцЕжЮбТЮ┐уџётцЇтѕХтЊЂсђѓт«ЃТііТеАтъІУЙЊтЄ║уЏ┤ТјЦжћџт«џтѕ░тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║ТѕќтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«№╝їжђѓтљѕТћ╣тєЎсђЂу╗ГтєЎтњїТѕљуе┐сђѓ
+          </p>
+        </div>
+        <div className="hero-meta">
+          <span className="pill accent">{hostLabel}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{providerLabel(settings.providerId)}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{isGenerating ? "Streaming" : "Idle"}</span>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+
+      <section className="layout">
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Task</span>
+                <h2>С╗╗тіАУЙЊтЁЦ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <button className="ghost-button" onClick={refreshSelection}>
+                У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║
+              </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>С╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓ</span>
+              <textarea
+                rows="8"
+                value={prompt}
+                onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="СЙІтдѓ№╝џТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅСИГуџёС╝џУ««у║фУдЂТћ╣тєЎТѕљТГБт╝ЈжА╣уЏ«тЉеТіЦ№╝їС┐ЮуЋЎС║Іт«ъ№╝їТЈљтЇЄу╗ЊТъётњїТјфУЙъсђѓ"
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>у│╗у╗ЪТЈљуц║У»Ї</span>
+              <textarea
+                rows="5"
+                value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <div className="toggle-grid">
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>ТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ</span>
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>уЏ┤ТјЦУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║</span>
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="action-row">
+              <button
+                className="primary-button"
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                disabled={isGenerating}
+              >
+                ућЪТѕљт╣ХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ
+              </button>
+              <button
+                className="secondary-button"
+                onClick={() => void stopGeneration()}
+                disabled={!isGenerating}
+              >
+                тЂюТГб
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Selection</span>
+                <h2>ТќЄТАБСИіСИІТќЄ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <span className="status-text">{status}</span>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box selection-box">
+              {selectionText || "тйЊтЅЇТ▓АТюЅУ»╗тЈќтѕ░жђЅтї║тєЁт«╣сђѓ"}
+            </pre>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Provider</span>
+                <h2>ТеАтъІжЁЇуй«</h2>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Provider</span>
+              <select
+                value={settings.providerId}
+                onChange={(event) => switchProvider(event.target.value)}
+              >
+                {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (
+                  <option key={provider.id} value={provider.id}>
+                    {provider.label}
+                  </option>
+                ))}
+              </select>
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>API Key</span>
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="sk-..."
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Base URL</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Model</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder={placeholderModel(settings.providerId)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <div className="numeric-grid">
+              <label className="field">
+                <span>Temperature</span>
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"
+                  step="0.1"
+                  value={settings.temperature}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+              <label className="field">
+                <span>Max Tokens</span>
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="1"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("maxTokens", Number(event.target.value || 1))
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+              <div className="numeric-grid">
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>HTTP-Referer</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.referer}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)}
+                  />
+                </label>
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>X-Title</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.title}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateSetting("title", event.target.value)}
+                  />
+                </label>
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Live Output</span>
+                <h2>ТхЂт╝Ју╗ЊТъю</h2>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box output-box">
+              {deferredOutput || "ућЪТѕљт╝ђтДІтљј№╝їУ┐ЎжЄїС╝џтњї WPS ТГБТќЄтљїТГЦтѕиТќ░сђѓ"}
+            </pre>
+
+            {error ? <div className="error-box">{error}</div> : null}
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+    </main>
+  );
+}
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\styles.css`**

```diff
+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #f4eee2;
+  --bg-deep: #e8dcc7;
+  --surface: rgba(255, 249, 238, 0.88);
+  --surface-strong: rgba(255, 251, 243, 0.96);
+  --border: rgba(62, 42, 23, 0.12);
+  --border-strong: rgba(62, 42, 23, 0.2);
+  --text: #23180f;
+  --muted: #6f5a47;
+  --accent: #d25d26;
+  --accent-strong: #8c3811;
+  --accent-soft: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12);
+  --shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(55, 34, 14, 0.08);
+  --radius: 24px;
+  --radius-sm: 18px;
+  --font-sans: "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Microsoft YaHei",
+    sans-serif;
+  --font-serif: "Cambria", "STSong", serif;
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body,
+#root {
+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: var(--font-sans);
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(228, 157, 67, 0.22), transparent 28%),
+    radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(118, 86, 42, 0.16), transparent 24%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg) 0%, var(--bg-deep) 100%);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+.shell {
+  width: min(1360px, 100%);
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 24px;
+}
+
+.layout {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1.18fr 0.92fr;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.column {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.panel {
+  position: relative;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  background: linear-gradient(
+    180deg,
+    rgba(255, 251, 244, 0.95) 0%,
+    rgba(255, 246, 231, 0.86) 100%
+  );
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+}
+
+.panel::before {
+  content: "";
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0 auto auto 0;
+  width: 180px;
+  height: 180px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  transform: translate(-28%, -32%);
+  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12), transparent 72%);
+  pointer-events: none;
+}
+
+.stack {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 18px;
+  padding: 22px;
+}
+
+.hero {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 24px;
+  margin-bottom: 20px;
+  padding: 28px;
+}
+
+.hero-copy {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 4px;
+}
+
+.hero h1 {
+  margin: 8px 0 10px;
+  font-family: var(--font-serif);
+  font-size: clamp(30px, 4vw, 46px);
+  line-height: 1.04;
+  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
+}
+
+.hero p {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.65;
+}
+
+.hero-meta {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  align-content: flex-start;
+  gap: 10px;
+  min-width: 230px;
+}
+
+.eyebrow,
+.section-kicker {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.section-head {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 16px;
+}
+
+.section-head h2 {
+  margin: 6px 0 0;
+  font-size: 22px;
+  line-height: 1.1;
+}
+
+.field {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.field span {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+textarea,
+input,
+select {
+  width: 100%;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  outline: none;
+  transition:
+    border-color 160ms ease,
+    box-shadow 160ms ease,
+    transform 160ms ease;
+}
+
+textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+  min-height: 120px;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+}
+
+textarea:focus,
+input:focus,
+select:focus {
+  border-color: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.42);
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12);
+}
+
+.numeric-grid,
+.toggle-grid,
+.action-row {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.numeric-grid,
+.toggle-grid {
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.toggle {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+}
+
+.toggle input {
+  width: 18px;
+  height: 18px;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.action-row {
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
+}
+
+.primary-button,
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  border: 0;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  padding: 13px 20px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition:
+    opacity 160ms ease,
+    transform 160ms ease,
+    box-shadow 160ms ease;
+}
+
+.primary-button:hover,
+.secondary-button:hover,
+.ghost-button:hover {
+  transform: translateY(-1px);
+}
+
+.primary-button:disabled,
+.secondary-button:disabled,
+.ghost-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.48;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+}
+
+.primary-button {
+  color: #fffaf4;
+  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent-strong) 100%);
+  box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(140, 56, 17, 0.2);
+}
+
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: rgba(255, 251, 244, 0.75);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.pill {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  min-height: 34px;
+  padding: 8px 14px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: rgba(255, 252, 246, 0.75);
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.pill.accent {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  border-color: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.2);
+  background: var(--accent-soft);
+}
+
+.content-box {
+  min-height: 220px;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 18px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background:
+    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 252, 247, 0.96), rgba(255, 247, 235, 0.88)),
+    var(--surface-strong);
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: "Consolas", "Cascadia Mono", "Microsoft YaHei UI", monospace;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.65;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.selection-box {
+  min-height: 190px;
+}
+
+.output-box {
+  min-height: 320px;
+}
+
+.status-text {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+  text-align: right;
+}
+
+.error-box {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(153, 33, 0, 0.16);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  color: #912703;
+  background: rgba(188, 54, 18, 0.08);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 1120px) {
+  .layout {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .hero-meta {
+    justify-content: flex-start;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .shell {
+    padding: 14px;
+  }
+
+  .hero,
+  .stack {
+    padding: 18px;
+  }
+
+  .numeric-grid,
+  .toggle-grid,
+  .action-row {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero h1 {
+    font-size: 32px;
+  }
+}
```

+# WPS AI
+
+У┐ЎТў»СИђСИфС╗јжЏХжЄЇт╗║уџё WPS ТќЄтГЌтіаУййжА╣жА╣уЏ«№╝їуЏ«ТаЄТў»№╝џ
+
+- тюе WPS СИГСйюСИ║С╗╗тіАуфЌТа╝ТЈњС╗ХСй┐уће
+- Тћ»ТїЂжЁЇуй« `OpenRouter` Тѕќ `NVIDIA Build` уџё OpenAI тЁ╝т«╣ТјЦтЈБ
+- т░єТеАтъІТхЂт╝ЈУЙЊтЄ║т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ
+

+- `src/taskpane/App.jsx`

```diff
+import { fileURLToPath, URL } from "node:url";
+import { defineConfig } from "vite";
+import react from "@vitejs/plugin-react";
+import { copyFile } from "wpsjs/vite_plugins";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  base: "./",
+  plugins: [
+    copyFile({
+      src: "manifest.xml",
+      dest: "manifest.xml"
+    }),
+    react()
+  ],
+  resolve: {
+    alias: {
+      "@": fileURLToPath(new URL("./src", import.meta.url))
+    }
+  },
+  build: {
+    rollupOptions: {
+      input: {
+        index: fileURLToPath(new URL("./index.html", import.meta.url)),
+        taskpane: fileURLToPath(new URL("./taskpane.html", import.meta.url))
+      }
+    }
+  },
+  server: {
+    host: "0.0.0.0",
+    port: 5173
+  }
+});
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\ribbon\ribbon.js`**

```diff
+const STORAGE_KEY = "wps_ai_taskpane_id";
+
+function getDockRightValue() {
+  if (window.Application?.Enum?.msoCTPDockPositionRight !== undefined) {
+    return window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight;
+  }
+
+  return 2;
+}
+
+function getTaskPaneUrl() {
+  return new URL("./taskpane.html", window.location.href).href;
+}
+
+function ensureTaskPane() {
+  const storage = window.Application.PluginStorage;
+  const existingId = storage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
+
+  if (existingId) {
+    const existing = window.Application.GetTaskPane(existingId);
+    if (existing) {
+      return existing;
+    }
+  }
+
+  const taskPane = window.Application.CreateTaskPane(getTaskPaneUrl());
+  storage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, taskPane.ID);
+  taskPane.DockPosition = getDockRightValue();
+  return taskPane;
+}
+
+const ribbon = {
+  OnAddinLoad(ribbonUI) {
+    if (typeof window.Application.ribbonUI !== "object") {
+      window.Application.ribbonUI = ribbonUI;
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  },
+
+  OnAction(control) {
+    const doc = window.Application?.ActiveDocument;
+    if (!doc) {
+      alert("тйЊтЅЇТ▓АТюЅТЅЊт╝ђС╗╗СйЋТќЄтГЌТќЄТАБсђѓ");
+      return true;
+    }
+
+    const taskPane = ensureTaskPane();
+
+    switch (control.Id) {
+      case "btnToggleTaskPane":
+        taskPane.Visible = !taskPane.Visible;
+        break;
+      case "btnFocusTaskPane":
+        taskPane.Visible = true;
+        break;
+      default:
+        break;
+    }
+
+    return true;
+  },
+
+  GetImage(control) {
+    if (control.Id === "btnFocusTaskPane") {
+      return "images/ai-stream.svg";
+    }
+
+    return "images/ai-pane.svg";
+  },
+
+  OnGetEnabled() {
+    return Boolean(window.Application?.ActiveDocument);
+  }
+};
+
+export default ribbon;
```
</details></tool-use>

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\storage.js`**

```diff
+const SETTINGS_KEY = "wps-ai.settings";
+const PROMPT_KEY = "wps-ai.prompt";
+
+export function loadStoredValue(key, fallbackValue) {
+  try {
+    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
+    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : fallbackValue;
+  } catch {
+    return fallbackValue;
+  }
+}
+
+export function saveStoredValue(key, value) {
+  try {
+    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
+  } catch {
+    // Ignore local storage failures in host environments with tighter quotas.
+  }
+}
+
+export { SETTINGS_KEY, PROMPT_KEY };
```

```diff
+export const PROVIDERS = {
+  openrouter: {
+    id: "openrouter",
+    label: "OpenRouter",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
+  },
+  nvidia: {
+    id: "nvidia",
+    label: "NVIDIA Build",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct"
+  }
+};
+
+export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
+  providerId: "openrouter",
+  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
+  apiKey: "",
+  model: "",
+  temperature: 0.5,
+  maxTokens: 4096,
+  systemPrompt:
+    "СйаТў» WPS ТќЄТАБтіЕТЅІсђѓУ»иУЙЊтЄ║жђѓтљѕуЏ┤ТјЦтєЎтЁЦТГБт╝ЈТќЄТАБТГБТќЄуџёСИГТќЄтєЁт«╣№╝їу╗ЊТъёТИЁТЎ░№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇт»њТџётњїтЁЃтЈЎУ┐░сђѓ",
+  referer: "https://localhost",
+  title: "WPS AI Plugin",
+  useSelectionAsContext: true,
+  replaceSelection: true
+};
+
+function normalizeContent(content) {
+  if (typeof content === "string") {
+    return content;
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return content
+    .map((item) => {
+      if (typeof item === "string") {
+        return item;
+      }
+
+      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
+        return String(item.text ?? "");
+      }
+
+      return "";
+    })
+    .join("");
+}
+
+function extractChunk(payload) {
+  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
+  if (!choice) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return (
+    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
+    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
+    ""
+  );
+}
+
+async function buildError(response) {
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+
+  try {
+    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
+      const json = await response.json();
+      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
+    }
+
+    return await response.text();
+  } catch {
+    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
+  }
+}
+
+export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
+  const selectionBlock =
+    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
+      ? [
+          "С╗ЦСИІтєЁт«╣Тў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУ»ит░єтЁХСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇ№╝џ",
+          "",
+          "---- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ----",
+          selectionText.trim(),
+          "---- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ----",
+          ""
+        ].join("\n")
+      : "";
+
+  return [
+    {
+      role: "system",
+      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
+    },
+    {
+      role: "user",
+      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
+    }
+  ];
+}
+
+export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
+  const headers = {
+    "Content-Type": "application/json",
+    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
+  };
+
+  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
+    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
+    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
+  }
+
+  const response = await fetch(
+    `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
+    {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers,
+      body: JSON.stringify({
+        model: settings.model.trim(),
+        messages,
+        temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
+        max_tokens: Number(settings.maxTokens),
+        stream: true
+      }),
+      signal
+    }
+  );
+
+  if (!response.ok) {
+    throw new Error(await buildError(response));
+  }
+
+  if (!response.body) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+  if (!contentType.includes("text/event-stream")) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const reader = response.body.getReader();
+  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
+  let buffer = "";
+
+  while (true) {
+    const { value, done } = await reader.read();
+
+    if (done) {
+      buffer += decoder.decode();
+      break;
+    }
+
+    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
+    const parts = buffer.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/);
+    buffer = parts.pop() ?? "";
+
+    for (const part of parts) {
+      const lines = part
+        .split(/\r?\n/)
+        .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+        .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim());
+
+      for (const line of lines) {
+        if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        const payload = JSON.parse(line);
+        const text = extractChunk(payload);
+        if (text) {
+          yield text;
+        }
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (!buffer.trim()) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const lines = buffer
+    .split(/\r?\n/)
+    .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+    .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim());
+
+  for (const line of lines) {
+    if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const payload = JSON.parse(line);
+    const text = extractChunk(payload);
+    if (text) {
+      yield text;
+    }
+  }
+}
```

```diff
+function getApplication() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return window.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return window.wps.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return window.instance.Application;
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function getSelectionRange(app) {
+  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
+}
+
+function forceRefresh(range) {
+  try {
+    if (range && typeof range.Select === "function") {
+      range.Select();
+    }
+  } catch {
+    // Ignore redraw issues on hosts that do not support Select.
+  }
+}
+
+export function detectHostLabel() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return "WPS Тюгтю░ТЈњС╗Х";
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return "WPS т«┐СИ╗";
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return "WebOffice т«┐СИ╗";
+  }
+
+  return "ТхЈУДѕтЎежбёУДѕ";
+}
+
+export function readSelectionText() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
+  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
+}
+
+export function hasWpsDocument() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
+}
+
+export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return {
+      locationLabel: "ТюфТБђТхІтѕ░ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ",
+      async update() {},
+      async finish() {},
+      async cancel() {}
+    };
+  }
+
+  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
+  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
+
+  if (!selectionRange) {
+    throw new Error("ТЌаТ│ЋУјитЈќтйЊтЅЇТќЄТАБжђЅтї║сђѓ");
+  }
+
+  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
+  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
+  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
+  const anchor = start;
+  let latestText = "";
+  let pendingText = "";
+  let flushTimer = null;
+  let flushing = false;
+
+  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
+    selectionRange.Text = "";
+  }
+
+  async function flushNow() {
+    if (flushing || latestText === pendingText) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    flushing = true;
+    try {
+      latestText = pendingText;
+      const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length);
+      target.Text = latestText;
+      forceRefresh(target);
+    } finally {
+      flushing = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    locationLabel: replaceSelection
+      ? "т«ъТЌХУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║"
+      : "т«ъТЌХТЈњтЁЦтѕ░тйЊтЅЇтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«",
+    async update(text) {
+      pendingText = text;
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
+        flushTimer = null;
+        await flushNow();
+      }, 70);
+    },
+    async finish() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      await flushNow();
+      const endRange = doc.Range(anchor + latestText.length, anchor + latestText.length);
+      forceRefresh(endRange);
+    },
+    async cancel() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      if (!latestText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
+        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
+      }
+    }
+  };
+}
```

```diff
+import {
+  startTransition,
+  useDeferredValue,
+  useEffect,
+  useRef,
+  useState
+} from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  streamCompletion
+} from "./ai";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  detectHostLabel,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+function providerLabel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.label ?? providerId;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS)
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(
+      PROMPT_KEY,
+      "У»итЪ║С║јтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║тєЁт«╣У┐ЏУАїТГБт╝ЈтїќТћ╣тєЎ№╝їт╣ХУАЦтЁЁт┐ЁУдЂуџёу╗ЊТъёСИјУАеУЙЙсђѓ"
+    )
+  );
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [hostLabel, setHostLabel] = useState("ТБђТхІСИГ");
+  const [status, setStatus] = useState("уГЅтЙЁУ┐ъТјЦ");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [output, setOutput] = useState("");
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+
+  const deferredOutput = useDeferredValue(output);
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setHostLabel(detectHostLabel());
+
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setStatus("ти▓У┐ъТјЦ WPS№╝їтЈ»т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ");
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    } else {
+      setStatus("тйЊтЅЇТюфУ┐ъТјЦ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁТћ»ТїЂСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ");
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({
+      ...current,
+      providerId,
+      baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+    }));
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      const text = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(text);
+      setStatus(text ? "ти▓У»╗тЈќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║" : "тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СИ║уЕ║№╝їт░єТїЅтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«тєЎтЁЦ");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Ц";
+      setError(message);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+    setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!prompt.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕУЙЊтЁЦС╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setOutput("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    setStatus(writer.locationLabel);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        await writer.update(aggregate);
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setOutput(aggregate);
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish();
+      setStatus(hasWpsDocument() ? "тєЁт«╣ти▓тєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ" : "С╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈт«їТѕљжбёУДѕ");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        await writer.cancel();
+        setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц";
+        setError(message);
+        setStatus("ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц");
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <main className="shell">
+      <section className="hero panel">
+        <div className="hero-copy">
+          <span className="eyebrow">WPS AI Writer</span>
+          <h1>У«Е AI УЙ╣ућЪТѕљ№╝їУЙ╣тєЎУ┐Џ WPS ТГБТќЄ</h1>
+          <p>
+            У┐ЎСИЇТў»УЂітцЕжЮбТЮ┐уџётцЇтѕХтЊЂсђѓт«ЃТііТеАтъІУЙЊтЄ║уЏ┤ТјЦжћџт«џтѕ░тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║ТѕќтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«№╝їжђѓтљѕТћ╣тєЎсђЂу╗ГтєЎтњїТѕљуе┐сђѓ
+          </p>
+        </div>
+        <div className="hero-meta">
+          <span className="pill accent">{hostLabel}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{providerLabel(settings.providerId)}</span>
+          <span className="pill">{isGenerating ? "Streaming" : "Idle"}</span>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+
+      <section className="layout">
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Task</span>
+                <h2>С╗╗тіАУЙЊтЁЦ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <button className="ghost-button" onClick={refreshSelection}>
+                У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║
+              </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>С╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓ</span>
+              <textarea
+                rows="8"
+                value={prompt}
+                onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="СЙІтдѓ№╝џТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅСИГуџёС╝џУ««у║фУдЂТћ╣тєЎТѕљТГБт╝ЈжА╣уЏ«тЉеТіЦ№╝їС┐ЮуЋЎС║Іт«ъ№╝їТЈљтЇЄу╗ЊТъётњїТјфУЙъсђѓ"
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>у│╗у╗ЪТЈљуц║У»Ї</span>
+              <textarea
+                rows="5"
+                value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <div className="toggle-grid">
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>ТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ</span>
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle">
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+                <span>уЏ┤ТјЦУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║</span>
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="action-row">
+              <button
+                className="primary-button"
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                disabled={isGenerating}
+              >
+                ућЪТѕљт╣ХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ
+              </button>
+              <button
+                className="secondary-button"
+                onClick={() => void stopGeneration()}
+                disabled={!isGenerating}
+              >
+                тЂюТГб
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Selection</span>
+                <h2>ТќЄТАБСИіСИІТќЄ</h2>

+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box selection-box">
+              {selectionText || "тйЊтЅЇТ▓АТюЅУ»╗тЈќтѕ░жђЅтї║тєЁт«╣сђѓ"}

+
+        <div className="column">
+          <section className="panel stack">

+                <h2>ТеАтъІжЁЇуй«</h2>

+
+            <label className="field">
+              <span>Provider</span>
+              <select
+                value={settings.providerId}
+                onChange={(event) => switchProvider(event.target.value)}

+                {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (

+

+

+

+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"

+              <label className="field">

+                  min="1"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("maxTokens", Number(event.target.value || 1))
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+              <div className="numeric-grid">
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>HTTP-Referer</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.referer}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)}
+                  />
+                </label>
+                <label className="field">
+                  <span>X-Title</span>
+                  <input
+                    value={settings.title}
+                    onChange={(event) => updateSetting("title", event.target.value)}
+                  />
+                </label>
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+          </section>
+
+          <section className="panel stack">
+            <div className="section-head">
+              <div>
+                <span className="section-kicker">Live Output</span>
+                <h2>ТхЂт╝Ју╗ЊТъю</h2>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="content-box output-box">
+              {deferredOutput || "ућЪТѕљт╝ђтДІтљј№╝їУ┐ЎжЄїС╝џтњї WPS ТГБТќЄтљїТГЦтѕиТќ░сђѓ"}
+            </pre>
+
+            {error ? <div className="error-box">{error}</div> : null}
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      </section>
+    </main>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\styles.css`**

```diff
+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #f4eee2;
+  --bg-deep: #e8dcc7;
+  --surface: rgba(255, 249, 238, 0.88);
+  --surface-strong: rgba(255, 251, 243, 0.96);
+  --border: rgba(62, 42, 23, 0.12);
+  --text: #23180f;
+  --muted: #6f5a47;
+  --accent: #d25d26;
+  --accent-strong: #8c3811;
+  --accent-soft: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12);
+  --shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(55, 34, 14, 0.08);
+  --radius: 24px;
+  --radius-sm: 18px;
+  --font-sans: "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif;
+  --font-serif: "Cambria", "STSong", serif;
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body,
+#root {
+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: var(--font-sans);
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(228, 157, 67, 0.22), transparent 28%),
+    radial-gradient(circle at bottom right, rgba(118, 86, 42, 0.16), transparent 24%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg) 0%, var(--bg-deep) 100%);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+.shell {
+  width: min(1360px, 100%);
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 24px;
+}
+
+.layout {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1.18fr 0.92fr;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.column {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 20px;
+}
+
+.panel {
+  position: relative;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius);
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 251, 244, 0.95) 0%, rgba(255, 246, 231, 0.86) 100%);
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+}
+
+.panel::before {
+  content: "";
+  position: absolute;
+  inset: 0 auto auto 0;
+  width: 180px;
+  height: 180px;
+  border-radius: 50%;
+  transform: translate(-28%, -32%);
+  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12), transparent 72%);
+  pointer-events: none;
+}
+
+.stack {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 18px;
+  padding: 22px;
+}
+
+.hero {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 24px;
+  margin-bottom: 20px;
+  padding: 28px;
+}
+
+.hero-copy {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 4px;
+}
+
+.hero h1 {
+  margin: 8px 0 10px;
+  font-family: var(--font-serif);
+  font-size: clamp(30px, 4vw, 46px);
+  line-height: 1.04;
+  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
+}
+
+.hero p {
+  max-width: 760px;
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.65;
+}
+
+.hero-meta {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  align-content: flex-start;
+  gap: 10px;
+  min-width: 230px;
+}
+
+.eyebrow,
+.section-kicker {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.section-head {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 16px;
+}
+
+.section-head h2 {
+  margin: 6px 0 0;
+  font-size: 22px;
+  line-height: 1.1;
+}
+
+.field {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.field span {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+textarea,
+input,
+select {
+  width: 100%;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  outline: none;
+  transition: border-color 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease;
+}
+
+textarea {
+  resize: vertical;
+  min-height: 120px;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+}
+
+textarea:focus,
+input:focus,
+select:focus {
+  border-color: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.42);
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.12);
+}
+
+.numeric-grid,
+.toggle-grid,
+.action-row {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.numeric-grid,
+.toggle-grid {
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
+}
+
+.toggle {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
+  background: var(--surface);
+}
+
+.toggle input {
+  width: 18px;
+  height: 18px;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.action-row {
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
+}
+
+.primary-button,
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  border: 0;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  padding: 13px 20px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition: opacity 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease;
+}
+
+.primary-button:hover,
+.secondary-button:hover,
+.ghost-button:hover {
+  transform: translateY(-1px);
+}
+
+.primary-button:disabled,
+.secondary-button:disabled,
+.ghost-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.48;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+}
+
+.primary-button {
+  color: #fffaf4;
+  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent-strong) 100%);
+  box-shadow: 0 16px 28px rgba(140, 56, 17, 0.2);
+}
+
+.secondary-button,
+.ghost-button {
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: rgba(255, 251, 244, 0.75);
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+}
+
+.pill {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  min-height: 34px;
+  padding: 8px 14px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  background: rgba(255, 252, 246, 0.75);
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 12px;
+  font-weight: 700;
+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.pill.accent {
+  color: var(--accent-strong);
+  border-color: rgba(210, 93, 38, 0.2);
+  background: var(--accent-soft);
+}
+
+.content-box {
+  min-height: 220px;
+  margin: 0;
+  padding: 18px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--border);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 252, 247, 0.96), rgba(255, 247, 235, 0.88)), var(--surface-strong);
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: "Consolas", "Cascadia Mono", "Microsoft YaHei UI", monospace;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.65;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.selection-box {
+  min-height: 190px;
+}
+
+.output-box {
+  min-height: 320px;
+}
+
+.status-text {
+  color: var(--muted);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+  text-align: right;
+}
+
+.error-box {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(153, 33, 0, 0.16);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  color: #912703;
+  background: rgba(188, 54, 18, 0.08);
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 1120px) {
+  .layout {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .hero-meta {
+    justify-content: flex-start;
+  }
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .shell {
+    padding: 14px;
+  }
+
+  .hero,
+  .stack {
+    padding: 18px;
+  }
+
+  .numeric-grid,
+  .toggle-grid,
+  .action-row {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .hero h1 {
+    font-size: 32px;
+  }
+}
```

+# WPS AI
+
+У┐ЎТў»СИђСИфС╗јжЏХжЄЇт╗║уџё WPS ТќЄтГЌтіаУййжА╣жА╣уЏ«№╝їуЏ«ТаЄТў»№╝џ

+- `src/taskpane/App.jsx`

+ућЪТѕљт╝ђтДІТЌХ№╝їТЈњС╗ХС╝џУ«░тйЋтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║уџё `Start/End`сђѓ
+
+- тІЙжђЅРђюуЏ┤ТјЦУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║РђЮТЌХ№╝џ
+  С╝џтЁѕТИЁуЕ║тјЪжђЅтї║№╝їтєЇТііТхЂт╝ЈТќЄТюгТїЂу╗ГУдєтєЎтѕ░тљїСИђжћџуѓ╣тї║тЪЪсђѓ
+- тЈќТХѕтІЙжђЅТЌХ№╝џ

```
const inquirer = require('inquirer')
const fs = require('fs')
const fsEx = require('fs-extra')
const path = require('path')
const _7z = require('node-7z');
const _7zBin = require('7zip-bin')
const jsUtil = require('./util.js')
let projectCfg = jsUtil.projectCfg()
const chalk = require('chalk');
const { serialize } = require('v8');

const buildDirectory = jsUtil.GetBuildDir()

async function build(cmd) {
    if (cmd.parent.rawArgs[cmd.parent.rawArgs.length - 1].includes("exe"))
    {
        if (false == new RegExp("^[!-~]+$").test(projectCfg.name)){
            console.log(`${chalk.red("ТццтюГТ┤░жЇџтХЁтйДжЉ│УіЦТДИуђЏТЦЂуўЮжієСй╣ТџЪуђЏТЦђТІ░ТХЊтгфтъЮу╗Й?)}...`)
            return
	    }
        buildwithSelfArchive()
        return
    }
    inquirer.prompt({
        name: 'pluginType',
        type: 'list',
        message: `жќФтцІтФе WPS жЇћуі║ТхЄТццуЉ░тйѓућ»тєфУбФжЇе?`,
        choices: [{
                name: 'жЇдсёДтџјжј╗ТјЇТгб',
                value: 'online'
            },
            {
                name: 'у╗ѓУЇцтџјжј╗ТјЇТгб',
                value: 'offline'
            }
        ]
    }).then(answers => {
        return buildWithArgs(answers)
    }).then(buildDir=>{
        console.log(chalk.cyan(`\n==>>  у╝ѓТагуўДжј┤ТёгтДЏжієтѓЮЬЄгуЂЈтЌЎТ┤░Уц░?{buildDir}ТХЊтггТ«ЉжЈѓтЏдТгбу╝ЃТЈњтЪїжЈѕтХЁтДЪжЇБ?..`))
    })
}

async function buildWithArgs(answers) {
    return new Promise((r,j)=>{
        let debugTemp = jsUtil.GetDebugTempPath(true);
        fsEx.removeSync(debugTemp)
    
        let curDir = process.cwd()
        let buildDir = curDir
        if (projectCfg.scripts && typeof projectCfg.scripts.build == 'string') {
            let buildCmd = projectCfg.scripts.build.trim();
            if (buildCmd.includes("vite")) {
                buildDir = require('./buildvue')(answers)
            } else if (buildCmd.includes("react-scripts")) {
                buildDir = require('./buildreact')(answers)
            }
        }
        let publishRoot = path.resolve(curDir, jsUtil.GetPublishDir());
        fsEx.removeSync(publishRoot);
        let buildRoot = path.resolve(curDir, buildDirectory);
        let distPath = buildRoot
        if (answers.pluginType == "offline")
            distPath = path.resolve(buildRoot, `${projectCfg.name}_${projectCfg.version}`)
        fsEx.removeSync(buildRoot)
        fs.readdir(buildDir, (_, files) => {
            files.forEach(file => {
                if (file != buildDirectory && file != "node_modules" &&
                    file != ".vscode" && file != ".git" &&
                    file != "package.json" && file != "package-lock.json") {
                    const srcPath = path.resolve(buildDir, file)
                    fsEx.copySync(srcPath, path.resolve(distPath, file))
                }
            })
    
            if (answers.pluginType == "offline") {
                let path7z = path.resolve(buildRoot, `${projectCfg.name}.7z`)
                let inputPaths = [distPath]
                const stream7z = _7z.add(path7z, inputPaths, {
                    recursive: false,
                    $bin: _7zBin.path7za
                  });
                stream7z.on('end', ()=>{
                    fsEx.removeSync(distPath)
                })                
            }

            const buildResultDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), buildDirectory)
            r(buildResultDir)
        })
    })
}

async function buildwithSelfArchive(){
    buildWithArgs('online').then(buildDir=>{
        let curDir = process.cwd()
        let buildRoot = path.resolve(curDir, 'dist')
        if (!projectCfg.scripts){
            fsEx.removeSync(buildRoot)
            fsEx.copySync(buildDir, buildRoot)
        }
       
        let exePath = path.resolve(buildDir, `${projectCfg.name}.exe`)
        createSelfExtractingExe(buildDir, buildRoot, exePath)
    })
}

async function createSelfExtractingExe(buildDir, inputFolder, outputFile) {
    const sfxPath = path.join(__dirname, 'res/7zsd.sfx');
  
    if (!fs.existsSync(sfxPath)) {
      console.error('7zsd.sfx not found. Please make sure it exists in the same folder as this script');
      return;
    }
  
    const configFileBuffer = createSfxConfig(outputFile);
    const zipBuffer = await create7ZipBuffer(buildDir, inputFolder);
  
    // жЇњТХўу╝ЊжЉиЬЂЄлњжЇў?exe жЈѓтЏдТгб
    const ws = fs.createWriteStream(outputFile);
    ws.write(fs.readFileSync(sfxPath));
    ws.write(configFileBuffer);

    let path7z = path.resolve(buildDir, `${projectCfg.name}.7z`)
    ws.write(fs.readFileSync(path7z));
    ws.end(()=>{fsEx.removeSync(path7z)});
  
    console.log('Self-extracting EXE created:', outputFile);
  }
  
  function createSfxConfig(outputFile) {
    return Buffer.from(`
  ;!@Install@!UTF-8!
  Title="install wps jsaddons"
  BeginPrompt="у║ГЬє╝уЋЙуЉЋСй
... (truncated)
```

```
30:
31:function normalizeContent(content) {
32:  if (typeof content === "string") {
33:    return content;
34:  }
35:
36:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
37:    return "";
38:  }
39:
40:  return content
41:    .map((item) => {
42:      if (typeof item === "string") {
43:        return item;
44:      }
45:
46:      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
47:        return String(item.text ?? "");
48:      }
49:
50:      return "";
51:    })
52:    .join("");
53:}
54:
55:function extractChunk(payload) {
56:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
57:  if (!choice) {
58:    return "";
59:  }
60:
61:  return (
62:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
63:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
64:    ""
65:  );
66:}
67:
68:async function buildError(response) {
69:  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
70:
71:  try {
72:    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
73:      const json = await response.json();
74:      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
75:    }
76:
77:    return await response.text();
78:  } catch {
79:    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
80:  }
81:}
82:

85:    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()

87:          "С╗ЦСИІтєЁт«╣Тў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУ»ит░єтЁХСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇ№╝џ",
88:          "",
89:          "---- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ----",
90:          selectionText.trim(),
91:          "---- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ----",
92:          ""
93:        ].join("\n")
94:      : "";
95:

97:    {
98:      role: "system",
```

```
62:export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
63:  const app = getApplication();
64:  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
65:    return {
66:      locationLabel: "ТюфТБђТхІтѕ░ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁтюеСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ",
67:      async update() {},
68:      async finish() {},
69:      async cancel() {}
70:    };
71:  }
72:
73:  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
74:  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
75:
76:  if (!selectionRange) {
77:    throw new Error("ТЌаТ│ЋУјитЈќтйЊтЅЇТќЄТАБжђЅтї║сђѓ");
78:  }
79:
80:  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
81:  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
82:  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
83:  const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;
84:  let latestText = "";
85:  let pendingText = "";
86:  let flushTimer = null;
87:  let flushing = false;
88:
89:  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
90:    selectionRange.Text = "";
91:  }
92:
93:  async function flushNow() {
94:    if (flushing || latestText === pendingText) {
95:      return;
96:    }
97:
98:    flushing = true;
99:    try {
100:      latestText = pendingText;
101:      const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length);
102:      target.Text = latestText;
103:      forceRefresh(target);
104:    } finally {
105:      flushing = false;
106:    }
107:  }
108:
109:  return {
110:    locationLabel: replaceSelection
111:      ? "т«ъТЌХУдєуЏќтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║"
112:      : "т«ъТЌХТЈњтЁЦтѕ░тйЊтЅЇтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«",
113:    async update(text) {
114:      pendingText = text;
115:      if (flushTimer !== null) {
116:        return;
117:      }
118:
119:      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
120:        flushTimer = null;
121:        await flushNow();
122:      }, 70);
123:    },
124:    async finish() {
125:      if (flushTimer !== null) {
126:        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
127:        flushTimer = null;
128:      }
129:
130:      await flushNow();
131:      const endRange = doc.Range(anchor + latestText.length, anchor + latestText.length);
132:      forceRefresh(endRange);
133:    },
134:    async cancel() {
135:      if (flushTimer !== null) {
136:        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
137:        flushTimer = null;
138:      }
139:
140:      if (!latestText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
141:        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
142:      }
143:    }
144:  };
145:}
```

`npx wpsjs build` ти▓у╗ЈУЃйУ»єтѕФУ┐ЎТў»СИф WPS жА╣уЏ«№╝їт╣ХУ┐ЏтЁЦРђютюеу║┐ТЈњС╗Х / уд╗у║┐ТЈњС╗ХРђЮуџёС║цС║њжђЅТІЕ№╝ЏТѕЉТ▓АТюЅтюеУ┐ЎСИфС╝џУ»ЮжЄїу╗Ду╗Гуѓ╣СИІтј╗№╝їтЏаСИ║т«ЃжюђУдЂС║║тиЦжђЅТІЕтЈЉтИЃу▒╗тъІсђѓ  
Т▓АТюЅтюеуюЪт«ъ WPS GUI жЄїтЂџТюђу╗ѕУЂћУ░Ѓ№╝їТЅђС╗ЦРђют«ъжЎЁт«┐СИ╗тєЁуџёУ┐љУАїУАеуј░РђЮУ┐ЎСИђт▒ѓТѕЉУ┐ўТ▓Ауј░тю║уѓ╣жфїсђѓ

**СИІСИђТГЦ**
Сйауј░тюеуЏ┤ТјЦтюеУ┐ЎСИфуЏ«тйЋТЅДУАї№╝џ
```bash
npm run debug
```

У┐Џ WPS тљј№╝џ
1. уѓ╣тіЪУЃйтї║жЄїуџё `WPS AI`
2. ТЅЊт╝ђС╗╗тіАуфЌТа╝
3. тАФ `API Key`сђЂ`Base URL`сђЂ`Model`
4. жђЅСИГТќЄТАБтєЁт«╣тљјуѓ╣РђюућЪТѕљт╣ХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄРђЮ

тдѓТъюСйаУдЂ№╝їТѕЉСИІСИђТГЦтЈ»С╗Цу╗Ду╗ГУАЦСИцС╗ХС║І№╝џ
- тіаСИђтЦЌжбёуй« prompt ТеАТЮ┐№╝їТ»ћтдѓРђюТђ╗у╗Њ/Тћ╣тєЎ/у╗ГтєЎ/у┐╗У»Љ/С╝џУ««у║фУдЂУйгтЉеТіЦРђЮ
- уЏ┤ТјЦТіі `wpsjs build` уџётЈЉтИЃТхЂуеІС╣ЪТЋ┤уљєТѕљтЏ║т«џУёџТюгтњїУ»┤Тўј№╝їтї║тѕєтюеу║┐ТЈњС╗ХСИјуд╗у║┐ТЈњС╗Х
