```diff
+import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  streamCompletion
+} from "./ai";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  detectHostLabel,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+const PROMPT_TEMPLATES = [
+  "ТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║Тћ╣тєЎТѕљТГБт╝ЈТќ╣ТАѕУ»┤Тўј№╝їу╗ЊТъёТЏ┤ТИЁТЎ░сђѓ",
+  "тЪ║С║јтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║у╗ГтєЎСИІСИђТ«х№╝їУ»ГТ░ћС┐ЮТїЂСИђУЄ┤сђѓ",
+  "ТіітйЊтЅЇтєЁт«╣ТЋ┤уљєТѕљу«ђТ┤ЂуџёТ▒ЄТіЦуЅѕТюг№╝їуфЂтЄ║у╗ЊУ«║сђѓ",
+  "Та╣ТЇ«тйЊтЅЇтєЁт«╣ућЪТѕљтЈ»уЏ┤ТјЦтЈЉжђЂуџёжѓ«С╗ХТГБТќЄсђѓ"
+];
+
+function createMessageId() {
+  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
+}
+
+function providerLabel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.label ?? providerId;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+function summarizeSelection(selectionText, enabled) {
+  if (!enabled) {
+    return "ТюфжЎётИджђЅтї║";
+  }
+
+  if (!selectionText.trim()) {
+    return "тйЊтЅЇТЌажђЅтї║";
+  }
+
+  return `ти▓жЎётИджђЅтї║ ${selectionText.trim().length} тГЌ`;
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS)
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(
+      PROMPT_KEY,
+      "У»итЪ║С║јтйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║тєЁт«╣У┐ЏУАїТГБт╝ЈтїќТћ╣тєЎ№╝їт╣ХУАЦтЁЁт┐ЁУдЂуџёу╗ЊТъёСИјУАеУЙЙсђѓ"
+    )
+  );
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [hostLabel, setHostLabel] = useState("ТБђТхІСИГ");
+  const [status, setStatus] = useState("уГЅтЙЁУ┐ъТјЦ");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
+  const [showContext, setShowContext] = useState(false);
+
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+  const threadEndRef = useRef(null);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    setHostLabel(detectHostLabel());
+
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setStatus("ти▓У┐ъТјЦ WPS№╝їтЈ»т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ");
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    } else {
+      setStatus("тйЊтЅЇТюфУ┐ъТјЦ WPS ТќЄТАБ№╝їС╗ЁТћ»ТїЂСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ");
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    threadEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({
+      behavior: messages.length > 1 ? "smooth" : "auto",
+      block: "end"
+    });
+  }, [messages]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showSettings && !showContext) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    function handleKeyDown(event) {
+      if (event.key === "Escape") {
+        setShowSettings(false);
+        setShowContext(false);
+      }
+    }
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKeyDown);
+  }, [showContext, showSettings]);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({
+      ...current,
+      providerId,
+      baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+    }));
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      const text = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(text);
+      setStatus(text ? "ти▓ТЏ┤Тќ░тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║" : "тйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СИ║уЕ║№╝їт░єТїЅтЁЅТаЄСйЇуй«тєЎтЁЦ");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Ц";
+      setError(message);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+    setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГбућЪТѕљ");
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    const trimmedPrompt = prompt.trim();
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!trimmedPrompt) {
+      setError("У»иУЙЊтЁЦС╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓсђѓ");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    const userMessageId = createMessageId();
+    const assistantMessageId = createMessageId();
+
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    setStatus(writer.locationLabel);
+    setMessages((current) => [
+      ...current,
+      {
+        id: userMessageId,
+        role: "user",
+        content: trimmedPrompt
+      },
+      {
+        id: assistantMessageId,
+        role: "assistant",
+        content: "",
+        streaming: true
+      }
+    ]);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt: trimmedPrompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        await writer.update(aggregate);
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setMessages((current) =>
+            current.map((message) =>
+              message.id === assistantMessageId
+                ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: true }
+                : message
+            )
+          );
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish();
+      setMessages((current) =>
+        current.map((message) =>
+          message.id === assistantMessageId
+            ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: false }
+            : message
+        )
+      );
+      setStatus(hasWpsDocument() ? "тєЁт«╣ти▓тљїТГЦтєЎтЁЦ WPS ТГБТќЄ" : "тйЊтЅЇС╗Ёт«їТѕљСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ");
+      setPrompt("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        await writer.cancel();
+        setStatus("ти▓тЂюТГб№╝їС┐ЮуЋЎтйЊтЅЇти▓тєЎтЁЦтєЁт«╣");
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((message) =>
+            message.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? { ...message, streaming: false }
+              : message
+          )
+        );
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц";
+        setError(message);
+        setStatus("ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц");
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((entry) =>
+            entry.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? {
+                  ...entry,
+                  content: entry.content || "ТюгТгАУ»иТ▒ѓТюфУ┐ћтЏътЈ»т▒Ћуц║тєЁт«╣сђѓ",
+                  streaming: false,
+                  error: true
+                }
+              : entry
+          )
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handlePromptKeyDown(event) {
+    if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (!isGenerating) {
+        void handleGenerate();
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  function clearConversation() {
+    setMessages([]);
+    setError("");
+    setStatus(hasWpsDocument() ? "ти▓У┐ъТјЦ WPS№╝їтЈ»т«ъТЌХтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ" : "тйЊтЅЇС╗ЁТћ»ТїЂСЙДУЙ╣ТаЈжбёУДѕ");
+  }
+
+  const selectionSummary = summarizeSelection(
+    selectionText,
+    settings.useSelectionAsContext
+  );
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <main className="chat-shell">
+        <header className="topbar">
+          <div className="brand-block">
+            <div className="brand-mark">AI</div>
+            <div>
+              <div className="brand-title">WPS AI</div>
+              <div className="brand-subtitle">{status}</div>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+
+          <div className="topbar-actions">
+            <button
+              className="topbar-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+            >
+              СИіСИІТќЄ
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="topbar-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+            >
+              У«Йуй«
+            </button>
+          </div>
+        </header>
+
+        <section className="thread">
+          {messages.length === 0 ? (
+            <div className="welcome-card">
+              <div className="welcome-label">Write directly into the document</div>
+              <h1>У«ЕУЙЊтЄ║уЏ┤ТјЦУ┐ЏТГБТќЄ№╝їУђїСИЇТў»тЂютюеУЂітцЕТАєжЄїсђѓ</h1>
+              <p>
+                СИ╗уЋїжЮбтЈфС┐ЮуЋЎућЪТѕљТюгУ║ФсђѓТеАтъІсђЂТјЦтЈБтњїжђЅтї║уГќуЋЦжЃйТћХУ┐Џт╝╣уфЌ№╝їжюђУдЂТЌХтєЇт╝ђсђѓ
+              </p>
+
+              <div className="meta-row">
+                <button
+                  className="meta-chip"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+                >
+                  {providerLabel(settings.providerId)}
+                </button>
+                <button
+                  className="meta-chip"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+                >
+                  {selectionSummary}
+                </button>
+                <span className="meta-chip static">{hostLabel}</span>
+              </div>
+
+              <div className="template-grid">
+                {PROMPT_TEMPLATES.map((template) => (
+                  <button
+                    key={template}
+                    className="template-chip"
+                    type="button"
+                    onClick={() => setPrompt(template)}
+                  >
+                    {template}
+                  </button>
+                ))}
+              </div>
+            </div>
+          ) : null}
+
+          <div className="message-list">
+            {messages.map((message) => (
+              <article
+                key={message.id}
+                className={`message-row ${message.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant"}`}
+              >
+                <div className="message-avatar">
+                  {message.role === "user" ? "Сйа" : "AI"}
+                </div>
+                <div
+                  className={`message-card ${message.error ? "error" : ""}`}
+                >
+                  <div className="message-label">
+                    {message.role === "user" ? "С╗╗тіА" : "у╗ЊТъю"}
+                    {message.streaming ? (
+                      <span className="stream-indicator">тєЎтЁЦСИГ</span>
+                    ) : null}
+                  </div>
+                  <div className="message-content">
+                    {message.content || "ТГБтюеуГЅтЙЁТеАтъІУ┐ћтЏътєЁт«╣..."}
+                  </div>
+                </div>
+              </article>
+            ))}
+            <div ref={threadEndRef} />
+          </div>
+        </section>
+
+        <footer className="composer">
+          <div className="composer-toolbar">
+            <button
+              className="toolbar-chip"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+            >
+              {selectionSummary}
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="toolbar-chip"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+            >
+              {providerLabel(settings.providerId)}
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="toolbar-chip"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={clearConversation}
+            >
+              ТИЁуЕ║
+            </button>
+          </div>
+
+          {error ? <div className="inline-error">{error}</div> : null}
+
+          <div className="composer-box">
+            <textarea
+              value={prompt}
+              rows="3"
+              onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+              onKeyDown={handlePromptKeyDown}
+              placeholder="УЙЊтЁЦС╗╗тіАУдЂТ▒ѓ№╝їТїЅ Enter тЈЉжђЂ№╝їShift + Enter ТЇбУАї"
+            />
+
+            <div className="composer-footer">
+              <div className="composer-flags">
+                <span className={`flag ${settings.useSelectionAsContext ? "active" : ""}`}>
+                  жђЅтї║СИіСИІТќЄ
+                </span>
+                <span className={`flag ${settings.replaceSelection ? "active" : ""}`}>
+                  УдєуЏќжђЅтї║
+                </span>
+              </div>
+
+              <div className="composer-actions">
+                {isGenerating ? (
+                  <button
+                    className="ghost-action"
+                    type="button"
+                    onClick={() => void stopGeneration()}
+                  >
+                    тЂюТГб
+                  </button>
+                ) : null}
+                <button
+                  className="primary-action"
+                  type="button"
+                  disabled={isGenerating}
+                  onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                >
+                  тєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄ
+                </button>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </footer>
+      </main>
+
+      {showSettings ? (
+        <div
+          className="modal-backdrop"
+          onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}
+        >
+          <section
+            className="modal-card"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-header">
+              <div>
+                <div className="modal-kicker">Provider</div>
+                <h2>ТеАтъІСИјТјЦтЈБ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="modal-close"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}
+              >
+                тЁ│жЌГ
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="provider-switch">
+              {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (
+                <button
+                  key={provider.id}
+                  type="button"
+                  className={`provider-option ${
+                    settings.providerId === provider.id ? "active" : ""
+                  }`}
+                  onClick={() => switchProvider(provider.id)}
+                >
+                  {provider.label}
+                </button>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+
+            <label className="modal-field">
+              <span>API Key</span>
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="sk-..."
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="modal-field">
+              <span>Model</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder={placeholderModel(settings.providerId)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <label className="modal-field">
+              <span>Base URL</span>
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+              />
+            </label>
+
+            <details className="advanced-panel">
+              <summary>жФўу║ДУ«Йуй«</summary>
+
+              <div className="split-fields">
+                <label className="modal-field">
+                  <span>Temperature</span>
+                  <input
+                    type="number"
+                    min="0"
+                    max="2"
+                    step="0.1"
+                    value={settings.temperature}
+                    onChange={(event) =>
+                      updateSetting("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                    }
+                  />
+                </label>
+
+                <label className="modal-field">
+                  <span>Max Tokens</span>
+                  <input
+                    type="number"
+                    min="1"
+                    step="1"
+                    value={settings.maxTokens}
+                    onChange={(event) =>
+                      updateSetting("maxTokens", Number(event.target.value || 1))
+                    }
+                  />
+                </label>
+              </div>
+
+              <label className="modal-field">
+                <span>у│╗у╗ЪТЈљуц║У»Ї</span>
+                <textarea
+                  rows="5"
+                  value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+                <div className="split-fields">
+                  <label className="modal-field">
+                    <span>HTTP-Referer</span>
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.referer}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                    />
+                  </label>
+
+                  <label className="modal-field">
+                    <span>X-Title</span>
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.title}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("title", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                    />
+                  </label>
+                </div>
+              ) : null}
+            </details>
+
+            <div className="modal-note">У«Йуй«С╝џУЄфтіеС┐ЮтГўтюеТюгтю░сђѓ</div>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      {showContext ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card context-card"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-header">
+              <div>
+                <div className="modal-kicker">Context</div>
+                <h2>ТГБТќЄтєЎтЁЦуГќуЋЦ</h2>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="modal-close"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}
+              >
+                тЁ│жЌГ
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="context-actions">
+              <span className="meta-chip static">{hostLabel}</span>
+              <button
+                className="topbar-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={refreshSelection}
+              >
+                тѕиТќ░жђЅтї║
+              </button>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="toggle-list">
+              <label className="toggle-row">
+                <div>
+                  <div className="toggle-title">ТіітйЊтЅЇжђЅтї║СйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ</div>
+                  <div className="toggle-desc">ућЪТѕљТЌХУ»╗тЈќжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄУЙЁтіЕуљєУДБС╗╗тіАсђѓ</div>
+                </div>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle-row">
+                <div>

+                </div>
+                <input

+            </div>
+
+            <div className="selection-preview">

+    </>

+}

+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #f5f1e8;
+  --bg-soft: #fbf8f1;
+  --panel: rgba(255, 252, 246, 0.9);
+  --panel-strong: rgba(255, 252, 248, 0.98);
+  --line: rgba(54, 39, 24, 0.1);
+  --line-strong: rgba(54, 39, 24, 0.16);
+  --text: #24190f;
+  --muted: #6a5847;
+  --accent: #d65f27;
+  --accent-strong: #944016;
+  --accent-soft: rgba(214, 95, 39, 0.12);
+  --shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(63, 41, 20, 0.08);
+  --radius-lg: 26px;

+  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+}
+
+.selection-preview pre {
+  margin: 12px 0 0;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+  line-height: 1.65;
+  font-family: "Consolas", "Cascadia Mono", "Microsoft YaHei UI", monospace;
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .chat-shell {
+    padding: 12px;
+  }
+
+  .topbar,
+  .welcome-card,
+  .modal-card {
+    padding: 16px;
+  }
+
+  .topbar {
+    align-items: flex-start;
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .topbar-actions,
+  .provider-switch,
+  .composer-footer,
+  .context-actions {
+    width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .provider-switch,
+  .split-fields,
+  .composer-footer,
+  .context-actions {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+    flex-direction: column;
+    align-items: stretch;
+  }
+
+  .message-card {
+    width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .composer-footer {
+    gap: 10px;
+  }
+
+  .composer-actions {
+    justify-content: flex-end;
+  }
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

- ТЌаућетИИжЕ╗С┐АТЂ»жЃйтј╗ТјЅС║є№╝їтЈфС┐ЮуЋЎ `У«Йуй«`сђЂ`СИіСИІТќЄ` СИцСИфтЁЦтЈБ№╝ЏжюђУдЂТЌХт╝╣уфЌТЅЊт╝ђсђѓ

ТѕЉти▓у╗ЈжЄЇТќ░УиЉУ┐Є `npm run build`№╝їТъёт╗║жђџУ┐ЄсђѓУ«ЙУ«АтЈѓУђЃТќ╣тљЉТїЅ `awesome-design-md` уџёу«ђТ┤Ђу╝ќУЙЉтЎежБјТа╝тњї ChatGPT уџётЇЋтѕЌС╝џУ»Юу╗ЊТъётцёуљєС║є№╝їтЈѓУђЃС╗Њт║Њ№╝џhttps://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md

тдѓТъюСйаУдЂ№╝їТѕЉСИІСИђТГЦтЈ»С╗Цу╗Ду╗ГтЂџСИђУй«ТЏ┤Т┐ђУ┐Џуџёу╗єтїќ№╝џ

```diff
+import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  streamCompletion
+} from "./ai";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+function createMessageId() {
+  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+function Icon({ name }) {
+  const common = {
+    width: 18,
+    height: 18,
+    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
+    fill: "none",
+    xmlns: "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
+    stroke: "currentColor",
+    strokeWidth: 1.8,
+    strokeLinecap: "round",
+    strokeLinejoin: "round"
+  };
+
+  switch (name) {
+    case "settings":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M12 3L13.4 5.7L16.4 6.1L14.2 8.2L14.7 11.2L12 9.8L9.3 11.2L9.8 8.2L7.6 6.1L10.6 5.7L12 3Z" />
+          <path d="M4 14.5L5.8 14.8L6.7 16.4L5.6 17.9L6.8 19.2L8.3 18.1L9.9 19L10.2 20.8H12" />
+          <path d="M20 14.5L18.2 14.8L17.3 16.4L18.4 17.9L17.2 19.2L15.7 18.1L14.1 19L13.8 20.8H12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "context":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="3" />
+          <path d="M8 9H16" />
+          <path d="M8 12H16" />
+          <path d="M8 15H13" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "clear":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M5 7H19" />
+          <path d="M9 7V5.5C9 4.7 9.7 4 10.5 4H13.5C14.3 4 15 4.7 15 5.5V7" />
+          <path d="M8 10V17" />
+          <path d="M12 10V17" />
+          <path d="M16 10V17" />
+          <path d="M6.5 7L7.2 18.2C7.3 19.2 8.1 20 9.1 20H14.9C15.9 20 16.7 19.2 16.8 18.2L17.5 7" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "send":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 4L11 13" />
+          <path d="M20 4L14 20L11 13L4 10L20 4Z" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "stop":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="6" y="6" width="12" height="12" rx="2" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "close":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M6 6L18 18" />
+          <path d="M18 6L6 18" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "provider":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <ellipse cx="12" cy="6" rx="6.5" ry="2.8" />
+          <path d="M5.5 6V12C5.5 13.5 8.4 14.8 12 14.8C15.6 14.8 18.5 13.5 18.5 12V6" />
+          <path d="M5.5 12V18C5.5 19.5 8.4 20.8 12 20.8C15.6 20.8 18.5 19.5 18.5 18V12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "refresh":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 11A8 8 0 1 0 17.7 16.7" />
+          <path d="M20 5V11H14" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    default:
+      return null;
+  }
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS)
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
+    loadStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, "")
+  );
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
+  const [showContext, setShowContext] = useState(false);
+
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+  const threadEndRef = useRef(null);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    threadEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({
+      behavior: "smooth",
+      block: "end"
+    });
+  }, [messages]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showSettings && !showContext) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    function onKeyDown(event) {
+      if (event.key === "Escape") {
+        setShowSettings(false);
+        setShowContext(false);
+      }
+    }
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+  }, [showContext, showSettings]);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) => ({
+      ...current,
+      providerId,
+      baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+    }));
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+      setError("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setError(caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Ц");
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    const trimmedPrompt = prompt.trim();
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!trimmedPrompt) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    const userMessageId = createMessageId();
+    const assistantMessageId = createMessageId();
+
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    setMessages((current) => [
+      ...current,
+      { id: userMessageId, role: "user", content: trimmedPrompt },
+      { id: assistantMessageId, role: "assistant", content: "", streaming: true }
+    ]);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt: trimmedPrompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        await writer.update(aggregate);
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setMessages((current) =>
+            current.map((message) =>
+              message.id === assistantMessageId
+                ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: true }
+                : message
+            )
+          );
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish();
+      setMessages((current) =>
+        current.map((message) =>
+          message.id === assistantMessageId
+            ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: false }
+            : message
+        )
+      );
+      setPrompt("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        await writer.cancel();
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((message) =>
+            message.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? { ...message, streaming: false }
+              : message
+          )
+        );
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Ц";
+        setError(message);
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((entry) =>
+            entry.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? {
+                  ...entry,
+                  content: entry.content || "У»иТ▒ѓтц▒У┤Ц",
+                  streaming: false,
+                  error: true
+                }
+              : entry
+          )
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handlePromptKeyDown(event) {
+    if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (!isGenerating) {
+        void handleGenerate();
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  function clearConversation() {
+    if (isGenerating) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setMessages([]);
+    setError("");
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <main className="minimal-shell">
+        <header className="minimal-toolbar">
+          <div className="toolbar-group">
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+              aria-label="СИіСИІТќЄ"
+              title="СИіСИІТќЄ"
+            >
+              <Icon name="context" />
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+              aria-label="У«Йуй«"
+              title="У«Йуй«"
+            >
+              <Icon name="settings" />
+            </button>
+          </div>
+
+          <button
+            className="icon-button"
+            type="button"
+            onClick={clearConversation}
+            disabled={isGenerating || messages.length === 0}
+            aria-label="ТИЁуЕ║"
+            title="ТИЁуЕ║"
+          >
+            <Icon name="clear" />
+          </button>
+        </header>
+
+        <section className="minimal-thread">
+          <div className="message-list">
+            {messages.map((message) => (
+              <article
+                key={message.id}
+                className={`bubble-row ${message.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant"}`}
+              >
+                <div className={`bubble ${message.error ? "error" : ""}`}>
+                  {message.content || (message.streaming ? "..." : "")}
+                </div>
+              </article>
+            ))}
+            <div ref={threadEndRef} />
+          </div>
+        </section>
+
+        <footer className="minimal-composer">
+          {error ? <div className="tiny-error">{error}</div> : null}
+
+          <div className="composer-card">
+            <textarea
+              value={prompt}
+              rows="3"
+              onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+              onKeyDown={handlePromptKeyDown}
+              placeholder=""
+            />
+
+            <div className="composer-actions">
+              {isGenerating ? (
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button ghost"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => void stopGeneration()}
+                  aria-label="тЂюТГб"
+                  title="тЂюТГб"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="stop" />
+                </button>
+              ) : null}
+              <button
+                className="icon-button primary"
+                type="button"
+                disabled={isGenerating || !prompt.trim()}
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                aria-label="тЈЉжђЂ"
+                title="тЈЉжђЂ"
+              >
+                <Icon name="send" />
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </footer>
+      </main>
+
+      {showSettings ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="provider" />
+                </span>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}
+                aria-label="тЁ│жЌГУ«Йуй«"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="provider-switch">
+              {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (
+                <button
+                  key={provider.id}
+                  type="button"
+                  className={`provider-chip ${
+                    settings.providerId === provider.id ? "active" : ""
+                  }`}
+                  onClick={() => switchProvider(provider.id)}
+                >
+                  {provider.label}
+                </button>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="field-grid">
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="API Key"
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder={placeholderModel(settings.providerId) || "Model"}
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="Base URL"
+              />
+            </div>
+
+            <details className="details-panel">
+              <summary>Advanced</summary>
+              <div className="field-grid advanced">
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"
+                  step="0.1"
+                  value={settings.temperature}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Temperature"
+                />
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="1"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("maxTokens", Number(event.target.value || 1))
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Max Tokens"
+                />
+                <textarea
+                  rows="4"
+                  value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                  placeholder="System Prompt"
+                />
+                {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+                  <>
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.referer}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="HTTP-Referer"
+                    />
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.title}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("title", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="X-Title"
+                    />
+                  </>
+                ) : null}
+              </div>
+            </details>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      {showContext ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="context" />
+                </span>
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={refreshSelection}
+                  aria-label="тѕиТќ░жђЅтї║"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="refresh" />
+                </button>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}
+                aria-label="тЁ│жЌГСИіСИІТќЄ"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="toggle-stack">
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Use selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Replace selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="selection-box">{selectionText || ""}</pre>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+    </>
+  );
+}
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-15 12:41:56Z)**_

```diff
+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #ffffff;
+  --panel: #ffffff;
+  --surface: #fbfbfb;
+  --line: #ececec;
+  --line-strong: #dcdcdc;
+  --text: #121212;
+  --muted: #737373;
+  --accent: #111111;
+  --accent-soft: #f3f3f3;
+  --danger: #b42318;
+  --shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.04);
+  --radius-lg: 24px;
+  --radius-md: 18px;
+  --radius-sm: 14px;
+  --font-ui: "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Bahnschrift", "Microsoft YaHei",
+    sans-serif;
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body,
+#root {
+  min-height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: var(--font-ui);
+  background: var(--bg);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+button {
+  padding: 0;
+  background: none;
+}
+
+.minimal-shell {
+  width: min(840px, 100%);
+  min-height: 100vh;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 16px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 16px;
+}
+
+.minimal-toolbar {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+}
+
+.toolbar-group {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.icon-button {
+  width: 40px;
+  height: 40px;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: #fff;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition:
+    transform 140ms ease,
+    border-color 140ms ease,
+    background-color 140ms ease,
+    opacity 140ms ease;
+}
+
+.icon-button:hover {
+  transform: translateY(-1px);
+  border-color: var(--line-strong);
+  background: var(--surface);
+}
+
+.icon-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.36;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+  transform: none;
+}
+
+.icon-button.primary {
+  color: #fff;
+  border-color: #111;
+  background: #111;
+}
+
+.icon-button.primary:hover {
+  background: #1b1b1b;
+  border-color: #1b1b1b;
+}
+
+.icon-button.ghost {
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.minimal-thread {
+  flex: 1;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  min-height: 0;
+}
+
+.message-list {
+  flex: 1;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 12px;
+  padding: 6px 0;
+}
+
+.bubble-row {
+  display: flex;
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user {
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+}
+
+.bubble {
+  max-width: min(100%, 680px);
+  padding: 14px 16px;
+  border-radius: 22px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  background: #fafafa;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+  line-height: 1.72;
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user .bubble {
+  background: #111;
+  border-color: #111;
+  color: #fff;
+}
+
+.bubble.error {
+  color: var(--danger);
+  border-color: #f2d1cc;
+  background: #fff7f6;
+}
+
+.minimal-composer {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.tiny-error {
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  border: 1px solid #f2d1cc;
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  color: var(--danger);
+  background: #fff7f6;
+  font-size: 13px;
+}
+
+.composer-card {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 24px;
+  background: #fff;
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+}
+
+.composer-card textarea,
+.field-grid input,
+.field-grid textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  color: var(--text);
+  border: 0;
+  outline: none;
+  background: transparent;
+}
+
+.composer-card textarea {
+  min-height: 84px;
+  resize: none;
+  padding: 4px 6px;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+}
+
+.composer-actions {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.modal-backdrop {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 40;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 20px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76);
+  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
+}
+
+.modal-card {
+  width: min(560px, 100%);
+  max-height: min(88vh, 820px);
+  overflow: auto;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 28px;
+  background: #fff;
+  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
+}
+
+.modal-card.compact {
+  padding: 14px;
+}
+
+.modal-toolbar {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  margin-bottom: 14px;
+}
+
+.modal-icons {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.icon-badge {
+  width: 40px;
+  height: 40px;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: var(--accent-soft);
+  color: var(--text);
+}
+
+.provider-switch {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  margin-bottom: 12px;
+}
+
+.provider-chip {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-height: 42px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: #fff;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.provider-chip.active {
+  border-color: #111;
+  background: #111;
+  color: #fff;
+}
+
+.field-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.field-grid input,
+.field-grid textarea {
+  min-height: 46px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.field-grid textarea {
+  min-height: 110px;
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  resize: vertical;
+}
+
+.field-grid input:focus,
+.field-grid textarea:focus {
+  border-color: var(--line-strong);
+}
+
+.details-panel {
+  margin-top: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.details-panel summary {
+  min-height: 46px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  list-style: none;
+}
+
+.details-panel summary::-webkit-details-marker {
+  display: none;
+}
+
+.details-panel[open] summary {
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
+}
+
+.details-panel .advanced {
+  padding: 12px;
+}
+
+.toggle-stack {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.toggle-item {
+  min-height: 52px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+}
+
+.toggle-item span {
+  color: var(--text);
+}
+
+.toggle-item input {
+  width: 18px;
+  height: 18px;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.selection-box {
+  min-height: 160px;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+  padding: 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  background: #fafafa;
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+  line-height: 1.65;
+  overflow: auto;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .minimal-shell {
+    padding: 12px;
+  }
+
+  .modal-backdrop {
+    padding: 12px;
+  }
+
+  .modal-card {
+    width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .provider-switch {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

export const PROVIDERS = {
  openrouter: {
    id: "openrouter",
    label: "OpenRouter",
    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"

    label: "NVIDIA Build",
    defaultBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
    placeholderModel: "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct"
  }
};

export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
  providerId: "openrouter",
  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
  apiKey: "",
  model: "",
  temperature: 0.5,
  maxTokens: 4096,
  systemPrompt:
    "ТхБуі│ТДИ WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓжЇћРЋѓтбюжієтѓЮЬЄгТЮѕТњ│тџГжќФтѓџТѓјжљЕтГўтИ┤жЇљТгЈтЈєтДЮ№йЁу┤АжЈѓтЏесђѓтДЮ№йєТъЃжљетІфУЁЉжЈѓтЏДтћ┤уђ╣уЎИу┤Юу╝ЂТњ┤уђ»теЊтЉ«ТФџжћЏт▓ёС╝ЕжЇЈтХЁуўежЈєтІФТІ░жЇЈтєетйіТЮЕУѕгРѓг?,
  referer: "https://localhost",
  title: "WPS AI Plugin",
  useSelectionAsContext: true,
  replaceSelection: true
};

function normalizeContent(content) {
  if (typeof content === "string") {
    return content;
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
    return "";
  }

  return content
    .map((item) => {
      if (typeof item === "string") {
        return item;
      }

      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
        return String(item.text ?? "");
      }

      return "";
    })
    .join("");
}

function extractChunk(payload) {
  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
  if (!choice) {
    return "";
  }

  return (
    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
    ""
  );
}

async function buildError(response) {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";

  try {
    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
      const json = await response.json();
      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
    }

    return await response.text();
  } catch {
    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
  }
}

export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
  const selectionBlock =
    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
      ? [
          "ТхасЃцугЁжЇљтЉГЬєљжЈёЬѕюТЋцжј┤т│░уХІжЇЊтХЁТ╣ф WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓТХЊЬЁбРѓгтцЅУЁЉжљетІгЬёюжЈѓтЏиу┤ЮуњЄт│░уџбжЇЈТюхуХћТХЊУй░угѓТХЊтгФТъЃжћЏт▒╝угЅуЉЋСй╣Т║ђтДіС╝┤тЎИТЙХтХЈу┤░",
          "",
          "---- жќФтціт░»т»«РѓгТ┐«?----",
          selectionText.trim(),
          "---- жќФтціт░»у╝ЂТњ┤ТйФ ----",
          ""
        ].join("\n")
      : "";

  return [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
    }
  ];
}

export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
  const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
  };

  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
  }

  const response = await fetch(
    `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
    {
      method: "POST",
      headers,
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: settings.model.trim(),
        messages,
        temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
        max_tokens: Number(settings.maxTokens),
        stream: true
      }),
      signal
    }
  );

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(await buildError(response));
  }

  if (!response.body) {
    const json = await response.json();
    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
    if (fallbackText) {
      yield fallbackText;
    }
    return;
  }

  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
  if (!contentType.includes("text/event-stream")) {
    const json = await response.json();
    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
    if (fallbackText) {
      yield fallbackText;
    }
    return;
  }

  const reader = response.body.getReader();
  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
  let buffer = "";

  while (true) {
    const { value, done } = await reader.read();

    if (done) {
      buffer += decoder.decode();
      break;
    }

    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
    const parts = buffer.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/);
    buffer = parts.pop() ?? "";

    for (const part of parts) {
      const lines = part
        .split(/\r?\n/)
        .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
        .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim());

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line || line === "[DONE]") {
          continue;
        }

        const payload = JSON.parse(line);
        const text = extractChunk(payload);
        if (text) {
          yield text;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (!buffer.trim()) {
    return;

30:
31:function normalizeContent(content) {
32:  if (typeof content === "string") {
33:    return content;
34:  }
35:
36:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
37:    return "";
38:  }
39:
40:  return content
41:    .map((item) => {
42:      if (typeof item === "string") {
43:        return item;
44:      }
45:
46:      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
47:        return String(item.text ?? "");
48:      }
49:
50:      return "";
51:    })
52:    .join("");
53:}
54:
55:function extractChunk(payload) {
56:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
57:  if (!choice) {
58:    return "";
59:  }
60:
61:  return (
62:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
63:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
64:    ""
65:  );
66:}
67:
68:async function buildError(response) {
69:  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
70:
71:  try {
72:    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
73:      const json = await response.json();
74:      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
75:    }
76:
77:    return await response.text();
78:  } catch {
79:    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
80:  }
81:}
82:
83:export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
84:  const selectionBlock =
85:    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
86:      ? [
87:          "С╗ЦСИІтєЁт«╣Тў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУ»ит░єтЁХСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇ№╝џ",
88:          "",
89:          "---- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ----",
90:          selectionText.trim(),
91:          "---- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ----",
92:          ""
93:        ].join("\n")
94:      : "";
95:
96:  return [
97:    {
98:      role: "system",
99:      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
100:    },
101:    {
102:      role: "user",
103:      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
104:    }
105:  ];
106:}
107:
108:export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
109:  const headers = {
110:    "Content-Type": "application/json",
111:    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
112:  };
113:
114:  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
115:    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
116:    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
117:  }
118:
119:  const response = await fetch(
120:    `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
121:    {
122:      method: "POST",

124:      body: JSON.stringify({
125:        model: settings.model.trim(),
126:        messages,
127:        temperature: Number(settings.temperature),

function onbuttonclick(idStr)
{
    if (typeof (window.Application.Enum) != "object") { // Т┐АтѓЏуЂЅтеїРёЃТ╣ЂжЇљтЉ»уќєжЈІТ░ФтдЄжЇі?
        window.Application.Enum = WPS_Enum
    }
    switch(idStr)
    {
        case "dockLeft":{
                let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.DockPosition = window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionLeft
                }
                break
            }
        case "dockRight":{
            let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.DockPosition = window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight
                }
                break
        }
        case "hideTaskPane":{
            let tsId = window.Application.PluginStorage.getItem("taskpane_id")
                if (tsId){
                    let tskpane = window.Application.GetTaskPane(tsId)
                    tskpane.Visible = false
                }
                break
        }
        case "addString":{
            let doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
            if (doc){
                doc.Range(0, 0).Text="Hello, wpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТцц?"
                //Т┐ѓУЌЅтёџжЈёуЌ║psжљетѕАug, ТЮЕТгјУб▒жЇЎсЃеуўйуЉЎ№╣ђтйѓwpsжќ▓тХЄу▓»
                let rgSel = window.Application.Selection.Range
                if (rgSel)
                    rgSel.Select()
            }
            break;
        }
        case "getDocName":{
            let doc = window.Application.ActiveDocument
                let textValue = "";
                if (!doc){
                    textValue = textValue + "Уц░Тњ│тбатеїРёЃТ╣ЂжјхТњ│у┤ЉТхаУ«│уХЇжЈѓтЏесђѓ"
                    return
                }
                textValue = textValue + doc.Name
                document.getElementById("text_p").innerHTML = textValue
                break
        }
    }
}

window.onload = function () {
    var xmlReq = WpsInvoke.CreateXHR();
    var url = location.origin + "/.debugTemp/NotifyDemoUrl"
    xmlReq.open("GET", url);
    xmlReq.onload = function (res) {
        var node = document.getElementById("DemoSpan");
        node.innerText = res.target.responseText;
    };
    xmlReq.send();
}
```
</details></tool-use>

            жЈЄуБІЬЄЏу╝ЂтЌЎТ«ЉТХЊтХБ/SТХЊТ░гтДЪу╗»УЇцу▓║жЌєтЌўтъџжљетІ«тЁўжЇћТХџТхЅжЇЈт┤ЄТ«Љу╗ђУй░уиЦжћЏт▓ЃЬЄгжЇЎтѓЮРѓгтє┐у┤░

                target="_blank">жієтГИPSТхют▒ЙЬѓ╝т»«РѓгжЇЎТѕЎРѓг?/a>ТЮъЬёЃТхєжћЏт▓ђТџђТХЊтгФтЂЇжљетІ«уўјуњЂТЂњРѓг?

</body>
<script>
    //уђ╣уѓ║Тф»жљетІФу┤ЉжЇЎТѕюУЁЉжћЏт▒╝угЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝ЂуєХугїwpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццтюГТ«ЉТхюсѓёу░░Тха№йЄуѕюТ┐АтѓЎугЁжћЏ?
    var WebNotifycount = 0;
    var callbackFunc = function (result) {
        if (result.status == 0) {
            //ТХЊтг«Тй░ТЮЕТгњЬћЉТха№йЄуѕюжљбсёдТйхтеЅсёЦтћйТхатиюpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццуАЁу╣ЉжЇЦуѓхТ«ЉтеЉтаЪС╝ЁжљетІгтИ┤жЈђУи║тџ▒жЈЂ?
            WpsInvoke.RegWebNotify(projInfo.type, projInfo.name, function (messageText) {
                var span = document.getElementById("webnotifyspan")
                span.innerHTML = "(теєРёЃТџЪжћЏ? + ++WebNotifycount + ")жћЏ? + messageText;
            })
            alert(result.response)
        }
        else
            alert(result.message)
    }

    function openOfficeFile(param) {
        var invokeParam = {
            flag: "openOfficeFile",
            filepath: param
        } //жЈЇУДётхЂжЌЄРѓгтД╣тѓЎТЇбжј░т┐ЊуЋЙТХћ?
        WpsInvoke.InvokeAsHttp(
            projInfo.type,
            projInfo.name, //wpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццтюГТ«ЉжЇџтХЁуЊДжћЏт▒йТ╣фуђ╣уѓ║Тф»ТццтюГТ┤░ТХЊЬЁътЋЊТХЊтЕѓЬЄ«Тљ┤ТЌѓТ«ЉжЇџтХЁуЊД
            "openOfficeFileFromSystemDemo", //уЉЋСййуџЪжљбсёДТ«ЉжЇдРЋ│psжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏУЁЉжљетІФтџ▒жЈЂТЮ┐ТѓЋ
            JSON.stringify(invokeParam), //уњІтєфТЋцжљетІФТ╣фwpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏУЁЉжљетІФтџ▒жЈЂТІїЬЏдТх╝уі╗РѓгТјћТ«ЉжЈЂуЅѕтхЂжћЏт▒ЙТДИТХЊРѓгТХЊуїеsonуђхуАЁУќёжћЏт▒ЙуЅ┤жј╣Ьє╗угЪжЇћ№╝ёжЃ┤у╝Ђує╝ТИХтД╣тѓЎТЇбжј░т┐ЊуЋЙТХћ?
            callbackFunc) //жЇЦуѓХуџЪжЇЉУіЦТџЪжћЏт»ЃpsжЇћуі║ТхЄТццжђЏУЁЉInvokeFromSystemDemoТЮЕТгјжЄюжЇЉУіЦТџЪжљетІ«у╣ЉжЇЦуѓ▓РѓгжЌ┤уХћТХЊжИ┐у╣ќТХЊЬЂётџ▒жЈЂТЅ«Т«ЉжЇЎтѓЏТџЪ
    }

    function onDivClick(param, showToFront) {
        var invokeParam = {
            жјИтцљТИХтД╣тѓџуЋЙТХћ? "уђ╣тцљТИХтД╣тѓюу▓░жЇі?,

var cp = require('child_process');
const express = require('express');
var ini = require('ini')
const os = require('os');
const fs = require('fs')
const fsEx = require('fs-extra')
const path = require('path')
const http = require("http")
const jsUtil = require('./util.js')
const rcWatch = require('recursive-watch')
const sudo = require('sudo-js');
const inquirer = require('inquirer')
const chalk = require('chalk')


async function debug(...options) {
	const xmlDebug = require('./debug_xmlplugin')
	const publishDebug = require('./debug_publish')
	needPublishDebug().then(b=>{
		return b ? publishDebug.debug(...options) : xmlDebug(...options)
	})
}

async function needPublishDebug(){
	var bPersonal = false;
	var versionCfgpath;
	if (os.platform() == 'win32') {
		return new Promise((r,j)=>{
			cp.exec("REG QUERY HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\\KWPS.Document.12\\shell\\open\\command /ve", function (error, stdout, stderr) {
				var val = undefined;
				try {
					val = stdout.split("    ")[3].split('"')[1];
				} catch (err) {
					throw new Error("WPSжЈѕЬЂёуЋеуЉЂтњЃу┤ЮуњЄт│░уЋеуЉЂтї┤PS 2019 жЈѕРѓгжЈѓТЅ«тбЌжЈѕЬЃЙРѓг?)
				}
				if (typeof (val) == "undefined" || val == null) {
					throw new Error("WPSжЈѕЬЂёуЋеуЉЂтњЃу┤ЮуњЄт│░уЋеуЉЂтї┤PS 2019 жЈѕРѓгжЈѓТЅ«тбЌжЈѕЬЃЙРѓг?)
				}
				var pos = val.indexOf("wps.exe");
				if (pos < 0)
					pos = val.indexOf("wpsoffice.exe");
				if (pos < 0) {
					console.log(val)
					throw new Error("wpsуђ╣тцјЬЌіт»«тѓџуѕХжћЏт▓ЃЬЄгу║ГЬє┐ЬЁ╗жЈѕтцІуЌЁжЈѕтцІЬёюу║ГЬєЙТ«Љуђ╣тцјЬЌіWPS 2019 жЈѕРѓгжЈѓТЅ«тбЌжЈѕЬёіу┤њ")
				}
				let versionCfgpath = val.substring(0, pos) + "cfgs/setup.cfg";
				r(versionCfgpath)
			});
		}).then(r=>{
			versionCfgpath = r
			if (!fsEx.existsSync(versionCfgpath))
				return false;
			var config = ini.parse(fs.readFileSync(versionCfgpath, 'utf-8'))
			var firstVer = config.Version.FirstVersion;
			var version = config.Version.Version;
			if (firstVer == '1' && version >= '16910')
				return true;
			if (firstVer == '9')
				return true;

			const projCfg = jsUtil.projectCfg()
			const scriptDev = projCfg.scripts.dev
			if (!scriptDev)
				return false
			const bVue3 = scriptDev.includes("vite")
			return bVue3;
		})
	} 

	return true;
}

module.exports = (...args) => {
	return debug(...args).catch(err => {
		console.error(err)
		if (!process.env.VUE_CLI_TEST) {
			process.exit(1)
		}
	})
}
```
</details></tool-use>

var cp = require('child_process');
const express = require('express');
var ini = require('ini')
const os = require('os');
const fs = require('fs')
const fsEx = require('fs-extra')
const xml2js = require("xml2js");
const path = require('path')
const http = require("http")
const jsUtil = require('./util.js')
const rcWatch = require('recursive-watch')
const sudo = require('sudo-js');
const inquirer = require('inquirer')
const chalk = require('chalk')

const app = express()
const clients = []

let jspluginsXmlUrl = ""
let serverHost = ""
let serverPort = 3889
let remoteDebuggingPort = -1
let bSuRoot = false
let bServerOnly = false
let projectCfg = jsUtil.projectCfg()
let bDebug = false

function GetBackOemPath() {
	return path.resolve(__dirname, "back.json")
}

function GetBackJspluginsXmlPath() {
	return path.resolve(__dirname, "jsplugins.xml")
}

function suRoot(tryCount, cb) {
	if (bSuRoot) {
		cb(true)
		return
	}
	if (tryCount <= 0) {
		cb(false)
		return
	}
	inquirer.prompt([
		{
			type: 'password',
			name: 'password',
			message: 'жЪгЬѓАтћцТЦат▓ЃуўЅжћЏт▓ЃЬЄгТЮѕТњ│тЈєуђхтЌЎуѕюжћЏ?,
		}
	]).then(answers => {
		sudo.setPassword(answers.password);
		sudo.check((res) => {
			if (res) {
				bSuRoot = true
				cb(true)
				return
			} else {
				suRoot(--tryCount, cb)
			}
		})
	})
}

async function debug(options) {
	if (options.clean) {
		let backOemPath = GetBackOemPath()
		if (fsEx.pathExistsSync(backOemPath)) {
			await GetOemPath((path) => {
				fsEx.move(backOemPath, path, { overwrite: true })
			})
		}
		let backPath = GetBackJspluginsXmlPath()
		if (fsEx.pathExistsSync(backPath)) {
			let directPath = GetJspluginsXmlPath()
			await fsEx.move(backPath, directPath, { overwrite: true })
		}
		return
	}

	if (options.remotePort)
		remoteDebuggingPort = options.remotePort
	if (options.server)
		bServerOnly = true
	if (options.debug)
		bDebug = true
	//config oem.ini
	jsUtil.GetWebSiteHost(options.port, (host, port) => {
		if (options.port && options.port != port) {
			console.log(chalk.red(`жЈѕтХЁтДЪжЇџЬѕџтДЕТЙХУЙФУДджћЏт▓ђЬЂгжЇЎ№йЈу┤Ў${options.port}жћЏтцјЬЮджЇЌуіхТЋц`))
			return
		}
		serverHost = host
		serverPort = port
		//jspluginsXmlUrl = `${serverHost}/jsplugins.xml`

		configOem((ret) => {
			if (ret.status != 0) {
				console.error(ret.msg)
				return
			}

			//write jsplugins.xml
			let pluginRoot = {jsplugins:{
				jspluginonline:[]
			}}
			
			var addonType = projectCfg.addonType ? projectCfg.addonType : "et"
			if (bDebug) {
				pluginRoot.jsplugins.jspluginonline.push({$:{
					name:projectCfg.name,
					type:addonType,
					url:`${serverHost}/`,
					debug:'code',
					customDomain:projectCfg.customDomain
				}})
				
			} else {
				pluginRoot.jsplugins.jspluginonline.push({$:{
					name:projectCfg.name,
					type:addonType,
					url:`${serverHost}/`,
					customDomain:projectCfg.customDomain
				}})
			}
			let pluginXml = new xml2js.Builder().buildObject(pluginRoot)
			let jspluginsXml = pluginXml.toString({ pretty: true })
			if (DebugVite(jspluginsXml, 'dev') || DebugVite(jspluginsXml, 'serve'))
				return
			if (DebugReact(jspluginsXml, 'start' || DebugReact(jspluginsXml, 'dev')))
				return
			StartServer(jspluginsXml, () => {
				StartWps(jspluginsXml)
			})
		})
	})
}

let vueTryCount = 0
let vueJspluginsXml
function DebugVite(jspluginsXml, tag) {
	if (projectCfg.scripts && typeof projectCfg.scripts[tag] == 'string') {
		let devCmd = projectCfg.scripts[tag].trim()
		if (devCmd.startsWith("vue-cli-service")) {
			projectCfg.scripts[tag] = `vue-cli-service serve --port ${serverPort}`
			cfgData = JSON.stringify(projectCfg, "", "\t")
			fsEx.writeFileSync('package.json', cfgData)

			jsUtil.SpawnNpm(tag)
			vueTryCount = 0
			vueJspluginsXml = jspluginsXml
			setTimeout(TryStartWps, 1000)
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

function DebugReact(jspluginsXml, tag) {
	if (projectCfg.scripts && typeof projectCfg.scripts[tag] == 'string') {
		let devCmd = projectCfg.scripts[tag].trim()
		if (devCmd.includes("react-scripts")) {
			if (os.platform() == 'win32')
				projectCfg.scripts[tag] = `set PORT=${serverPort} && react-scripts start`
			else
				projectCfg.scripts[tag] = `export PORT=${serverPort} react-scripts start`
			cfgData = JSON.stringify(projectCfg, "", "\t")
			fsEx.writeFileSync('package.json', cfgData)

			jsUtil.SpawnNpm(tag)
			vueTryCount = 0
			vueJspluginsXml = jspluginsXml
			setTimeout(TryStartWps, 1000)
			return true
		}
	}
	return false
}

function TryStartWps() {
	if (vueTryCount > 5)
		return
	http.get(`${serverHost}/index.html`, (res) => {
		vueTryCount = 6
		StartWps(vueJspluginsXml);
		res.resume()
	}).on('error', (e) => {
		++vueTryCount
		setTimeout(TryStartWps, 1000)
	})
}

function StartServer(jspluginsXml, callback) {

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\server\relay.mjs`**

```diff
+import { createServer } from "node:http";
+import { Readable } from "node:stream";
+
+const PORT = 3888;
+const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
+
+function setCorsHeaders(res) {
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
+}
+
+function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
+  setCorsHeaders(res);
+  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
+  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
+}
+
+async function readJsonBody(req) {
+  const chunks = [];
+  for await (const chunk of req) {
+    chunks.push(chunk);
+  }
+
+  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
+  if (!raw) {
+    return {};
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(raw);
+}
+
+async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
+  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
+  if (!authorization) {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Missing Authorization header"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  let body;
+  try {
+    body = await readJsonBody(req);
+  } catch {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Invalid JSON body"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const upstream = await fetch(NVIDIA_UPSTREAM, {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers: {
+        Authorization: authorization,
+        "Content-Type": "application/json"
+      },
+      body: JSON.stringify(body)
+    });
+
+    setCorsHeaders(res);
+
+    const contentType = upstream.headers.get("content-type");
+    if (contentType) {
+      res.setHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
+    }
+
+    const cacheControl = upstream.headers.get("cache-control");
+    if (cacheControl) {
+      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", cacheControl);
+    }
+
+    res.writeHead(upstream.status);
+
+    if (!upstream.body) {
+      res.end();
+      return;
+    }
+
+    Readable.fromWeb(upstream.body).pipe(res);
+  } catch (error) {
+    sendJson(res, 502, {
+      error: {
+        message:
+          error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream"
+      }
+    });
+  }
+}
+
+const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
+  if (!req.url) {
+    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
+    setCorsHeaders(res);
+    res.writeHead(204);
+    res.end();
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
+    sendJson(res, 200, { ok: true, provider: "nvidia-relay" });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
+    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+});
+
+server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
+  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
+});
```

**Add: `D:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\тљ»тіеWPS AI.bat`**

+)
+
+start "WPS AI Relay" cmd /k "cd /d %~dp0 && npm run relay"
+call npm run debug
```

46:function normalizeContent(content) {
47:  if (typeof content === "string") {
48:    return content;

50:
51:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
52:    return "";
53:  }
54:
55:  return content

58:        return item;
59:      }

62:        return String(item.text ?? "");

67:    .join("");
68:}

70:function extractChunk(payload) {
71:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];

77:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
78:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
79:    ""
80:  );

111:export default function App() {
112:  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
113:    normalizeSettings(loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS))
114:  );
115:  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
116:    loadStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, "")
117:  );
118:  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
119:  const [error, setError] = useState("");
120:  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
121:  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
122:  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
123:  const [showContext, setShowContext] = useState(false);
124:
125:  const abortRef = useRef(null);
126:  const threadEndRef = useRef(null);
127:
128:  useEffect(() => {
129:    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
130:  }, [settings]);
131:
132:  useEffect(() => {
133:    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
134:  }, [prompt]);
135:
136:  useEffect(() => {
137:    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
138:      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
139:    }
140:  }, []);
141:
142:  useEffect(() => {
143:    threadEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({
144:      behavior: "smooth",
145:      block: "end"
146:    });
147:  }, [messages]);
148:
149:  useEffect(() => {
150:    if (!showSettings && !showContext) {
151:      return undefined;
152:    }
153:
154:    function onKeyDown(event) {
155:      if (event.key === "Escape") {
156:        setShowSettings(false);
157:        setShowContext(false);
158:      }
159:    }
160:
161:    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
162:    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);

Exit code: 0

Output:
import { createServer } from "node:http";
import { Readable } from "node:stream";

const PORT = 3888;
const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";

function setCorsHeaders(res) {
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
}

function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
  setCorsHeaders(res);
  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
}

async function readJsonBody(req) {
  const chunks = [];
  for await (const chunk of req) {
    chunks.push(chunk);
  }

  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
  if (!raw) {
    return {};
  }

  return JSON.parse(raw);
}

async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
  if (!authorization) {
    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Missing Authorization header"
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  let body;
  try {
    body = await readJsonBody(req);
  } catch {
    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Invalid JSON body"
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const upstream = await fetch(NVIDIA_UPSTREAM, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Authorization: authorization,
        "Content-Type": "application/json"
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body)
    });

    setCorsHeaders(res);

    const contentType = upstream.headers.get("content-type");
    if (contentType) {
      res.setHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
    }

    const cacheControl = upstream.headers.get("cache-control");
    if (cacheControl) {
      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", cacheControl);
    }

    res.writeHead(upstream.status);

    if (!upstream.body) {
      res.end();
      return;
    }

    Readable.fromWeb(upstream.body).pipe(res);
  } catch (error) {
    sendJson(res, 502, {
      error: {
        message:
          error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream"
      }
    });
  }
}

const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
  if (!req.url) {
    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
    setCorsHeaders(res);
    res.writeHead(204);
    res.end();
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
    sendJson(res, 200, { ok: true, provider: "nvidia-relay" });
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
    return;
  }

  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
});

server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
});
```
</details></tool-use>

export const PROVIDERS = {
  openrouter: {
    id: "openrouter",
    label: "OpenRouter",
    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
  },
  nvidia: {
    id: "nvidia",
    label: "NVIDIA Build",
    defaultBaseUrl: "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1",
    directBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
    placeholderModel: "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct"
  }
};

export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
  providerId: "openrouter",
  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
  apiKey: "",
  model: "",
  temperature: 0.5,
  maxTokens: 4096,
  systemPrompt:
    "ТхБуі│ТДИ WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓжЇћРЋѓтбюжієтѓЮЬЄгТЮѕТњ│тџГжќФтѓџТѓјжљЕтГўтИ┤жЇљТгЈтЈєтДЮ№йЁу┤АжЈѓтЏесђѓтДЮ№йєТъЃжљетІфУЁЉжЈѓтЏДтћ┤уђ╣уЎИу┤Юу╝ЂТњ┤уђ»теЊтЉ«ТФџжћЏт▓ёС╝ЕжЇЈтХЁуўежЈєтІФТІ░жЇЈтєетйіТЮЕУѕгРѓг?,
  referer: "https://localhost",
  title: "WPS AI Plugin",
  useSelectionAsContext: true,
  replaceSelection: true
};

export function normalizeSettings(input) {
  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };

  if (
    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
    (!settings.baseUrl ||
      settings.baseUrl === "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1")
  ) {
    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
  }

  return settings;
}

function normalizeContent(content) {
  if (typeof content === "string") {
    return content;
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
    return "";
  }

  return content
    .map((item) => {
      if (typeof item === "string") {
        return item;
      }

      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
        return String(item.text ?? "");
      }

      return "";
    })
    .join("");
}

function extractChunk(payload) {
  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
  if (!choice) {
    return "";
  }

  return (
    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
    ""
  );
}

async function buildError(response) {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";

  try {
    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
      const json = await response.json();
      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
    }

    return await response.text();
  } catch {
    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
  }
}

export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
  const selectionBlock =
    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
      ? [
          "ТхасЃцугЁжЇљтЉГЬєљжЈёЬѕюТЋцжј┤т│░уХІжЇЊтХЁТ╣ф WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓТХЊЬЁбРѓгтцЅУЁЉжљетІгЬёюжЈѓтЏиу┤ЮуњЄт│░уџбжЇЈТюхуХћТХЊУй░угѓТХЊтгФТъЃжћЏт▒╝угЅуЉЋСй╣Т║ђтДіС╝┤тЎИТЙХтХЈу┤░",
          "",
          "---- жќФтціт░»т»«РѓгТ┐«?----",
          selectionText.trim(),
          "---- жќФтціт░»у╝ЂТњ┤ТйФ ----",
          ""
        ].join("\n")
      : "";

  return [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
    }
  ];
}

export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
  const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
  };

  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
  }

  let response;
  try {
    response = await fetch(
      `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
      {
        method: "POST",
        headers,
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: settings.model.trim(),
          messages,
          temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
          max_tokens: Number(settings.maxTokens),
          stream: true
        }),
        signal
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    if (settings.providerId === "nvidia") {
      throw new Error(
        settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")
          ? "жЈѕЬёђТ╣┤ NVIDIA ТХЊЬЁАТхєтеїРёЃТ╣ЂТЮЕуѓ░угѓжієтѓЮЬЄгжЇЈтаЮт╝╗жЇЉТўЈу╣ЇуљЏт▒ИРѓгТ╗ЃТЃјжЇћРЋЊPS AI.batжѕЦТ┐Њу┤ЮжЇљтХЁТ┤ќжЇњ?WPS жќ▓т▓ётЎИуњЄТЏўРѓг?
          : "NVIDIA жј║сЃЦтйЏжќ░тХЄуќєжЈѕЬёЃжЪЕжЇЎЬѕюТЋцжћЏт▒╝ухЙУц░Тњ│тба WPS жЇЊтХЄЬЂгжљЕуБІу╣ЏТЙХУЙФУДджієтѓъРѓгТ░гуѕХжЈёЬѕЏуЦ╗уЉЎтаЮТФњ/WPS WebView жљетІ«Т│ЋжЇЕуєИтъеТха№йЄТѓіжќЙТЇљуЪЙжји№ИйтЪЁжієтѓџу╝ЊуњЂЬєйтдИ Base URL жЈђжђЏУ┤ЪжЈѕЬёђТ╣┤ТХЊЬЁАТхєжћЏТГеttp://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1"
      );
    }

  }

  }

    const json = await response.json();
    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
    if (fallbackText) {
      yield fallbackText;
    }
    return;
  }

  if (!contentType.includes(
