Output:
function getApplication() {
  if (window.Application) {
    return window.Application;
  }

  if (window.wps?.Application) {
    return window.wps.Application;
  }

  if (window.instance?.Application) {
    return window.instance.Application;
  }

  return null;
}

function getSelectionRange(app) {
  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
}

function forceRefresh(range) {
  try {
    if (range && typeof range.Select === "function") {
      range.Select();
    }
  } catch {
    // Ignore redraw issues on hosts that do not support Select.
  }
}

export function detectHostLabel() {
  if (window.Application) {
    return "WPS жЈѕЬёђТ╣┤жј╗ТјЇТгб";
  }

  if (window.wps?.Application) {
    return "WPS уђ╣тцИт»ї";
  }

  if (window.instance?.Application) {
    return "WebOffice уђ╣тцИт»ї";
  }

  return "те┤т┐џЬЮЇжЇБсёЕЬЋЕуЉЎ?;
}

export function readSelectionText() {
  const app = getApplication();
  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
    return "";
  }

  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
}

export function hasWpsDocument() {
  const app = getApplication();
  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
}

export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
  const app = getApplication();
  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
    return {
      locationLabel: "жЈѕЬЂЁЬЌЁте┤тгфтЪї WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓжћЏт▒╝у▓јжЇдсёцТЎХТЮѕУДёуѕ«ТБ░тІ«ЬЮЇ",
      async update() {},
      async finish() {},
      async cancel() {}
    };
  }

  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);

  if (!selectionRange) {
    throw new Error("жЈЃуі│уАХжЉЙт│░тйЄУц░Тњ│тбажЈѓтЏесђѓжќФтціт░»жіє?);
  }

  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
  const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;
  let latestText = "";
  let pendingText = "";
  let flushTimer = null;
  let flushing = false;

  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
    selectionRange.Text = "";
  }

  async function flushNow() {
    if (flushing || latestText === pendingText) {
      return;
    }

    flushing = true;
    try {
      latestText = pendingText;
      const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length);
      target.Text = latestText;
      forceRefresh(target);
    } finally {
      flushing = false;
    }
  }

  return {
    locationLabel: replaceSelection
      ? "уђ╣уѓ┤ТцѓуЉЋтЌЎТ┤іУц░Тњ│тбажќФтціт░»"
      : "уђ╣уѓ┤Тцѓжј╗ТјЉтЈєжЇњТЮ┐уХІжЇЊтХЁтјюжЈЇтЏдуХЁу╝Ѓ?,
    async update(text) {
      pendingText = text;
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        return;
      }

      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
        flushTimer = null;
        await flushNow();
      }, 70);
    },
    async finish() {
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
        flushTimer = null;
      }

      await flushNow();
      const endRange = doc.Range(anchor + latestText.length, anchor + latestText.length);
      forceRefresh(endRange);
    },
    async cancel() {
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
        flushTimer = null;
      }

      if (!latestText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
      }
    }
  };
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {

  PROVIDERS,

  normalizeSettings,
  streamCompletion
} from "./ai";

  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
}

function placeholderModel(providerId) {
  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
}

  switch (name) {

    case "clear":
      return (

          <path d="M6.5 7L7.2 18.2C7.3 19.2 8.1 20 9.1 20H14.9C15.9 20 16.7 19.2 16.8 18.2L17.5 7" />
        </svg>
      );
    case "send":
      return (
        <svg {...common}>

    case "stop":

        </svg>
      );
    case "close":

          <path d="M6 6L18 18" />

export default function App() {
  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
    normalizeSettings(loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS))
  );
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() =>
    loadStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, "")

    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
  }, [settings]);

  useEffect(() => {
    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
  }, [prompt]);

      if (event.key === "Escape") {
        setShowSettings(false);
        setShowContext(false);
      }
    }

    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
  }, [showContext, showSettings]);

  function updateSetting(key, value) {
    setSettings((current) => ({ ...current, [key]: value }));
  }

  function switchProvider(providerId) {
    setSettings((current) => ({
      ...current,
      providerId,
      baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
    }));

+const PORT = 3888;
+const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
+const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
+const MAX_HEADER_BYTES = 64 * 1024;
+
+function setCorsHeaders(res) {
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
+}
+
+function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
+  setCorsHeaders(res);
+  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
+  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
+}
+
+async function readJsonBody(req) {
+  const chunks = [];
+  for await (const chunk of req) {
+    chunks.push(chunk);
+  }
+
+  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
+  if (!raw) {
+    return {};
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(raw);
+}
+
+function findHeaderBoundary(buffer) {
+  const crlf = buffer.indexOf("\r\n\r\n");
+  if (crlf !== -1) {
+    return { index: crlf, length: 4 };
+  }
+
+  const lf = buffer.indexOf("\n\n");
+  if (lf !== -1) {
+    return { index: lf, length: 2 };
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function parseHeaderBlock(block) {
+  const lines = block
+    .split(/\r?\n/)
+    .map((line) => line.trimEnd())
+    .filter(Boolean);
+
+  if (lines.length === 0) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const statusMatch = lines[0].match(/^HTTP\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s+(\d{3})/i);
+  if (!statusMatch) {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  const headers = {};
+  for (const line of lines.slice(1)) {
+    const separator = line.indexOf(":");
+    if (separator === -1) {
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    const name = line.slice(0, separator).trim().toLowerCase();
+    const value = line.slice(separator + 1).trim();
+    headers[name] = value;
+  }
+
+  return {
+    statusCode: Number(statusMatch[1]),
+    statusLine: lines[0],
+    headers
+  };
+}
+
+function isInterimResponse(parsed) {
+  if (!parsed) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  if (/connection established/i.test(parsed.statusLine)) {
+    return true;
+  }
+
+  return parsed.statusCode >= 100 && parsed.statusCode < 200;
+}
+
+function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
+  const message = stderr.trim();
+  if (!message) {
+    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
+  }
+
+  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
+}
+
+function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
+  return [
+    "-sS",
+    "-N",
+    "-D",
+    "-",
+    "-X",
+    "POST",
+    "-H",
+    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
+    "-H",
+    "Content-Type: application/json",
+    "--data-binary",
+    "@-",
+    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
+  ];
+}
+
+async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
+  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
+  if (!authorization) {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Missing Authorization header"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  let body;
+  try {
+    body = await readJsonBody(req);
+  } catch {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Invalid JSON body"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
+    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
+    windowsHide: true
+  });
+
+  let stderr = "";
+  let responseReady = false;
+  let headerBuffer = Buffer.alloc(0);
+  let finished = false;
+
+  function fail(statusCode, message) {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    if (!res.headersSent) {
+      sendJson(res, statusCode, { error: { message } });
+      return;
+    }
+
+    res.end();
+  }
+
+  function beginResponse(parsed) {
+    setCorsHeaders(res);
+
+    if (parsed.headers["content-type"]) {
+      res.setHeader("Content-Type", parsed.headers["content-type"]);
+    }
+
+    if (parsed.headers["cache-control"]) {
+      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", parsed.headers["cache-control"]);
+    } else if (body.stream) {
+      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", "no-cache");
+    }
+
+    if (parsed.headers["nvcf-reqid"]) {
+      res.setHeader("X-NVCF-ReqId", parsed.headers["nvcf-reqid"]);
+    }
+
+    res.writeHead(parsed.statusCode);
+    responseReady = true;
+  }
+
+  req.on("close", () => {
+    if (!finished && !res.writableEnded) {
+      curl.kill();
+    }
+  });
+
+  curl.on("error", (error) => {
+    fail(502, error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to start curl");
+  });
+
+  curl.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => {
+    stderr += chunk.toString("utf8");
+  });
+
+  curl.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (responseReady) {
+      res.write(chunk);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    headerBuffer = Buffer.concat([headerBuffer, chunk]);
+
+    while (!responseReady) {
+      if (headerBuffer.length > MAX_HEADER_BYTES) {
+        curl.kill();
+        fail(502, "Invalid upstream response headers");
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const boundary = findHeaderBoundary(headerBuffer);
+      if (!boundary) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      const block = headerBuffer.subarray(0, boundary.index).toString("utf8");
+      const rest = headerBuffer.subarray(boundary.index + boundary.length);
+      headerBuffer = rest;
+
+      const parsed = parseHeaderBlock(block);
+      if (!parsed) {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      if (isInterimResponse(parsed)) {
+        continue;
+      }
+
+      beginResponse(parsed);
+      if (headerBuffer.length > 0) {
+        res.write(headerBuffer);
+        headerBuffer = Buffer.alloc(0);
+      }
+      return;
+    }
+  });
+
+  curl.stdout.on("end", () => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    if (!res.writableEnded) {
+      res.end();
+    }
+  });
+
+  curl.on("close", (code) => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!responseReady) {
+      fail(502, formatCurlFailure(stderr || `curl exited with code ${code ?? "unknown"}`));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    if (!res.writableEnded) {
+      res.end();
+    }
+  });
+
+  curl.stdin.end(JSON.stringify(body));
+}
+
+const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
+  if (!req.url) {
+    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
+    setCorsHeaders(res);
+    res.writeHead(204);
+    res.end();
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
+    sendJson(res, 200, {
+      ok: true,
+      provider: "nvidia-relay",
+      transport: "curl"
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
+    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+});
+
+server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
+  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
+});
```
</details></tool-use>

import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import { createServer } from "node:http";

const PORT = 3888;
const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
const MAX_HEADER_BYTES = 64 * 1024;

function setCorsHeaders(res) {
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
}

function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
  setCorsHeaders(res);
  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
}

async function readJsonBody(req) {
  const chunks = [];
  for await (const chunk of req) {
    chunks.push(chunk);
  }

  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
  if (!raw) {
    return {};
  }

  return JSON.parse(raw);
}

function findHeaderBoundary(buffer) {
  const crlf = buffer.indexOf("\r\n\r\n");
  if (crlf !== -1) {
    return { index: crlf, length: 4 };
  }

  const lf = buffer.indexOf("\n\n");
  if (lf !== -1) {
    return { index: lf, length: 2 };
  }

  return null;
}

function parseHeaderBlock(block) {
  const lines = block
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .map((line) => line.trimEnd())
    .filter(Boolean);

  if (lines.length === 0) {
    return null;
  }

  const statusMatch = lines[0].match(/^HTTP\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s+(\d{3})/i);
  if (!statusMatch) {
    return null;
  }

  const headers = {};
  for (const line of lines.slice(1)) {
    const separator = line.indexOf(":");
    if (separator === -1) {
      continue;
    }

    const name = line.slice(0, separator).trim().toLowerCase();
    const value = line.slice(separator + 1).trim();
    headers[name] = value;
  }

  return {
    statusCode: Number(statusMatch[1]),
    statusLine: lines[0],
    headers
  };
}

function isInterimResponse(parsed) {
  if (!parsed) {
    return false;
  }

  if (/connection established/i.test(parsed.statusLine)) {
    return true;
  }

  return parsed.statusCode >= 100 && parsed.statusCode < 200;
}

function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
  const message = stderr.trim();
  if (!message) {
    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
  }

  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
}

function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
  return [
    "-sS",
    "-N",
    "-D",
    "-",
    "-X",
    "POST",
    "-H",
    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
    "-H",
    "Content-Type: application/json",
    "--data-binary",
    "@-",
    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
  ];
}

async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
  if (!authorization) {
    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Missing Authorization header"
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  let body;
  try {
    body = await readJsonBody(req);

    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Invalid JSON body"
      }
    });
    return;

    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
    windowsHide: true
  });

  let stderr = "";
  let responseReady = false;
  let headerBuffer = Buffer.alloc(0);
  let finished = false;

  function fail(statusCode, message) {
    if (finished) {

    finished = true;
    if (!res.headersSent) {
      sendJson(res, statusCode, { error: { message } });
      return;
    }

    res.end();

    }

    res.writeHead(parsed.statusCode);
    responseReady = true;

    if (!finished && !res.writableEnded) {

12:  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
13:}
14:
15:function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
16:  setCorsHeaders(res);
17:  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
18:  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
19:}
20:
21:async function readJsonBody(req) {
22:  const chunks = [];
23:  for await (const chunk of req) {
24:    chunks.push(chunk);
25:  }
26:
27:  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
28:  if (!raw) {
29:    return {};
30:  }
31:
32:  return JSON.parse(raw);
33:}
34:
35:function findHeaderBoundary(buffer) {
36:  const crlf = buffer.indexOf("\r\n\r\n");
37:  if (crlf !== -1) {
38:    return { index: crlf, length: 4 };
39:  }
40:
41:  const lf = buffer.indexOf("\n\n");
42:  if (lf !== -1) {
43:    return { index: lf, length: 2 };
44:  }
45:
46:  return null;
47:}
48:
49:function parseHeaderBlock(block) {
50:  const lines = block
51:    .split(/\r?\n/)
52:    .map((line) => line.trimEnd())
53:    .filter(Boolean);
54:
55:  if (lines.length === 0) {
56:    return null;
57:  }
58:
59:  const statusMatch = lines[0].match(/^HTTP\/\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s+(\d{3})/i);
60:  if (!statusMatch) {
61:    return null;
62:  }
63:
64:  const headers = {};
65:  for (const line of lines.slice(1)) {
66:    const separator = line.indexOf(":");
67:    if (separator === -1) {
68:      continue;
69:    }
70:
71:    const name = line.slice(0, separator).trim().toLowerCase();
72:    const value = line.slice(separator + 1).trim();
73:    headers[name] = value;
74:  }
75:
76:  return {
77:    statusCode: Number(statusMatch[1]),
78:    statusLine: lines[0],
79:    headers
80:  };
81:}
82:
83:function isInterimResponse(parsed) {
84:  if (!parsed) {
85:    return false;
86:  }
87:
88:  if (/connection established/i.test(parsed.statusLine)) {
89:    return true;
90:  }
91:
92:  return parsed.statusCode >= 100 && parsed.statusCode < 200;
93:}
94:
95:function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
96:  const message = stderr.trim();
97:  if (!message) {
98:    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
99:  }
100:
101:  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
102:}
103:
104:function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
105:  return [
106:    "-sS",
107:    "-N",
108:    "-D",
109:    "-",
110:    "-X",
111:    "POST",
112:    "-H",
113:    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
114:    "-H",
115:    "Content-Type: application/json",
116:    "--data-binary",
117:    "@-",
118:    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
119:  ];
120:}
121:
122:async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
123:  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
124:  if (!authorization) {
125:    sendJson(res, 400, {
126:      error: {
127:        message: "Missing Authorization header"
128:      }
129:    });
130:    return;
131:  }
132:
133:  let body;
134:  try {
135:    body = await readJsonBody(req);
136:  } catch {
137:    sendJson(res, 400, {
138:      error: {
139:        message: "Invalid JSON body"
140:      }
141:    });
142:    return;
143:  }
144:
145:  const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
146:    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
147:    windowsHide: true
148:  });
149:
150:  let stderr = "";
151:  let responseReady = false;
152:  let headerBuffer = Buffer.alloc(0);
153:  let finished = false;
154:
155:  function fail(statusCode, message) {
156:    if (finished) {
157:      return;
158:    }
159:
160:    finished = true;
161:    if (!res.headersSent) {
162:      sendJson(res, statusCode, { error: { message } });
163:      return;
164:    }
165:
166:    res.end();
167:  }
168:
169:  function beginResponse(parsed) {
170:    setCorsHeaders(res);
171:
172:    if (parsed.headers["content-type"]) {
173:      res.setHeader("Content-Type", parsed.headers["content-type"]);
174:    }
175:
176:    if (parsed.headers["cache-control"]) {
177:      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", parsed.headers["cache-control"]);
178:    } else if (body.stream) {
179:      res.setHeader("Cache-Control", "no-cache");
180:    }
181:
182:    if (parsed.headers["nvcf-reqid"]) {
183:      res.setHeader("X-NVCF-ReqId", parsed.headers["nvcf-reqid"]);
184:    }
185:
186:    res.writeHead(parsed.statusCode);
187:    responseReady = true;
188:  }
189:
190:  req.on("close", () => {
191:    if (!finished && !res.writableEnde
... (truncated)
```

32:export function normalizeSettings(input) {

34:
35:  if (
36:    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
37:    (!settings.baseUrl ||
38:      settings.baseUrl === "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1")
39:  ) {
40:    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
41:  }
42:

44:}
45:
46:function normalizeContent(content) {
47:  if (typeof content === "string") {
48:    return content;
49:  }
50:
51:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
52:    return "";
53:  }
54:
55:  return content
56:    .map((item) => {
57:      if (typeof item === "string") {
58:        return item;
59:      }
60:
61:      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
62:        return String(item.text ?? "");
63:      }
64:
65:      return "";
66:    })
67:    .join("");
68:}
69:
70:function extractChunk(payload) {
71:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
72:  if (!choice) {
73:    return "";
74:  }
75:
76:  return (
77:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
78:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
79:    ""
80:  );

@'
import https from 'node:https';
import { HttpsProxyAgent } from 'https-proxy-agent';

const proxyUrl = process.env.HTTPS_PROXY || process.env.HTTP_PROXY;
const agent = proxyUrl ? new HttpsProxyAgent(proxyUrl) : undefined;
const payload = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'тЈфтЏътцЇOK' }],
  temperature: 0,
  max_tokens: 16,
  stream: true
});

const req = https.request('https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    Authorization: 'Bearer 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',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
  },
  agent
}, (res) => {
  console.log('status', res.statusCode, 'content-type', res.headers['content-type']);
  res.setEncoding('utf8');
  let shown = 0;
  res.on('data', (chunk) => {
    if (shown < 800) {
      process.stdout.write(chunk);
      shown += chunk.length;
    }
  });
  res.on('end', () => console.log('\nEND'));
});

req.on('error', (error) => {
  console.error(error.stack || error);
  process.exit(1);
});

req.end(payload);
'@ | node --input-type=module -

@'
import { spawn } from 'node:child_process';

const payload = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'тЈфтЏътцЇOK' }],
  temperature: 0,
  max_tokens: 16,
  stream: true
});

const child = spawn('curl.exe', [
  '-sS',
  '-N',
  '-D',
  '-',
  '-X',
  'POST',
  '-H',
  'Authorization: Bearer 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',
  '-H',
  'Content-Type: application/json',
  '--data-binary',
  '@-',
  'https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions'
], {
  stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe'],
  windowsHide: true
});

child.stdout.on('data', (chunk) => {
  console.log('STDOUT CHUNK');
  console.log(chunk.toString('utf8'));
});
child.stderr.on('data', (chunk) => {
  console.log('STDERR CHUNK');
  console.log(chunk.toString('utf8'));
});
child.on('close', (code) => {
  console.log('CLOSE', code);
});
child.on('error', (error) => {
  console.error('ERROR', error);
});
child.stdin.end(payload);
'@ | node --input-type=module -

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-15 13:24:52Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\server\relay.mjs`**

```diff
+import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
+import { createServer } from "node:http";
+
+const PORT = 3888;
+const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
+const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
+
+function setCorsHeaders(res) {
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
+  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
+}
+
+function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
+  setCorsHeaders(res);
+  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
+  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
+}
+
+async function readJsonBody(req) {
+  const chunks = [];
+  for await (const chunk of req) {
+    chunks.push(chunk);
+  }
+
+  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
+  if (!raw) {
+    return {};
+  }
+
+  return JSON.parse(raw);
+}
+
+function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
+  const message = stderr.trim();
+  if (!message) {
+    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
+  }
+
+  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
+}
+
+function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
+  return [
+    "-sS",
+    "-N",
+    "-f",
+    "-X",
+    "POST",
+    "-H",
+    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
+    "-H",
+    "Content-Type: application/json",
+    "--data-binary",
+    "@-",
+    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
+  ];
+}
+
+async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
+  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
+  if (!authorization) {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Missing Authorization header"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  let body;
+  try {
+    body = await readJsonBody(req);
+  } catch {
+    sendJson(res, 400, {
+      error: {
+        message: "Invalid JSON body"
+      }
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
+    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
+    windowsHide: true
+  });
+
+  let stderr = "";
+  let streamStarted = false;
+  let finished = false;
+
+  function fail(message) {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    if (!res.headersSent) {
+      sendJson(res, 502, { error: { message } });
+      return;
+    }
+
+    res.end();
+  }
+
+  curl.on("error", (error) => {
+    fail(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to start curl");
+  });
+
+  curl.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => {
+    stderr += chunk.toString("utf8");
+  });
+
+  curl.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!streamStarted) {
+      setCorsHeaders(res);
+      res.writeHead(200, {
+        "Content-Type": "text/event-stream; charset=utf-8",
+        "Cache-Control": "no-cache"
+      });
+      streamStarted = true;
+    }
+
+    res.write(chunk);
+  });
+
+  curl.stdout.on("end", () => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    res.end();
+  });
+
+  curl.on("close", (code) => {
+    if (finished) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!streamStarted) {
+      fail(formatCurlFailure(stderr || `curl exited with code ${code ?? "unknown"}`));
+      return;
+    }
+
+    finished = true;
+    res.end();
+  });
+
+  req.on("aborted", () => {
+    if (!finished) {
+      curl.kill();
+    }
+  });
+
+  curl.stdin.end(JSON.stringify(body));
+}
+
+const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
+  if (!req.url) {
+    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
+    setCorsHeaders(res);
+    res.writeHead(204);
+    res.end();
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
+    sendJson(res, 200, {
+      ok: true,
+      provider: "nvidia-relay",
+      transport: "curl"
+    });
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
+    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
+});
+
+server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
+  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
+});
```
</details></tool-use>

  curl.exe -sS -N -D - -H "Authorization: Bearer $apiKey" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary "@$env:TEMP\relay-stream-test.json" http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1/chat/completions
  '--- STDERR ---'
  Get-Content $err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
} finally {
  if ($proc -and !$proc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force }
  Get-Process curl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
}
```

1:import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
2:import { createServer } from "node:http";
3:
4:const PORT = 3888;
5:const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
6:const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
7:
8:function setCorsHeaders(res) {
9:  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
10:  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
11:  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
12:}
13:
14:function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
15:  setCorsHeaders(res);
16:  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
17:  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
18:}
19:
20:async function readJsonBody(req) {
21:  const chunks = [];
22:  for await (const chunk of req) {
23:    chunks.push(chunk);
24:  }
25:
26:  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
27:  if (!raw) {
28:    return {};
29:  }
30:
31:  return JSON.parse(raw);
32:}
33:
34:function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
35:  const message = stderr.trim();
36:  if (!message) {
37:    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
38:  }
39:
40:  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
41:}
42:
43:function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
44:  return [
45:    "-sS",
46:    "-N",
47:    "-f",
48:    "-X",
49:    "POST",
50:    "-H",
51:    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
52:    "-H",
53:    "Content-Type: application/json",
54:    "--data-binary",
55:    "@-",
56:    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
57:  ];
58:}
59:
60:async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
61:  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
62:  if (!authorization) {
63:    sendJson(res, 400, {
64:      error: {
65:        message: "Missing Authorization header"
66:      }
67:    });
68:    return;
69:  }
70:
71:  let body;
72:  try {
73:    body = await readJsonBody(req);
74:  } catch {
75:    sendJson(res, 400, {
76:      error: {
77:        message: "Invalid JSON body"
78:      }
79:    });
80:    return;
81:  }
82:
83:  const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
84:    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
85:    windowsHide: true
86:  });
87:
88:  let stderr = "";
89:  let streamStarted = false;
90:  let finished = false;
91:
92:  function fail(message) {
93:    if (finished) {
94:      return;
95:    }
96:
97:    finished = true;
98:    if (!res.headersSent) {
99:      sendJson(res, 502, { error: { message } });
100:      return;
101:    }
102:
103:    res.end();
104:  }
105:
106:  curl.on("error", (error) => {
107:    fail(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to start curl");
108:  });
109:
110:  curl.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => {
111:    stderr += chunk.toString("utf8");
112:  });
113:
114:  curl.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => {
115:    if (finished) {
116:      return;
117:    }
118:
119:    if (!streamStarted) {
120:      setCorsHeaders(res);
121:      res.writeHead(200, {
122:        "Content-Type": "text/event-stream; charset=utf-8",
123:        "Cache-Control": "no-cache"
124:      });
125:      streamStarted = true;
126:    }
127:
128:    res.write(chunk);
129:  });
130:
131:  curl.stdout.on("end", () => {
132:    if (finished) {
133:      return;
134:    }
135:
136:    finished = true;
137:    res.end();
138:  });
139:
140:  curl.on("close", (code) => {
141:    if (finished) {
142:      return;
143:    }
144:
145:    if (!streamStarted) {
146:      fail(formatCurlFailure(stderr || `curl exited with code ${code ?? "unknown"}`));
147:      return;
148:    }
149:
150:    finished = true;
151:    res.end();
152:  });
153:
154:  req.on("aborted", () => {
155:    if (!finished) {
156:      curl.kill();
157:    }
158:  });
159:
160:  curl.stdin.end(JSON.stringify(body));
161:}
162:
163:const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
164:  if (!req.url) {
165:    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
166:    return;
167:  }
168:
169:  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
170:    setCorsHeaders(res);
171:    res.writeHead(204);
172:    res.end();
173:    return;
174:  }
175:
176:  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
177:    sendJson(res, 200, {
178:      ok: true,
179:      provider: "nvidia-relay",
180:      transport: "curl"
181:    });
182:    return;
183:  }
184:
185:  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
186:    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
187:    return;
188:  }
189:
190:  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
191:});
192:
193:server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
194:  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
195:});
```
</details></tool-use>

  --muted: #737373;
  --accent: #111111;
  --accent-soft: #f3f3f3;
  --danger: #b42318;
  --shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.04);
  --radius-lg: 24px;
  --radius-md: 18px;
  --radius-sm: 14px;
  --font-ui: "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Bahnschrift", "Microsoft YaHei",
    sans-serif;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body,
#root {
  min-height: 100%;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: var(--font-ui);
  background: var(--bg);
}

button,
input,
textarea,
select {
  font: inherit;
}

button {
  padding: 0;
  background: none;
}

.minimal-shell {
  width: min(840px, 100%);
  min-height: 100vh;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 16px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.minimal-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
}

.toolbar-group {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--text);
  background: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    transform 140ms ease,
    border-color 140ms ease,
    background-color 140ms ease,
    opacity 140ms ease;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  border-color: var(--line-strong);
  background: var(--surface);
}

.icon-button:disabled {
  opacity: 0.36;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  transform: none;
}

.icon-button.primary {
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #111;
  background: #111;
}

.icon-button.primary:hover {
  background: #1b1b1b;
  border-color: #1b1b1b;
}

.icon-button.ghost {
  background: #fff;
}

.minimal-thread {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 0;
}

.message-list {
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 6px 0;
}

.bubble-row {
  display: flex;
}

.bubble-row.user {
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.bubble {
  max-width: min(100%, 680px);
  padding: 14px 16px;
  border-radius: 22px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  background: #fafafa;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
  line-height: 1.72;
}

.bubble-row.user .bubble {
  background: #111;
  border-color: #111;
  color: #fff;
}

.bubble.error {
  color: var(--danger);
  border-color: #f2d1cc;
  background: #fff7f6;
}

.minimal-composer {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.tiny-error {
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid #f2d1cc;
  border-radius: 14px;
  color: var(--danger);
  background: #fff7f6;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.composer-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 12px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
}

.composer-card textarea,
.field-grid input,
.field-grid textarea {
  width: 100%;
  color: var(--text);
  border: 0;
  outline: none;
  background: transparent;
}

.composer-card textarea {
  min-height: 84px;
  resize: none;
  padding: 4px 6px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.composer-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: 8px;
}

.modal-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 40;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  padding: 20px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.modal-card {
  width: min(560px, 100%);
  max-height: min(88vh, 820px);
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08);
}

.modal-card.compact {
  padding: 14px;
}

.modal-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.modal-icons {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.icon-badge {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--accent-soft);
  color: var(--text);
}

.provider-switch {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.provider-chip {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 42px;
  padding: 0 14px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--text);
  background: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.provider-chip.active {
  border-color: #111;
  background: #111;
  color: #fff;
}

.field-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.field-grid input,
.field-grid textarea {
  min-height: 46px;
  padding: 0 14px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background:

function getApplication() {
  if (window.Application) {
    return window.Application;
  }

  if (window.wps?.Application) {
    return window.wps.Application;
  }

  if (window.instance?.Application) {
    return window.instance.Application;
  }

  return null;
}

function getSelectionRange(app) {
  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
}

function forceRefresh(range) {
  try {
    if (range && typeof range.Select === "function") {
      range.Select();
    }
  } catch {
    // Ignore redraw issues on hosts that do not support Select.
  }
}

export function detectHostLabel() {
  if (window.Application) {
    return "WPS жЈѕЬёђТ╣┤жј╗ТјЇТгб";
  }

  if (window.wps?.Application) {
    return "WPS уђ╣тцИт»ї";
  }

  if (window.instance?.Application) {
    return "WebOffice уђ╣тцИт»ї";
  }

  return "те┤т┐џЬЮЇжЇБсёЕЬЋЕуЉЎ?;
}

export function readSelectionText() {
  const app = getApplication();
  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
    return "";
  }

  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
}

export function hasWpsDocument() {
  const app = getApplication();
  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
}

export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
  const app = getApplication();
  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
    return {
      locationLabel: "жЈѕЬЂЁЬЌЁте┤тгфтЪї WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓжћЏт▒╝у▓јжЇдсёцТЎХТЮѕУДёуѕ«ТБ░тІ«ЬЮЇ",
      async update() {},
      async finish() {},
      async cancel() {}
    };
  }

  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);

  if (!selectionRange) {
    throw new Error("жЈЃуі│уАХжЉЙт│░тйЄУц░Тњ│тбажЈѓтЏесђѓжќФтціт░»жіє?);
  }

  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
  const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;
  let latestText = "";
  let pendingText = "";
  let flushTimer = null;
  let flushing = false;

  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
    selectionRange.Text = "";
  }

  async function flushNow() {
    if (flushing || latestText === pendingText) {
      return;
    }

    flushing = true;
    try {
      latestText = pendingText;
      const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + latestText.length);
      target.Text = latestText;
      forceRefresh(target);
    } finally {
      flushing = false;
    }
  }

  return {
    locationLabel: replaceSelection
      ? "уђ╣уѓ┤ТцѓуЉЋтЌЎТ┤іУц░Тњ│тбажќФтціт░»"
      : "уђ╣уѓ┤Тцѓжј╗ТјЉтЈєжЇњТЮ┐уХІжЇЊтХЁтјюжЈЇтЏдуХЁу╝Ѓ?,
    async update(text) {
      pendingText = text;
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        return;
      }

      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(async () => {
        flushTimer = null;
        await flushNow();
      }, 70);
    },
    async finish() {
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
        flushTimer = null;
      }

      await flushNow();
      const endRange = doc.Range(anchor + latestText.length, anchor + latestText.length);
      forceRefresh(endRange);
    },
    async cancel() {
      if (flushTimer !== null) {
        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
        flushTimer = null;
      }

      if (!latestText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
      }
    }
  };
}

import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";

function createMessageId() {

}

function placeholderModel(providerId) {

}

export const PROVIDERS = {
  openrouter: {
    id: "openrouter",
    label: "OpenRouter",
    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
  },
  nvidia: {
    id: "nvidia",
    label: "NVIDIA Build",
    defaultBaseUrl: "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1",
    directBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
    placeholderModel: "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct"
  }
};

export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
  providerId: "openrouter",
  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
  apiKey: "",
  model: "",
  temperature: 0.5,
  maxTokens: 4096,
  systemPrompt:
    "ТхБуі│ТДИ WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓжЇћРЋѓтбюжієтѓЮЬЄгТЮѕТњ│тџГжќФтѓџТѓјжљЕтГўтИ┤жЇљТгЈтЈєтДЮ№йЁу┤АжЈѓтЏесђѓтДЮ№йєТъЃжљетІфУЁЉжЈѓтЏДтћ┤уђ╣уЎИу┤Юу╝ЂТњ┤уђ»теЊтЉ«ТФџжћЏт▓ёС╝ЕжЇЈтХЁуўежЈєтІФТІ░жЇЈтєетйіТЮЕУѕгРѓг?,
  referer: "https://localhost",
  title: "WPS AI Plugin",
  useSelectionAsContext: true,
  replaceSelection: true
};

export function normalizeSettings(input) {
  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };

  if (
    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
    (!settings.baseUrl ||
      settings.baseUrl === "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1")
  ) {
    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
  }

  return settings;
}

function normalizeContent(content) {
  if (typeof content === "string") {
    return content;
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
    return "";
  }

  return content
    .map((item) => {
      if (typeof item === "string") {
        return item;
      }

      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
        return String(item.text ?? "");
      }

      return "";
    })
    .join("");
}

function extractChunk(payload) {
  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
  if (!choice) {
    return "";
  }

  return (
    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
    ""
  );
}

async function buildError(response) {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";

  try {
    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
      const json = await response.json();
      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
    }

    return await response.text();
  } catch {
    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
  }
}

export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
  const selectionBlock =
    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
      ? [
          "ТхасЃцугЁжЇљтЉГЬєљжЈёЬѕюТЋцжј┤т│░уХІжЇЊтХЁТ╣ф WPS жЈѓтЏесђѓТХЊЬЁбРѓгтцЅУЁЉжљетІгЬёюжЈѓтЏиу┤ЮуњЄт│░уџбжЇЈТюхуХћТХЊУй░угѓТХЊтгФТъЃжћЏт▒╝угЅуЉЋСй╣Т║ђтДіС╝┤тЎИТЙХтХЈу┤░",
          "",
          "---- жќФтціт░»т»«РѓгТ┐«?----",
          selectionText.trim(),
          "---- жќФтціт░»у╝ЂТњ┤ТйФ ----",
          ""
        ].join("\n")
      : "";

  return [
    {
      role: "system",
      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
    },
    {
      role: "user",
      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
    }
  ];
}

export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
  const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
  };

  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI Plugin";
  }

  let response;
  try {
    response = await fetch(
      `${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`,
      {
        method: "POST",
        headers,
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: settings.model.trim(),
          messages,
          temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
          max_tokens: Number(settings.maxTokens),
          stream: true
        }),
        signal
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    if (settings.providerId === "nvidia") {
      throw new Error(
        settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")
          ? "жЈѕЬёђТ╣┤ NVIDIA ТХЊЬЁАТхєтеїРёЃТ╣ЂТЮЕуѓ░угѓжієтѓЮЬЄгжЇЈтаЮт╝╗жЇЉТўЈу╣ЇуљЏт▒ИРѓгТ╗ЃТЃјжЇћРЋЊPS AI.batжѕЦТ┐Њу┤ЮжЇљтХЁТ┤ќжЇњ?WPS жќ▓т▓ётЎИуњЄТЏўРѓг?
          : "NVIDIA жј║сЃЦтйЏжќ░тХЄуќєжЈѕЬёЃжЪЕжЇЎЬѕюТЋцжћЏт▒╝ухЙУц░Тњ│тба WPS жЇЊтХЄЬЂгжљЕуБІу╣ЏТЙХУЙФУДджієтѓъРѓгТ░гуѕХжЈёЬѕЏуЦ╗уЉЎтаЮТФњ/WPS WebView жљетІ«Т│ЋжЇЕуєИтъеТха№йЄТѓіжќЙТЇљуЪЙжји№ИйтЪЁжієтѓџу╝ЊуњЂЬєйтдИ Base URL жЈђжђЏУ┤ЪжЈѕЬёђТ╣┤ТХЊЬЁАТхєжћЏТГеttp://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1"
      );
    }

    throw error;
  }

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(await buildError(response));
  }

  if (!response.body) {
    const json = await response.json();
    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
    if (fallbackText) {

   ТііТХѕТЂ»тї║Тћ╣ТѕљуІгуФІТ╗џтіет«╣тЎе№╝їтЈфтюеућеТѕитЂюуЋЎтюет║ЋжЃеТЌХУЄфтіеТ╗џтіе№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇСйаТ╗џУй«ТЪЦуюІтјєтЈ▓ТЌХСйЇуй«УбФт╝║тѕХТІЅУх░сђѓ
   Тіі AI ТХѕТЂ»Тћ╣Тѕљ Markdown ТИ▓ТЪЊ№╝їСИЇтєЇтЈфТўЙуц║СИђтЮеу║»ТќЄТюгсђѓ
   ТіітГЌСйЊтњїжЌ┤УиЮТЋ┤СйЊу╝Ет░ЈСИђТАБсђѓ

2. `wps.js`
   ТхЂт╝ЈжўХТ«хтЈфтЂџУй╗жЄЈу║»ТќЄТюгжбёУДѕ№╝їтЄЈт░Љт»╣ WPS ТГБТќЄуџёжФўжбЉжЄЇтєЎ№╝їжЎЇСйјРђюУЄфтіеСИГТќГРђЮуџёТдѓујЄсђѓ
   т«їТѕљтљјтєЇТііТЋ┤Т«х Markdown жЄЇТќ░тєЎТѕљтИдТа╝т╝ЈуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУЄ│т░ЉТћ»ТїЂТаЄжбўсђЂтіау▓ЌсђЂТќюСйЊсђЂтѕЌУАесђЂт╝ЋућесђЂС╗БуаЂтЮЌсђѓ

3. `ai.js`
   Тіі `max_tokens` Тћ╣ТѕљРђюуЋЎуЕ║тЇ│УЄфтіеРђЮ№╝їСИЇтєЇтЏ║т«џ 4096№╝їУ«ЕТеАтъІт░йжЄЈТїЅт«ўТќ╣ж╗ўУ«цСИіжЎљУх░сђѓ
   SSE УДБТъљтЂџтЙЌТЏ┤уе│№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇТЪљСИфт╝ѓтИИтѕєуЅЄуЏ┤ТјЦСИГТќГТЋ┤ТгАУЙЊтЄ║сђѓ

```diff
+import DOMPurify from "dompurify";
+import { marked } from "marked";
+
+marked.setOptions({
+  async: false,
+  breaks: true,
+  gfm: true
+});
+
+function normalizeMarkdown(markdown) {
+  return String(markdown ?? "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n");
+}
+
+export function renderMarkdownHtml(markdown) {
+  const source = normalizeMarkdown(markdown).trim();
+  if (!source) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const rawHtml = marked.parse(source);
+  return DOMPurify.sanitize(rawHtml, {
+    USE_PROFILES: { html: true }
+  });
+}
+
+export function createMarkdownDocument(markdown) {
+  const parser = new DOMParser();
+  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(markdown);
+  return parser.parseFromString(html || "<p></p>", "text/html");
+}
+
+export function markdownToPlainText(markdown) {
+  return normalizeMarkdown(markdown)
+    .replace(/```[^\n]*\n?/g, "")
+    .replace(/```/g, "")
+    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/^>\s?/gm, "")
+    .replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm, "")
+    .replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/gm, "\u2022 ")
+    .replace(/^(\s*)\d+\.\s+/gm, "$11. ")
+    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/_([^_]+)_/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/~~([^~]+)~~/g, "$1")
+    .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
+    .trim();
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

**Add: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\wps.js`**

+import { createMarkdownDocument, markdownToPlainText } from "./markdown";
+
+const HEADING_SIZES = {
+  H1: 18,
+  H2: 16,
+  H3: 15,
+  H4: 14,
+  H5: 13,
+  H6: 13
+};
+
+const INLINE_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
+  bold: false,
+  code: false,
+  italic: false,
+  size: null,
+  underline: false
+});
+
+function getApplication() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return window.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return window.wps.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return window.instance.Application;
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function getSelectionRange(app) {
+  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
+}
+
+function mergeStyle(baseStyle, patch) {
+  return { ...baseStyle, ...patch };
+}
+
+function applyTextStyle(range, style) {
+  const font = range.Font;
+
+  font.Bold = style.bold ? 1 : 0;
+  font.Italic = style.italic ? 1 : 0;
+
+  if (style.size) {
+    font.Size = style.size;
+  }
+
+  if (style.code) {
+    font.Name = "Consolas";
+    font.NameAscii = "Consolas";
+  }
+
+  if ("underline" in style) {
+    range.Underline = style.underline ? 1 : 0;
+  }
+}
+
+function updateTrailingBreaks(state, text) {
+  const match = text.match(/\r+$/);
+  state.trailingBreaks = match ? match[0].length : 0;
+}
+
+function insertStyledText(state, text, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
+  const normalized = String(text ?? "").replace(/\r?\n/g, "\r");
+  if (!normalized) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const start = state.anchor + state.length;
+  state.doc.Range(start, start).InsertAfter(normalized);
+
+  const end = start + normalized.length;
+  const inserted = state.doc.Range(start, end);
+  applyTextStyle(inserted, style);
+
+  state.length += normalized.length;
+  updateTrailingBreaks(state, normalized);
+}
+
+function ensureBreaks(state, count = 1) {
+  while (state.trailingBreaks < count) {
+    insertStyledText(state, "\r");
+  }
+}
+
+function trimTrailingBreaks(state, maxCount = 0) {
+  while (state.trailingBreaks > maxCount && state.length > 0) {
+    const start = state.anchor + state.length - 1;
+    state.doc.Range(start, start + 1).Text = "";
+    state.length -= 1;
+    state.trailingBreaks -= 1;
+  }
+}
+
+function renderInlineChildren(node, state, style) {
+  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
+    renderNode(child, state, style);
+  }
+}
+
+function renderListItem(node, state, marker) {
+  insertStyledText(state, marker);
+
+  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
+    if (child.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE && child.tagName === "P") {
+      renderInlineChildren(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    if (child.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE && /^(UL|OL)$/.test(child.tagName)) {
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+  }
+
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+}
+
+function renderBlock(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS, breaks = 2) {
+  renderInlineChildren(node, state, style);
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  ensureBreaks(state, breaks);
+}
+
+function renderNode(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
+  if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
+    const content = style.code
+      ? node.textContent ?? ""
+      : (node.textContent ?? "").replace(/\s+/g, " ");
+    insertStyledText(state, content, style);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  switch (node.tagName) {
+    case "STRONG":
+    case "B":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { bold: true }));
+      return;
+    case "EM":
+    case "I":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { italic: true }));
+      return;
+    case "A":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { underline: true }));
+      return;
+    case "CODE":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { code: true }));
+      return;
+    case "BR":
+      insertStyledText(state, "\r");
+      return;
+    case "P":
+      renderBlock(node, state, style);
+      return;
+    case "H1":
+    case "H2":
+    case "H3":
+    case "H4":
+    case "H5":
+    case "H6":
+      renderBlock(
+        node,
+        state,
+        mergeStyle(style, {
+          bold: true,
+          size: HEADING_SIZES[node.tagName]
+        })
+      );
+      return;
+    case "UL":
+      for (const item of Array.from(node.children)) {
+        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
+          renderListItem(item, state, "\u2022 ");
+        }
+      }
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    case "OL":
+      Array.from(node.children).forEach((item, index) => {
+        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
+          renderListItem(item, state, `${index + 1}. `);
+        }
+      });
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    case "BLOCKQUOTE": {
+      const text = (node.textContent ?? "").trim();
+      if (!text) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      for (const line of text.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+        insertStyledText(state, `| ${line.trim()}`, mergeStyle(style, { italic: true }));
+        ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      }
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    }
+    case "PRE": {
+      const text = (node.textContent ?? "").replace(/\n+$/, "");
+      if (!text) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      insertStyledText(
+        state,
+        text,
+        mergeStyle(style, {
+          code: true
+        })
+      );
+      ensureBreaks(state, 2);
+      return;
+    }
+    case "HR":
+      insertStyledText(state, "РћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђРћђ");
+      ensureBreaks(state, 2);
+      return;
+    default:
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, style);
+  }
+}
+
+function renderFormattedMarkdown(doc, anchor, markdown) {
+  const document = createMarkdownDocument(markdown);
+  const state = {
+    anchor,
+    doc,
+    length: 0,
+    trailingBreaks: 0
+  };
+
+  for (const child of Array.from(document.body.childNodes)) {
+    renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+  }
+
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  return state.length;
+}
+
+export function detectHostLabel() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return "WPS local";
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return "WPS host";
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return "WebOffice host";
+  }
+
+  return "Browser preview";
+}
+
+export function readSelectionText() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
+  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
+}
+
+export function hasWpsDocument() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
+}
+
+export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return {
+      locationLabel: "Preview only",
+      finish() {},
+      update() {},
+      cancel() {}
+    };
+  }
+
+  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
+  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
+
+  if (!selectionRange) {
+    throw new Error("Unable to access the current selection.");
+  }
+
+  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
+  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
+  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
+  const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;
+  let currentLength = 0;
+  let flushedMarkdown = "";
+  let pendingMarkdown = "";
+  let latestPlainText = "";
+  let flushTimer = null;
+  let flushing = false;
+
+  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
+    selectionRange.Text = "";
+  }
+
+  function replaceInsertedText(text) {
+    const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + currentLength);
+    target.Text = text;
+    currentLength = text.length;
+    latestPlainText = text;
+  }
+
+  async function flushNow() {
+    if (flushing || flushedMarkdown === pendingMarkdown) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    flushing = true;
+    try {
+      const nextMarkdown = pendingMarkdown;
+      const nextPlainText = markdownToPlainText(nextMarkdown);
+
+      if (nextPlainText !== latestPlainText) {
+        replaceInsertedText(nextPlainText);
+      }
+
+      flushedMarkdown = nextMarkdown;
+    } finally {
+      flushing = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    locationLabel: replaceSelection ? "Replace selection" : "Insert at cursor",
+    update(markdown) {
+      pendingMarkdown = markdown;
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
+        flushTimer = null;
+        void flushNow();
+      }, 120);
+    },
+    async finish(markdown = pendingMarkdown) {
+      pendingMarkdown = markdown;
+
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      await flushNow();
+
+      try {
+        const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + currentLength);
+        target.Text = "";
+        currentLength = 0;
+        latestPlainText = "";
+
+        if (String(markdown ?? "").trim()) {
+          currentLength = renderFormattedMarkdown(doc, anchor, markdown);
+        }
+      } catch {
+        const fallbackText = markdownToPlainText(markdown);
+        replaceInsertedText(fallbackText);
+      }
+    },
+    cancel() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      if (!latestPlainText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
+        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
+      }
+    }
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

+export const PROVIDERS = {
+  openrouter: {
+    id: "openrouter",
+    label: "OpenRouter",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
+  },
+  nvidia: {
+    id: "nvidia",
+    label: "NVIDIA Build",
+    defaultBaseUrl: "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1",
+    directBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
+    placeholderModel: "deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus"
+  }
+};
+
+export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
+  providerId: "openrouter",
+  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.openrouter.defaultBaseUrl,
+  apiKey: "",
+  model: "",
+  temperature: 0.5,
+  maxTokens: "",
+  systemPrompt:
+    "СйаТў» WPS ТќЄТАБтіЕТЅІсђѓУ»иуЏ┤ТјЦУЙЊтЄ║жђѓтљѕтєЎтЁЦТГБТќЄуџё Markdown тєЁт«╣сђѓжюђУдЂт╝║У░ЃТЌХСй┐ућетіау▓ЌТѕќТќюСйЊ№╝їу╗ЊТъёТИЁТЎ░№╝їжЂ┐тЁЇт»њТџётњїТЌатЁ│У»┤Тўјсђѓ",
+  referer: "https://localhost",
+  title: "WPS AI",
+  useSelectionAsContext: true,
+  replaceSelection: true
+};
+
+function normalizeMaxTokens(value) {
+  if (value === "" || value === null || value === undefined) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  if (value === 4096 || value === "4096") {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const parsed = Number(value);
+  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return String(Math.floor(parsed));
+}
+
+export function normalizeSettings(input) {
+  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };
+
+  if (
+    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
+    (!settings.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl === PROVIDERS.nvidia.directBaseUrl)
+  ) {
+    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
+  }
+
+  settings.maxTokens = normalizeMaxTokens(settings.maxTokens);
+  return settings;
+}
+
+function normalizeContent(content) {
+  if (typeof content === "string") {
+    return content;
+  }
+
+  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return content
+    .map((item) => {
+      if (typeof item === "string") {
+        return item;
+      }
+
+      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
+        return String(item.text ?? "");
+      }
+
+      return "";
+    })
+    .join("");
+}
+
+function extractChunk(payload) {
+  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
+  if (!choice) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return (
+    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
+    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
+    ""
+  );
+}
+
+async function buildError(response) {
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+
+  try {
+    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
+      const json = await response.json();
+      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
+    }
+
+    return await response.text();
+  } catch {
+    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
+  }
+}
+
+function createRequestBody(settings, messages) {
+  const payload = {
+    model: settings.model.trim(),
+    messages,
+    temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
+    stream: true
+  };
+
+  if (Number(settings.maxTokens) > 0) {
+    payload.max_tokens = Number(settings.maxTokens);
+  }
+
+  return payload;
+}
+
+function parseSseEvent(block) {
+  const data = block
+    .split(/\r?\n/)
+    .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
+    .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim())
+    .join("\n")
+    .trim();
+
+  if (!data || data === "[DONE]") {
+    return null;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    return JSON.parse(data);
+  } catch {
+    return null;
+  }
+}
+
+function getNvidiaConnectionError(settings) {
+  if (settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")) {
+    return "Тюгтю░ NVIDIA СИГУйгТюфУ┐ъТјЦсђѓУ»итЁѕУ┐љУАїРђютљ»тіеWPS AI.batРђЮ№╝їтєЇтЏътѕ░ WPS жЄЇУ»Ћсђѓ";
+  }
+
+  return "тйЊтЅЇ WPS тЅЇуФ»ТЌаТ│ЋуЏ┤ТјЦУ┐ъжђџ NVIDIAсђѓУ»иТћ╣ућеТюгтю░СИГУйгтю░тЮђ№╝џhttp://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1";
+}
+
+export function buildMessages({ prompt, selectionText, settings }) {
+  const selectionBlock =
+    settings.useSelectionAsContext && selectionText.trim()
+      ? [
+          "С╗ЦСИІтєЁт«╣Тў»ућеТѕитйЊтЅЇтюе WPS ТќЄТАБСИГжђЅСИГуџёТГБТќЄ№╝їУ»иСйюСИ║СИіСИІТќЄтЈѓУђЃ№╝їСИЇУдЂТю║Тб░жЄЇтцЇ№╝џ",
+          "",
+          "---- жђЅтї║т╝ђтДІ ----",
+          selectionText.trim(),
+          "---- жђЅтї║у╗ЊТЮЪ ----",
+          ""
+        ].join("\n")
+      : "";
+
+  return [
+    {
+      role: "system",
+      content: settings.systemPrompt.trim()
+    },
+    {
+      role: "user",
+      content: `${selectionBlock}${prompt.trim()}`
+    }
+  ];
+}
+
+export async function* streamCompletion({ settings, messages, signal }) {
+  const headers = {
+    "Content-Type": "application/json",
+    Authorization: `Bearer ${settings.apiKey.trim()}`
+  };
+
+  if (settings.providerId === "openrouter") {
+    headers["HTTP-Referer"] = settings.referer.trim() || "https://localhost";
+    headers["X-Title"] = settings.title.trim() || "WPS AI";
+  }
+
+  let response;
+  try {
+    response = await fetch(`${settings.baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/chat/completions`, {
+      method: "POST",
+      headers,
+      body: JSON.stringify(createRequestBody(settings, messages)),
+      signal
+    });
+  } catch (error) {
+    if (settings.providerId === "nvidia") {
+      throw new Error(getNvidiaConnectionError(settings));
+    }
+
+    throw error;
+  }
+
+  if (!response.ok) {
+    throw new Error(await buildError(response));
+  }
+
+  if (!response.body) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
+  if (!contentType.includes("text/event-stream")) {
+    const json = await response.json();
+    const fallbackText = extractChunk(json);
+    if (fallbackText) {
+      yield fallbackText;
+    }
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const reader = response.body.getReader();
+  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
+  let buffer = "";
+
+  while (true) {
+    const { value, done } = await reader.read();
+
+    if (done) {
+      buffer += decoder.decode();
+      break;
+    }
+
+    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
+    const parts = buffer.split(/\r?\n\r?\n/);
+    buffer = parts.pop() ?? "";
+
+    for (const part of parts) {
+      const payload = parseSseEvent(part);
+      const text = extractChunk(payload);
+      if (text) {
+        yield text;
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (!buffer.trim()) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const payload = parseSseEvent(buffer);
+  const text = extractChunk(payload);
+  if (text) {
+    yield text;
+  }
+}
```
</details></tool-use>
