```diff
+import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  normalizeSettings,
+  streamCompletion
+} from "./ai";
+import { renderMarkdownHtml } from "./markdown";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+function createMessageId() {
+  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+function Icon({ name }) {
+  const common = {
+    width: 18,
+    height: 18,
+    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
+    fill: "none",
+    xmlns: "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
+    stroke: "currentColor",
+    strokeWidth: 1.8,
+    strokeLinecap: "round",
+    strokeLinejoin: "round"
+  };
+
+  switch (name) {
+    case "settings":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M12 3L13.4 5.7L16.4 6.1L14.2 8.2L14.7 11.2L12 9.8L9.3 11.2L9.8 8.2L7.6 6.1L10.6 5.7L12 3Z" />
+          <path d="M4 14.5L5.8 14.8L6.7 16.4L5.6 17.9L6.8 19.2L8.3 18.1L9.9 19L10.2 20.8H12" />
+          <path d="M20 14.5L18.2 14.8L17.3 16.4L18.4 17.9L17.2 19.2L15.7 18.1L14.1 19L13.8 20.8H12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "context":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="3" />
+          <path d="M8 9H16" />
+          <path d="M8 12H16" />
+          <path d="M8 15H13" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "clear":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M5 7H19" />
+          <path d="M9 7V5.5C9 4.7 9.7 4 10.5 4H13.5C14.3 4 15 4.7 15 5.5V7" />
+          <path d="M8 10V17" />
+          <path d="M12 10V17" />
+          <path d="M16 10V17" />
+          <path d="M6.5 7L7.2 18.2C7.3 19.2 8.1 20 9.1 20H14.9C15.9 20 16.7 19.2 16.8 18.2L17.5 7" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "send":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 4L11 13" />
+          <path d="M20 4L14 20L11 13L4 10L20 4Z" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "stop":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="6" y="6" width="12" height="12" rx="2" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "close":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M6 6L18 18" />
+          <path d="M18 6L6 18" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "provider":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <ellipse cx="12" cy="6" rx="6.5" ry="2.8" />
+          <path d="M5.5 6V12C5.5 13.5 8.4 14.8 12 14.8C15.6 14.8 18.5 13.5 18.5 12V6" />
+          <path d="M5.5 12V18C5.5 19.5 8.4 20.8 12 20.8C15.6 20.8 18.5 19.5 18.5 18V12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "refresh":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 11A8 8 0 1 0 17.7 16.7" />
+          <path d="M20 5V11H14" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    default:
+      return null;
+  }
+}
+
+function AssistantMessage({ content, streaming }) {
+  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(content);
+
+  if (!html) {
+    return <div className="bubble-placeholder">{streaming ? "..." : ""}</div>;
+  }
+
+  return <div className="bubble-markdown" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }} />;
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    normalizeSettings(loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS))
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() => loadStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, ""));
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
+  const [showContext, setShowContext] = useState(false);
+
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+  const promptRef = useRef(null);
+  const threadRef = useRef(null);
+  const shouldStickToBottomRef = useRef(true);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const textarea = promptRef.current;
+    if (!textarea) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    textarea.style.height = "0px";
+    textarea.style.height = `${Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 220)}px`;
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const thread = threadRef.current;
+    if (!thread || !shouldStickToBottomRef.current) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    thread.scrollTop = thread.scrollHeight;
+  }, [messages]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showSettings && !showContext) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    function onKeyDown(event) {
+      if (event.key === "Escape") {
+        setShowSettings(false);
+        setShowContext(false);
+      }
+    }
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+  }, [showContext, showSettings]);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => normalizeSettings({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) =>
+      normalizeSettings({
+        ...current,
+        providerId,
+        baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+      })
+    );
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+      setError("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setError(caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "У»╗тЈќжђЅтї║тц▒У┤Цсђѓ");
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handleThreadScroll() {
+    const thread = threadRef.current;
+    if (!thread) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const distanceToBottom =
+      thread.scrollHeight - thread.scrollTop - thread.clientHeight;
+    shouldStickToBottomRef.current = distanceToBottom < 40;
+  }
+
+  function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    const trimmedPrompt = prompt.trim();
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎ API Keyсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("У»итЁѕтАФтєЎТеАтъІ IDсђѓ");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!trimmedPrompt) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    const userMessageId = createMessageId();
+    const assistantMessageId = createMessageId();
+
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    shouldStickToBottomRef.current = true;
+
+    setMessages((current) => [
+      ...current,
+      { id: userMessageId, role: "user", content: trimmedPrompt },
+      { id: assistantMessageId, role: "assistant", content: "", streaming: true }
+    ]);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt: trimmedPrompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        writer.update(aggregate);
+
+        startTransition(() => {
+          setMessages((current) =>
+            current.map((message) =>
+              message.id === assistantMessageId
+                ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: true }
+                : message
+            )
+          );
+        });
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish(aggregate);
+      setMessages((current) =>
+        current.map((message) =>
+          message.id === assistantMessageId
+            ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: false }
+            : message
+        )
+      );
+      setPrompt("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        writer.cancel();
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((message) =>
+            message.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? { ...message, streaming: false }
+              : message
+          )
+        );
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "ућЪТѕљтц▒У┤Цсђѓ";
+        setError(message);
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((entry) =>
+            entry.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? {
+                  ...entry,
+                  content: entry.content || "У»иТ▒ѓтц▒У┤Ц",
+                  streaming: false,
+                  error: true
+                }
+              : entry
+          )
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handlePromptKeyDown(event) {
+    if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (!isGenerating) {
+        void handleGenerate();
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  function clearConversation() {
+    if (isGenerating) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setMessages([]);
+    setError("");
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <main className="minimal-shell">
+        <header className="minimal-toolbar">
+          <div className="toolbar-group">
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+              aria-label="Context"
+              title="Context"
+            >
+              <Icon name="context" />
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+              aria-label="Settings"
+              title="Settings"
+            >
+              <Icon name="settings" />
+            </button>
+          </div>
+
+          <button
+            className="icon-button"
+            type="button"
+            onClick={clearConversation}
+            disabled={isGenerating || messages.length === 0}
+            aria-label="Clear"
+            title="Clear"
+          >
+            <Icon name="clear" />
+          </button>
+        </header>
+
+        <section className="minimal-thread">
+          <div
+            ref={threadRef}
+            className="message-list"
+            onScroll={handleThreadScroll}
+          >
+            {messages.map((message) => (
+              <article
+                key={message.id}
+                className={`bubble-row ${message.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant"}`}
+              >
+                <div className={`bubble ${message.error ? "error" : ""}`}>
+                  {message.role === "assistant" && !message.error ? (
+                    <AssistantMessage
+                      content={message.content}
+                      streaming={message.streaming}
+                    />
+                  ) : (
+                    <div className="bubble-plain">
+                      {message.content || (message.streaming ? "..." : "")}
+                    </div>
+                  )}
+                </div>
+              </article>
+            ))}
+          </div>
+        </section>
+
+        <footer className="minimal-composer">
+          {error ? <div className="tiny-error">{error}</div> : null}
+
+          <div className="composer-card">
+            <textarea
+              ref={promptRef}
+              value={prompt}
+              rows="1"
+              onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+              onKeyDown={handlePromptKeyDown}
+              placeholder=""
+            />
+
+            <div className="composer-actions">
+              {isGenerating ? (
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button ghost"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={stopGeneration}
+                  aria-label="Stop"
+                  title="Stop"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="stop" />
+                </button>
+              ) : null}
+              <button
+                className="icon-button primary"
+                type="button"
+                disabled={isGenerating || !prompt.trim()}
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                aria-label="Send"
+                title="Send"
+              >
+                <Icon name="send" />
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </footer>
+      </main>
+
+      {showSettings ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="provider" />
+                </span>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}
+                aria-label="Close settings"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="provider-switch">
+              {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (
+                <button
+                  key={provider.id}
+                  type="button"
+                  className={`provider-chip ${
+                    settings.providerId === provider.id ? "active" : ""
+                  }`}
+                  onClick={() => switchProvider(provider.id)}
+                >
+                  {provider.label}
+                </button>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="field-grid">
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="API Key"
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder={placeholderModel(settings.providerId) || "Model"}
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="Base URL"
+              />
+            </div>
+
+            <details className="details-panel">
+              <summary>Advanced</summary>
+              <div className="field-grid advanced">
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"
+                  step="0.1"
+                  value={settings.temperature}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Temperature"
+                />
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("maxTokens", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Max Tokens (auto)"
+                />
+                <textarea
+                  rows="4"
+                  value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                  placeholder="System Prompt"
+                />
+                {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+                  <>
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.referer}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="HTTP-Referer"
+                    />
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.title}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("title", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="X-Title"
+                    />
+                  </>
+                ) : null}
+              </div>
+            </details>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      {showContext ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="context" />
+                </span>
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={refreshSelection}
+                  aria-label="Refresh selection"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="refresh" />
+                </button>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}
+                aria-label="Close context"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="toggle-stack">
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Use selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Replace selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="selection-box">{selectionText || ""}</pre>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+    </>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+:root {
+  color-scheme: light;
+  --bg: #ffffff;
+  --panel: #ffffff;
+  --surface: #fafafa;
+  --surface-strong: #f4f4f4;
+  --line: #ececec;
+  --line-strong: #d8d8d8;
+  --text: #171717;
+  --muted: #737373;
+  --accent: #111111;
+  --danger: #b42318;
+  --shadow: 0 18px 46px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
+  --radius-lg: 24px;
+  --radius-md: 18px;
+  --radius-sm: 14px;
+  --font-ui: "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Bahnschrift", "Microsoft YaHei",
+    sans-serif;
+}
+
+* {
+  box-sizing: border-box;
+}
+
+html,
+body,
+#root {
+  height: 100%;
+}
+
+body {
+  margin: 0;
+  overflow: hidden;
+  color: var(--text);
+  font-family: var(--font-ui);
+  font-size: 13px;
+  background:
+    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03), transparent 38%),
+    linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #fbfbfb 100%);
+}
+
+button,
+input,
+textarea,
+select {
+  font: inherit;
+}
+
+button {
+  padding: 0;
+  background: none;
+}
+
+.minimal-shell {
+  width: min(840px, 100%);
+  height: 100vh;
+  margin: 0 auto;
+  padding: 14px;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 14px;
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.minimal-toolbar {
+  flex: 0 0 auto;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.toolbar-group {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.icon-button {
+  width: 38px;
+  height: 38px;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
+  cursor: pointer;
+  transition:
+    transform 140ms ease,
+    border-color 140ms ease,
+    background-color 140ms ease,
+    opacity 140ms ease,
+    box-shadow 140ms ease;
+}
+
+.icon-button:hover {
+  transform: translateY(-1px);
+  border-color: var(--line-strong);
+  background: #fff;
+  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
+}
+
+.icon-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.34;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+  transform: none;
+  box-shadow: none;
+}
+
+.icon-button.primary {
+  color: #fff;
+  border-color: #111;
+  background: #111;
+}
+
+.icon-button.primary:hover {
+  background: #1a1a1a;
+  border-color: #1a1a1a;
+}
+
+.icon-button.ghost {
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.minimal-thread {
+  flex: 1 1 auto;
+  min-height: 0;
+  overflow: hidden;
+}
+
+.message-list {
+  height: 100%;
+  min-height: 0;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 2px 2px 6px;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+  overscroll-behavior: contain;
+  scrollbar-gutter: stable;
+}
+
+.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar,
+.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar,
+.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar,
+.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar {
+  width: 8px;
+}
+
+.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
+.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
+.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
+.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: #d8d8d8;
+}
+
+.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
+.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
+.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
+.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
+  background: transparent;
+}
+
+.bubble-row {
+  display: flex;
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user {
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+}
+
+.bubble {
+  max-width: min(100%, 680px);
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
+  line-height: 1.68;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03);
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user .bubble {
+  background: #111;
+  border-color: #111;
+  color: #fff;
+}
+
+.bubble.error {
+  color: var(--danger);
+  border-color: #f2d1cc;
+  background: #fff7f6;
+}
+
+.bubble-plain {
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.bubble-placeholder {
+  min-height: 20px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown {
+  color: inherit;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown > :first-child {
+  margin-top: 0;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown > :last-child {
+  margin-bottom: 0;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown p,
+.bubble-markdown ul,
+.bubble-markdown ol,
+.bubble-markdown pre,
+.bubble-markdown blockquote,
+.bubble-markdown table,
+.bubble-markdown hr {
+  margin: 0 0 0.82em;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown h1,
+.bubble-markdown h2,
+.bubble-markdown h3,
+.bubble-markdown h4,
+.bubble-markdown h5,
+.bubble-markdown h6 {
+  margin: 0 0 0.7em;
+  line-height: 1.35;
+  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown h1 {
+  font-size: 16px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown h2 {
+  font-size: 15px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown h3,
+.bubble-markdown h4,
+.bubble-markdown h5,
+.bubble-markdown h6 {
+  font-size: 14px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown ul,
+.bubble-markdown ol {
+  padding-left: 1.2em;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown li + li {
+  margin-top: 0.28em;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown a {
+  color: inherit;
+  text-decoration-thickness: 1px;
+  text-underline-offset: 2px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown blockquote {
+  padding: 0.1em 0 0.1em 0.9em;
+  border-left: 2px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.14);
+  color: var(--muted);
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown code {
+  padding: 0.12em 0.42em;
+  border-radius: 8px;
+  background: var(--surface-strong);
+  font-family: "Cascadia Code", Consolas, monospace;
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown pre {
+  overflow-x: auto;
+  padding: 10px 12px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  background: var(--surface);
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown pre code {
+  padding: 0;
+  background: transparent;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown hr {
+  height: 1px;
+  border: 0;
+  background: var(--line);
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown table {
+  width: 100%;
+  border-collapse: collapse;
+}
+
+.bubble-markdown th,
+.bubble-markdown td {
+  padding: 7px 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  text-align: left;
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user .bubble-markdown blockquote,
+.bubble-row.user .bubble-markdown code {
+  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
+}
+
+.bubble-row.user .bubble-markdown code,
+.bubble-row.user .bubble-markdown pre {
+  border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
+}
+
+.minimal-composer {
+  flex: 0 0 auto;
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.tiny-error {
+  padding: 9px 11px;
+  border: 1px solid #f2d1cc;
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  color: var(--danger);
+  background: #fff7f6;
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.composer-card {
+  display: flex;
+  flex-direction: column;
+  gap: 8px;
+  padding: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 22px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
+  box-shadow: var(--shadow);
+}
+
+.composer-card textarea,
+.field-grid input,
+.field-grid textarea {
+  width: 100%;
+  color: var(--text);
+  border: 0;
+  outline: none;
+  background: transparent;
+}
+
+.composer-card textarea {
+  min-height: 22px;
+  max-height: 220px;
+  resize: none;
+  padding: 2px 6px;
+  line-height: 1.58;
+  overflow-y: auto;
+}
+
+.composer-actions {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: flex-end;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.modal-backdrop {
+  position: fixed;
+  inset: 0;
+  z-index: 40;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  padding: 18px;
+  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
+  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
+}
+
+.modal-card {
+  width: min(560px, 100%);
+  max-height: min(88vh, 820px);
+  overflow: auto;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 28px;
+  background: #fff;
+  box-shadow: 0 22px 58px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.09);
+}
+
+.modal-card.compact {
+  padding: 14px;
+}
+
+.modal-toolbar {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  margin-bottom: 14px;
+}
+
+.modal-icons {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.icon-badge {
+  width: 38px;
+  height: 38px;
+  display: grid;
+  place-items: center;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  color: var(--text);
+}
+
+.provider-switch {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  margin-bottom: 12px;
+}
+
+.provider-chip {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-height: 40px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: #fff;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.provider-chip.active {
+  border-color: #111;
+  background: #111;
+  color: #fff;
+}
+
+.field-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.field-grid input,
+.field-grid textarea {
+  min-height: 44px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.field-grid textarea {
+  min-height: 110px;
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  resize: vertical;
+}
+
+.field-grid input:focus,
+.field-grid textarea:focus {
+  border-color: var(--line-strong);
+}
+
+.details-panel {
+  margin-top: 10px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 20px;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.details-panel summary {
+  min-height: 44px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  cursor: pointer;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  list-style: none;
+}
+
+.details-panel summary::-webkit-details-marker {
+  display: none;
+}
+
+.details-panel[open] summary {
+  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
+}
+
+.details-panel .advanced {
+  padding: 12px;
+}
+
+.toggle-stack {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+}
+
+.toggle-item {
+  min-height: 50px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+}
+
+.toggle-item span {
+  color: var(--text);
+}
+
+.toggle-item input {
+  width: 18px;
+  height: 18px;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.selection-box {
+  min-height: 160px;
+  max-height: 42vh;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+  padding: 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  background: var(--surface);
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  word-break: break-word;
+  line-height: 1.6;
+  overflow: auto;
+}
+
+@media (max-width: 720px) {
+  .minimal-shell {
+    padding: 10px;
+    gap: 10px;
+  }
+
+  .modal-backdrop {
+    padding: 12px;
+  }
+
+  .modal-card {
+    width: 100%;
+  }
+
+  .provider-switch {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .bubble {
+    max-width: 100%;
+  }
+}
```

1:import DOMPurify from "dompurify";
2:import { marked } from "marked";
3:
4:marked.setOptions({
5:  async: false,
6:  breaks: true,
7:  gfm: true
8:});
9:
10:function normalizeMarkdown(markdown) {
11:  return String(markdown ?? "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n");
12:}
13:
14:export function renderMarkdownHtml(markdown) {
15:  const source = normalizeMarkdown(markdown).trim();
16:  if (!source) {
17:    return "";
18:  }
19:
20:  const rawHtml = marked.parse(source);
21:  return DOMPurify.sanitize(rawHtml, {
22:    USE_PROFILES: { html: true }
23:  });
24:}
25:
26:export function createMarkdownDocument(markdown) {
27:  const parser = new DOMParser();
28:  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(markdown);
29:  return parser.parseFromString(html || "<p></p>", "text/html");
30:}
31:
32:export function markdownToPlainText(markdown) {
33:  return normalizeMarkdown(markdown)
34:    .replace(/```[^\n]*\n?/g, "")
35:    .replace(/```/g, "")
36:    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "$1")
37:    .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
38:    .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
39:    .replace(/^>\s?/gm, "")
40:    .replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm, "")
41:    .replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/gm, "\u2022 ")
42:    .replace(/^(\s*)\d+\.\s+/gm, (_, indent) => `${indent}1. `)
43:    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "$1")
44:    .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, "$1")
45:    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, "$1")
46:    .replace(/_([^_]+)_/g, "$1")
47:    .replace(/~~([^~]+)~~/g, "$1")
48:    .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
49:    .trim();
50:}
```

```diff
+import { createMarkdownDocument, markdownToPlainText } from "./markdown";
+
+const HEADING_SIZES = {
+  H1: 18,
+  H2: 16,
+  H3: 15,
+  H4: 14,
+  H5: 13,
+  H6: 13
+};
+
+const INLINE_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
+  bold: false,
+  code: false,
+  italic: false,
+  size: null,
+  underline: false
+});
+
+function getApplication() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return window.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return window.wps.Application;
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return window.instance.Application;
+  }
+
+  return null;
+}
+
+function getSelectionRange(app) {
+  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
+}
+
+function mergeStyle(baseStyle, patch) {
+  return { ...baseStyle, ...patch };
+}
+
+function applyTextStyle(range, style) {
+  const font = range.Font;
+
+  font.Bold = style.bold ? 1 : 0;
+  font.Italic = style.italic ? 1 : 0;
+
+  if (style.size) {
+    font.Size = style.size;
+  }
+
+  if (style.code) {
+    font.Name = "Consolas";
+    font.NameAscii = "Consolas";
+  }
+
+  if ("underline" in style) {
+    range.Underline = style.underline ? 1 : 0;
+  }
+}
+
+function updateTrailingBreaks(state, text) {
+  const match = text.match(/\r+$/);
+  state.trailingBreaks = match ? match[0].length : 0;
+}
+
+function insertStyledText(state, text, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
+  const normalized = String(text ?? "").replace(/\r?\n/g, "\r");
+  if (!normalized) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const start = state.anchor + state.length;
+  state.doc.Range(start, start).InsertAfter(normalized);
+
+  const end = start + normalized.length;
+  const inserted = state.doc.Range(start, end);
+  applyTextStyle(inserted, style);
+
+  state.length += normalized.length;
+  updateTrailingBreaks(state, normalized);
+}
+
+function ensureBreaks(state, count = 1) {
+  while (state.trailingBreaks < count) {
+    insertStyledText(state, "\r");
+  }
+}
+
+function trimTrailingBreaks(state, maxCount = 0) {
+  while (state.trailingBreaks > maxCount && state.length > 0) {
+    const start = state.anchor + state.length - 1;
+    state.doc.Range(start, start + 1).Text = "";
+    state.length -= 1;
+    state.trailingBreaks -= 1;
+  }
+}
+
+function renderInlineChildren(node, state, style) {
+  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
+    renderNode(child, state, style);
+  }
+}
+
+function renderListItem(node, state, marker) {
+  insertStyledText(state, marker);
+
+  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
+    if (child.nodeType === 1 && child.tagName === "P") {
+      renderInlineChildren(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    if (child.nodeType === 1 && /^(UL|OL)$/.test(child.tagName)) {
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+      continue;
+    }
+
+    renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+  }
+
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+}
+
+function renderBlock(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS, breaks = 2) {
+  renderInlineChildren(node, state, style);
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  ensureBreaks(state, breaks);
+}
+
+function renderNode(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
+  if (node.nodeType === 3) {
+    const content = style.code
+      ? node.textContent ?? ""
+      : (node.textContent ?? "").replace(/\s+/g, " ");
+    insertStyledText(state, content, style);
+    return;
+  }
+
+  if (node.nodeType !== 1) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  switch (node.tagName) {
+    case "STRONG":
+    case "B":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { bold: true }));
+      return;
+    case "EM":
+    case "I":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { italic: true }));
+      return;
+    case "A":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { underline: true }));
+      return;
+    case "CODE":
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { code: true }));
+      return;
+    case "BR":
+      insertStyledText(state, "\r");
+      return;
+    case "P":
+      renderBlock(node, state, style);
+      return;
+    case "H1":
+    case "H2":
+    case "H3":
+    case "H4":
+    case "H5":
+    case "H6":
+      renderBlock(
+        node,
+        state,
+        mergeStyle(style, {
+          bold: true,
+          size: HEADING_SIZES[node.tagName]
+        })
+      );
+      return;
+    case "UL":
+      for (const item of Array.from(node.children)) {
+        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
+          renderListItem(item, state, "\u2022 ");
+        }
+      }
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    case "OL":
+      Array.from(node.children).forEach((item, index) => {
+        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
+          renderListItem(item, state, `${index + 1}. `);
+        }
+      });
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    case "BLOCKQUOTE": {
+      const text = (node.textContent ?? "").trim();
+      if (!text) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      for (const line of text.split(/\r?\n/)) {
+        insertStyledText(
+          state,
+          `| ${line.trim()}`,
+          mergeStyle(style, { italic: true })
+        );
+        ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      }
+      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
+      return;
+    }
+    case "PRE": {
+      const text = (node.textContent ?? "").replace(/\n+$/, "");
+      if (!text) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      insertStyledText(
+        state,
+        text,
+        mergeStyle(style, {
+          code: true
+        })
+      );
+      ensureBreaks(state, 2);
+      return;
+    }
+    case "HR":
+      insertStyledText(state, "----------------");
+      ensureBreaks(state, 2);
+      return;
+    default:
+      renderInlineChildren(node, state, style);
+  }
+}
+
+function renderFormattedMarkdown(doc, anchor, markdown) {
+  const document = createMarkdownDocument(markdown);
+  const state = {
+    anchor,
+    doc,
+    length: 0,
+    trailingBreaks: 0
+  };
+
+  for (const child of Array.from(document.body.childNodes)) {
+    renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
+  }
+
+  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
+  return state.length;
+}
+
+export function detectHostLabel() {
+  if (window.Application) {
+    return "WPS local";
+  }
+
+  if (window.wps?.Application) {
+    return "WPS host";
+  }
+
+  if (window.instance?.Application) {
+    return "WebOffice host";
+  }
+
+  return "Browser preview";
+}
+
+export function readSelectionText() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  const range = getSelectionRange(app);
+  return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";
+}
+
+export function hasWpsDocument() {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  return Boolean(app?.ActiveDocument);
+}
+
+export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
+  const app = getApplication();
+  if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
+    return {
+      locationLabel: "Preview only",
+      finish() {},
+      update() {},
+      cancel() {}
+    };
+  }
+
+  const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
+  const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
+
+  if (!selectionRange) {
+    throw new Error("Unable to access the current selection.");
+  }
+
+  const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
+  const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
+  const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
+  const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;
+  let currentLength = 0;
+  let flushedMarkdown = "";
+  let pendingMarkdown = "";
+  let latestPlainText = "";
+  let flushTimer = null;
+  let flushing = false;
+
+  if (replaceSelection && end > start) {
+    selectionRange.Text = "";
+  }
+
+  function replaceInsertedText(text) {
+    const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + currentLength);
+    target.Text = text;
+    currentLength = text.length;
+    latestPlainText = text;
+  }
+
+  async function flushNow() {
+    if (flushing || flushedMarkdown === pendingMarkdown) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    flushing = true;
+    try {
+      const nextMarkdown = pendingMarkdown;
+      const nextPlainText = markdownToPlainText(nextMarkdown);
+
+      if (nextPlainText !== latestPlainText) {
+        replaceInsertedText(nextPlainText);
+      }
+
+      flushedMarkdown = nextMarkdown;
+    } finally {
+      flushing = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    locationLabel: replaceSelection ? "Replace selection" : "Insert at cursor",
+    update(markdown) {
+      pendingMarkdown = markdown;
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      flushTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
+        flushTimer = null;
+        void flushNow();
+      }, 120);
+    },
+    async finish(markdown = pendingMarkdown) {
+      pendingMarkdown = markdown;
+
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      await flushNow();
+
+      try {
+        const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + currentLength);
+        target.Text = "";
+        currentLength = 0;
+        latestPlainText = "";
+
+        if (String(markdown ?? "").trim()) {
+          currentLength = renderFormattedMarkdown(doc, anchor, markdown);
+        }
+      } catch {
+        const fallbackText = markdownToPlainText(markdown);
+        replaceInsertedText(fallbackText);
+      }
+    },
+    cancel() {
+      if (flushTimer !== null) {
+        window.clearTimeout(flushTimer);
+        flushTimer = null;
+      }
+
+      if (!latestPlainText && replaceSelection && originalText) {
+        doc.Range(anchor, anchor).Text = originalText;
+      }
+    }
+  };
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

29:  replaceSelection: true
30:};
31:
32:function normalizeMaxTokens(value) {
33:  if (value === "" || value === null || value === undefined) {
34:    return "";
35:  }
36:
37:  if (value === 4096 || value === "4096") {
38:    return "";
39:  }
40:
41:  const parsed = Number(value);
42:  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
43:    return "";
44:  }
45:
46:  return String(Math.floor(parsed));
47:}
48:
49:export function normalizeSettings(input) {
50:  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };
51:
52:  if (
53:    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
54:    (!settings.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl === PROVIDERS.nvidia.directBaseUrl)
55:  ) {
56:    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
57:  }
58:
59:  settings.maxTokens = normalizeMaxTokens(settings.maxTokens);
60:  return settings;
61:}
62:
63:function normalizeContent(content) {
64:  if (typeof content === "string") {
65:    return content;
66:  }
67:
68:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
69:    return "";
70:  }
71:
72:  return content
73:    .map((item) => {
74:      if (typeof item === "string") {
75:        return item;
76:      }
77:
78:      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
79:        return String(item.text ?? "");
80:      }
81:
82:      return "";
83:    })
84:    .join("");
85:}
86:
87:function extractChunk(payload) {
88:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
89:  if (!choice) {
90:    return "";
91:  }
92:
93:  return (
94:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
95:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
96:    ""
97:  );
98:}
99:
100:async function buildError(response) {
101:  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
102:
103:  try {
104:    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
105:      const json = await response.json();
106:      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
107:    }
108:
109:    return await response.text();
110:  } catch {
111:    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
112:  }
113:}
114:
115:function createRequestBody(settings, messages) {
116:  const payload = {
117:    model: settings.model.trim(),
118:    messages,
119:    temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
120:    stream: true
121:  };
122:
123:  if (Number(settings.maxTokens) > 0) {
124:    payload.max_tokens = Number(settings.maxTokens);
125:  }
126:
127:  return payload;
128:}
129:
130:function parseSseEvent(block) {
131:  const data = block
132:    .split(/\r?\n/)
133:    .filter((line) => line.startsWith("data:"))
134:    .map((line) => line.slice(5).trim())
135:    .join("\n")
136:    .trim();
137:
138:  if (!data || data === "[DONE]") {
139:    return null;
140:  }
141:
142:  try {
143:    return JSON.parse(data);
144:  } catch {
145:    return null;
146:  }
147:}

1:import DOMPurify from "dompurify";
2:import { marked } from "marked";
3:
4:marked.setOptions({
5:  async: false,
6:  breaks: true,
7:  gfm: true
8:});
9:
10:function normalizeMarkdown(markdown) {
11:  return String(markdown ?? "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n");
12:}
13:
14:export function renderMarkdownHtml(markdown) {
15:  const source = normalizeMarkdown(markdown).trim();
16:  if (!source) {
17:    return "";
18:  }
19:
20:  const rawHtml = marked.parse(source);
21:  return DOMPurify.sanitize(rawHtml, {
22:    USE_PROFILES: { html: true }
23:  });
24:}
25:
26:export function createMarkdownDocument(markdown) {
27:  const parser = new DOMParser();
28:  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(markdown);
29:  return parser.parseFromString(html || "<p></p>", "text/html");
30:}
31:
32:export function markdownToPlainText(markdown) {
33:  return normalizeMarkdown(markdown)
34:    .replace(/```[^\n]*\n?/g, "")
35:    .replace(/```/g, "")
36:    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "$1")
37:    .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
38:    .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
39:    .replace(/^>\s?/gm, "")
40:    .replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm, "")
41:    .replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/gm, "\u2022 ")
42:    .replace(/^(\s*)\d+\.\s+/gm, (_, indent) => `${indent}1. `)
43:    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "$1")
44:    .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, "$1")
45:    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, "$1")
46:    .replace(/_([^_]+)_/g, "$1")
47:    .replace(/~~([^~]+)~~/g, "$1")
48:    .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
49:    .trim();
50:}
```

const STORAGE_KEY = "wps_ai_taskpane_id";

function getDockRightValue() {
  if (window.Application?.Enum?.msoCTPDockPositionRight !== undefined) {
    return window.Application.Enum.msoCTPDockPositionRight;
  }

  return 2;
}

function getTaskPaneUrl() {
  return new URL("./taskpane.html", window.location.href).href;
}

function ensureTaskPane() {
  const storage = window.Application.PluginStorage;
  const existingId = storage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);

  if (existingId) {
    try {
      const existing = window.Application.GetTaskPane(existingId);
      if (existing) {
        return existing;
      }
    } catch {
      storage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    }
  }

  const taskPane = window.Application.CreateTaskPane(getTaskPaneUrl());
  storage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, taskPane.ID);
  taskPane.DockPosition = getDockRightValue();
  return taskPane;
}

const ribbon = {
  OnAddinLoad(ribbonUI) {
    if (typeof window.Application.ribbonUI !== "object") {
      window.Application.ribbonUI = ribbonUI;
    }

    return true;
  },

  OnAction(control) {
    const doc = window.Application?.ActiveDocument;
    if (!doc) {
      alert("Уц░Тњ│тбатеїРёЃТ╣ЂжјхТњ│у┤ЉТхаУ«│уХЇжЈѓтЏДуЊДжЈѓтЏесђѓжіє?);
      return true;
    }

    const taskPane = ensureTaskPane();

    switch (control.Id) {
      case "btnToggleTaskPane":
        taskPane.Visible = !taskPane.Visible;
        break;
      case "btnFocusTaskPane":
        taskPane.Visible = true;
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }

    return true;
  },

  GetImage(control) {
    if (control.Id === "btnFocusTaskPane") {
      return "images/ai-stream.svg";
    }

    return "images/ai-pane.svg";
  },

  OnGetEnabled() {
    return Boolean(window.Application?.ActiveDocument);
  }
};

export default ribbon;
```
</details></tool-use>

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 4 seconds
Output:
import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import { createServer } from "node:http";

const PORT = 3888;
const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";

function setCorsHeaders(res) {
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "GET,POST,OPTIONS");
  res.setHeader("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "authorization,content-type");
}

function sendJson(res, statusCode, payload) {
  setCorsHeaders(res);
  res.writeHead(statusCode, { "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" });
  res.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
}

async function readJsonBody(req) {
  const chunks = [];
  for await (const chunk of req) {
    chunks.push(chunk);
  }

  const raw = Buffer.concat(chunks).toString("utf8");
  if (!raw) {
    return {};
  }

  return JSON.parse(raw);
}

function formatCurlFailure(stderr) {
  const message = stderr.trim();
  if (!message) {
    return "Failed to reach NVIDIA upstream";
  }

  return message.replace(/^curl:\s*/i, "");
}

function createCurlArgs(authorization) {
  return [
    "-sS",
    "-N",
    "-f",
    "-X",
    "POST",
    "-H",
    `Authorization: ${authorization}`,
    "-H",
    "Content-Type: application/json",
    "--data-binary",
    "@-",
    NVIDIA_UPSTREAM
  ];
}

async function handleNvidiaChat(req, res) {
  const authorization = req.headers.authorization;
  if (!authorization) {
    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Missing Authorization header"
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  let body;
  try {
    body = await readJsonBody(req);
  } catch {
    sendJson(res, 400, {
      error: {
        message: "Invalid JSON body"
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
    stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
    windowsHide: true
  });

  let stderr = "";
  let streamStarted = false;
  let finished = false;

  function fail(message) {
    if (finished) {
      return;
    }

    finished = true;
    if (!res.headersSent) {
      sendJson(res, 502, { error: { message } });
      return;
    }

    res.end();
  }

  curl.on("error", (error) => {
    fail(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to start curl");
  });

  curl.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => {
    stderr += chunk.toString("utf8");
  });

  curl.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => {
    if (finished) {
      return;
    }

    if (!streamStarted) {
      setCorsHeaders(res);
      res.writeHead(200, {
        "Content-Type": "text/event-stream; charset=utf-8",
        "Cache-Control": "no-cache"
      });
      streamStarted = true;
    }

    res.write(chunk);
  });

  curl.stdout.on("end", () => {
    if (finished) {
      return;
    }

    finished = true;
    res.end();
  });

  curl.on("close", (code) => {
    if (finished) {
      return;
    }

    if (!streamStarted) {
      fail(formatCurlFailure(stderr || `curl exited with code ${code ?? "unknown"}`));
      return;
    }

    finished = true;
    res.end();
  });

  req.on("aborted", () => {
    if (!finished) {
      curl.kill();
    }
  });

  curl.stdin.end(JSON.stringify(body));
}

const server = createServer(async (req, res) => {
  if (!req.url) {
    sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "OPTIONS") {
    setCorsHeaders(res);
    res.writeHead(204);
    res.end();
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "GET" && req.url === "/health") {
    sendJson(res, 200, {
      ok: true,
      provider: "nvidia-relay",
      transport: "curl"
    });
    return;
  }

  if (req.method === "POST" && req.url === "/nvidia/v1/chat/completions") {
    await handleNvidiaChat(req, res);
    return;
  }

  sendJson(res, 404, { error: { message: "Not found" } });
});

server.listen(PORT, "127.0.0.1", () => {
  console.log(`WPS AI relay listening on http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`);
});
```
</details></tool-use>

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 2 seconds
Output:
---
name: browser-use
description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, or extract information from web pages.
allowed-tools: Bash(browser-use:*)
---

# Browser Automation with browser-use CLI

The `browser-use` command provides fast, persistent browser automation. A background daemon keeps the browser open across commands, giving ~50ms latency per call.

## Prerequisites

```bash
browser-use doctor    # Verify installation
```

For setup details, see https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use/blob/main/browser_use/skill_cli/README.md

## Core Workflow

1. **Navigate**: `browser-use open <url>` жѕЦ?starts browser if needed
2. **Inspect**: `browser-use state` жѕЦ?returns clickable elements with indices
3. **Interact**: use indices from state (`browser-use click 5`, `browser-use input 3 "text"`)
4. **Verify**: `browser-use state` or `browser-use screenshot` to confirm
5. **Repeat**: browser stays open between commands
6. **Cleanup**: `browser-use close` when done

## Browser Modes

```bash
browser-use open <url>                         # Default: headless Chromium
browser-use --headed open <url>                # Visible window
browser-use --profile "Default" open <url>      # Real Chrome with Default profile (existing logins/cookies)
browser-use --profile "Profile 1" open <url>   # Real Chrome with named profile
browser-use --connect open <url>               # Auto-discover running Chrome via CDP
browser-use --cdp-url ws://localhost:9222/... open <url>  # Connect via CDP URL
```

`--connect`, `--cdp-url`, and `--profile` are mutually exclusive.

## Commands

```bash
# Navigation
browser-use open <url>                    # Navigate to URL
browser-use back                          # Go back in history
browser-use scroll down                   # Scroll down (--amount N for pixels)
browser-use scroll up                     # Scroll up
browser-use switch <tab>                  # Switch to tab by index
browser-use close-tab [tab]              # Close tab (current if no index)

# Page State жѕЦ?always run state first to get element indices
browser-use state                         # URL, title, clickable elements with indices
browser-use screenshot [path.png]         # Screenshot (base64 if no path, --full for full page)

# Interactions жѕЦ?use indices from state
browser-use click <index>                 # Click element by index
browser-use click <x> <y>                 # Click at pixel coordinates
browser-use type "text"                   # Type into focused element
browser-use input <index> "text"          # Click element, then type
browser-use keys "Enter"                  # Send keyboard keys (also "Control+a", etc.)
browser-use select <index> "option"       # Select dropdown option
browser-use upload <index> <path>         # Upload file to file input

browser-use get text <index>              # Element text content
browser-use get value <index>             # Input/textarea value

browser-use get bbox <index>              # Bounding box (x, y, width, height)

# Wait
browser-use wait selector "css"           # Wait for element (--state visible|hidden|attached|detached, --timeout ms)
browser-use wait text "text"              # Wait for text to appear

# Cookies
browser-use cookies get [--url <url>]     # Get cookies (optionally filtered)
browser-use cookies set <name> <value>    # Set cookie (--domain, --secure, --http-only, --same-site, --expires)
browser-use cookies clear [--url <url>]   # Clear cookies
browser-use cookies export <file>         # Export to JSON
browser-use cookies import <file>         # Import from JSON

# Python жѕЦ?persistent session with browser access
browser-use python "code"                 # Execute Python (variables persist across calls)
browser-use python --file script.py       # Run file
browser-use python --vars                 # Show defined variables
browser-use python --reset                # Clear namespace

# Session
browser-use close                         # Close browser and stop daemon
browser-use sessions                      # List active sessions
browser-use close --all                   # Close all sessions

```diff
+$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
+
+$port = 3888
+$projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$relayScript = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "relay.mjs"
+$stdoutLog = Join-Path $env:TEMP "wps-ai-relay.stdout.log"
+$stderrLog = Join-Path $env:TEMP "wps-ai-relay.stderr.log"
+
+$existingProcess = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" |
+  Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*server\\relay.mjs*" } |
+  Select-Object -First 1
+
+if ($existingProcess) {
+  exit 0
+}
+
+$listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
+  Select-Object -First 1
+
+if ($listener) {
+  exit 0
+}
+
+$node = (Get-Command node).Source
+
+Start-Process `
+  -FilePath $node `
+  -ArgumentList @($relayScript) `
+  -WorkingDirectory $projectRoot `
+  -WindowStyle Hidden `
+  -RedirectStandardOutput $stdoutLog `
+  -RedirectStandardError $stderrLog
+
+Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800
```
</details></tool-use>

+async function waitForLocalRelay(settings, signal) {
+  if (
+    settings.providerId !== "nvidia" ||
+    !settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")
+  ) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  const healthUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:3888/health";

+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 6; attempt += 1) {

+

+      const response = await fetch(healthUrl, {
+        method: "GET",
+        cache: "no-store",
+        signal
+      });

+      if (response.ok) {
+        return;
+      }
+    } catch {
+      // Ignore and retry briefly while the local relay starts.
+    }
+
+    await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 350));
+  }

69:function insertStyledText(state, text, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {

81:

86:function ensureBreaks(state, count = 1) {

31:
32:function normalizeMaxTokens(value) {
33:  if (value === "" || value === null || value === undefined) {
34:    return "";
35:  }
36:
37:  if (value === 4096 || value === "4096") {
38:    return "";
39:  }
40:
41:  const parsed = Number(value);
42:  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
43:    return "";
44:  }
45:
46:  return String(Math.floor(parsed));
47:}
48:
49:export function normalizeSettings(input) {
50:  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };
51:
52:  if (
53:    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
54:    (!settings.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl === PROVIDERS.nvidia.directBaseUrl)
55:  ) {
56:    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
57:  }
58:
59:  settings.maxTokens = normalizeMaxTokens(settings.maxTokens);
60:  return settings;
61:}
62:
63:function normalizeContent(content) {
64:  if (typeof content === "string") {
65:    return content;
66:  }
67:
68:  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
69:    return "";
70:  }
71:
72:  return content
73:    .map((item) => {
74:      if (typeof item === "string") {
75:        return item;
76:      }
77:
78:      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
79:        return String(item.text ?? "");
80:      }
81:
82:      return "";
83:    })
84:    .join("");
85:}
86:
87:function extractChunk(payload) {
88:  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
89:  if (!choice) {
90:    return "";
91:  }
92:
93:  return (
94:    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
95:    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
96:    ""
97:  );
98:}
99:
100:async function buildError(response) {
101:  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
102:
103:  try {
104:    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
105:      const json = await response.json();
106:      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
107:    }
108:
109:    return await response.text();
110:  } catch {

113:}

115:function createRequestBody(settings, messages) {

130:async function waitForLocalRelay(settings, signal) {
131:  if (
132:    settings.providerId !== "nvidia" ||
133:    !settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")

137:

141:    if (signal?.aborted) {
142:      return;
143:    }
144:
145:    try {
146:      const response = await fetch(healthUrl, {
147:        method: "GET",
148:        cache: "no-store",

152:      if (response.ok) {
153:        return;

155:    } catch {
156:      // Ignore and retry briefly while the local relay starts.
157:    }
158:
159:    await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 350));
160:  }
161:}

5:$relayScript = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "relay.mjs"
6:$stdoutLog = Join-Path $env:TEMP "wps-ai-relay.stdout.log"
7:$stderrLog = Join-Path $env:TEMP "wps-ai-relay.stderr.log"
8:
9:$existingProcess = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" |
10:  Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*server\\relay.mjs*" } |
11:  Select-Object -First 1
12:
13:if ($existingProcess) {
14:  exit 0
15:}
16:
17:$listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
18:  Select-Object -First 1
19:
20:if ($listener) {
21:  exit 0
22:}
23:
24:$node = (Get-Command node).Source
25:
26:Start-Process `
27:  -FilePath $node `
28:  -ArgumentList @($relayScript) `
29:  -WorkingDirectory $projectRoot `
30:  -WindowStyle Hidden `
31:  -RedirectStandardOutput $stdoutLog `
32:  -RedirectStandardError $stderrLog
33:
34:Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800
```
</details></tool-use>

const inquirer = require('inquirer')
const fs = require('fs')
const fsEx = require('fs-extra')
const path = require('path')
const _7z = require('node-7z');
const _7zBin = require('7zip-bin')
const jsUtil = require('./util.js')
let projectCfg = jsUtil.projectCfg()
const chalk = require('chalk');
const { serialize } = require('v8');

const buildDirectory = jsUtil.GetBuildDir()

async function build(cmd) {
    if (cmd.parent.rawArgs[cmd.parent.rawArgs.length - 1].includes("exe"))
    {
        if (false == new RegExp("^[!-~]+$").test(projectCfg.name)){
            console.log(`${chalk.red("ТццтюГТ┤░жЇџтХЁтйДжЉ│УіЦТДИуђЏТЦЂуўЮжієСй╣ТџЪуђЏТЦђТІ░ТХЊтгфтъЮу╗Й?)}...`)
            return
	    }
        buildwithSelfArchive()
        return
    }
    inquirer.prompt({
        name: 'pluginType',
        type: 'list',
        message: `жќФтцІтФе WPS жЇћуі║ТхЄТццуЉ░тйѓућ»тєфУбФжЇе?`,
        choices: [{
                name: 'жЇдсёДтџјжј╗ТјЇТгб',
                value: 'online'
            },
            {
                name: 'у╗ѓУЇцтџјжј╗ТјЇТгб',
                value: 'offline'
            }
        ]
    }).then(answers => {
        return buildWithArgs(answers)
    }).then(buildDir=>{
        console.log(chalk.cyan(`\n==>>  у╝ѓТагуўДжј┤ТёгтДЏжієтѓЮЬЄгуЂЈтЌЎТ┤░Уц░?{buildDir}ТХЊтггТ«ЉжЈѓтЏдТгбу╝ЃТЈњтЪїжЈѕтХЁтДЪжЇБ?..`))
    })
}

async function buildWithArgs(answers) {
    return new Promise((r,j)=>{
        let debugTemp = jsUtil.GetDebugTempPath(true);
        fsEx.removeSync(debugTemp)
    
        let curDir = process.cwd()
        let buildDir = curDir
        if (projectCfg.scripts && typeof projectCfg.scripts.build == 'string') {
            let buildCmd = projectCfg.scripts.build.trim();
            if (buildCmd.includes("vite")) {
                buildDir = require('./buildvue')(answers)
            } else if (buildCmd.includes("react-scripts")) {
                buildDir = require('./buildreact')(answers)
            }
        }
        let publishRoot = path.resolve(curDir, jsUtil.GetPublishDir());
        fsEx.removeSync(publishRoot);
        let buildRoot = path.resolve(curDir, buildDirectory);
        let distPath = buildRoot
        if (answers.pluginType == "offline")
            distPath = path.resolve(buildRoot, `${projectCfg.name}_${projectCfg.version}`)
        fsEx.removeSync(buildRoot)
        fs.readdir(buildDir, (_, files) => {
            files.forEach(file => {
                if (file != buildDirectory && file != "node_modules" &&
                    file != ".vscode" && file != ".git" &&
                    file != "package.json" && file != "package-lock.json") {
                    const srcPath = path.resolve(buildDir, file)
                    fsEx.copySync(srcPath, path.resolve(distPath, file))
                }
            })
    
            if (answers.pluginType == "offline") {
                let path7z = path.resolve(buildRoot, `${projectCfg.name}.7z`)
                let inputPaths = [distPath]
                const stream7z = _7z.add(path7z, inputPaths, {
                    recursive: false,
                    $bin: _7zBin.path7za
                  });
                stream7z.on('end', ()=>{
                    fsEx.removeSync(distPath)
                })                
            }

            const buildResultDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), buildDirectory)
            r(buildResultDir)
        })
    })
}

async function buildwithSelfArchive(){
    buildWithArgs('online').then(buildDir=>{
        let curDir = process.cwd()
        let buildRoot = path.resolve(curDir, 'dist')
        if (!projectCfg.scripts){
            fsEx.removeSync(buildRoot)
            fsEx.copySync(buildDir, buildRoot)
        }
       
        let exePath = path.resolve(buildDir, `${projectCfg.name}.exe`)
        createSelfExtractingExe(buildDir, buildRoot, exePath)
    })
}

async function createSelfExtractingExe(buildDir, inputFolder, outputFile) {
    const sfxPath = path.join(__dirname, 'res/7zsd.sfx');
  
    if (!fs.existsSync(sfxPath)) {
      console.error('7zsd.sfx not found. Please make sure it exists in the same folder as this script');
      return;
    }
  
    const configFileBuffer = createSfxConfig(outputFile);
    const zipBuffer = await create7ZipBuffer(buildDir, inputFolder);
  
    // жЇњТХўу╝ЊжЉиЬЂЄлњжЇў?exe жЈѓтЏдТгб
    const ws = fs.createWriteStream(outputFile);
    ws.write(fs.readFileSync(sfxPath));
    ws.write(configFileBuffer);

    let path7z = path.resolve(buildDir, `${projectCfg.name}.7z`)
    ws.write(fs.readFileSync(path7z));
    ws.end(()=>{fsEx.removeSync(path7z)});
  
    console.log('Self-extracting EXE created:', outputFile);
  }
  
  function createSfxConfig(outputFile) {
    return Buffer.from(`
  ;!@Install@!UTF-8!
  Title="install wps jsaddons"
  BeginPrompt="у║ГЬє╝уЋЙуЉЋСй
... (truncated)
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-15 14:03:26Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\server\install-local-addon.ps1`**

```diff
+$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
+
+$projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$packageJsonPath = Join-Path $projectRoot "package.json"
+$buildDir = Join-Path $projectRoot "wps-addon-build"
+$addonRoot = Join-Path $env:APPDATA "kingsoft\wps\jsaddons"
+
+if (!(Test-Path $packageJsonPath)) {
+  throw "package.json not found."
+}
+
+if (!(Test-Path $buildDir)) {
+  throw "wps-addon-build not found. Run the build step first."
+}
+
+$package = Get-Content $packageJsonPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
+$addonName = [string]$package.name
+$addonType = [string]$package.addonType
+$addonVersion = [string]$package.version
+$offlineFolderName = "${addonName}_${addonVersion}"
+$offlineTarget = Join-Path $addonRoot $offlineFolderName
+$publishXmlPath = Join-Path $addonRoot "publish.xml"
+
+New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $addonRoot -Force | Out-Null
+Remove-Item $offlineTarget -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+Copy-Item $buildDir $offlineTarget -Recurse -Force
+
+[xml]$xml = if (Test-Path $publishXmlPath) {
+  Get-Content $publishXmlPath -Raw
+} else {
+  '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><jsplugins />'
+}
+
+if (-not $xml.jsplugins) {
+  $xml.AppendChild($xml.CreateElement("jsplugins")) | Out-Null
+}
+
+$nodesToRemove = @()
+foreach ($node in $xml.jsplugins.ChildNodes) {
+  if ($node.NodeType -ne [System.Xml.XmlNodeType]::Element) {
+    continue
+  }
+
+  if ($node.Attributes["name"] -and $node.Attributes["name"].Value -eq $addonName) {
+    $nodesToRemove += $node
+  }
+}
+
+foreach ($node in $nodesToRemove) {
+  $xml.jsplugins.RemoveChild($node) | Out-Null
+}
+
+$pluginNode = $xml.CreateElement("jsplugin")
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("name", $addonName)
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("type", $addonType)
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("url", $offlineFolderName)
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("version", $addonVersion)
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("enable", "enable_dev")
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("install", "null")
+$pluginNode.SetAttribute("customDomain", "")
+$xml.jsplugins.AppendChild($pluginNode) | Out-Null
+
+$settings = New-Object System.Xml.XmlWriterSettings
+$settings.Indent = $true
+$settings.Encoding = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false)
+$writer = [System.Xml.XmlWriter]::Create($publishXmlPath, $settings)
+$xml.Save($writer)
+$writer.Close()
+
+Write-Output "Installed addon to $offlineTarget"
+Write-Output "Updated publish.xml at $publishXmlPath"
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-15 14:06:00Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Update: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\server\relay.mjs`**

```diff
@@
-import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
+import { execFileSync, spawn } from "node:child_process";
 import { createServer } from "node:http";
@@
 const PORT = 3888;
 const NVIDIA_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
 const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
+const PROXY_ENV = resolveProxyEnv();
+
+function normalizeProxyUrl(value) {
+  const trimmed = String(value ?? "").trim();
+  if (!trimmed) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(trimmed)) {
+    return trimmed;
+  }
+
+  return `http://${trimmed}`;
+}
+
+function resolveWindowsProxy() {
+  try {
+    const output = execFileSync(
+      "reg.exe",
+      [
+        "query",
+        "HKCU\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings",
+        "/v",
+        "ProxyServer"
+      ],
+      {
+        encoding: "utf8",
+        stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "ignore"],
+        windowsHide: true
+      }
+    );
+
+    const match = output.match(/ProxyServer\s+REG_\w+\s+(.+)$/im);
+    if (!match) {
+      return "";
+    }
+
+    const raw = match[1].trim();
+    if (!raw) {
+      return "";
+    }
+
+    if (!raw.includes("=")) {
+      return normalizeProxyUrl(raw);
+    }
+
+    const map = Object.fromEntries(
+      raw
+        .split(";")
+        .map((part) => part.trim())
+        .filter(Boolean)
+        .map((part) => {
+          const [key, value] = part.split("=", 2);
+          return [key.toLowerCase(), normalizeProxyUrl(value)];
+        })
+    );
+
+    return map.https || map.http || Object.values(map)[0] || "";
+  } catch {
+    return "";
+  }
+}
+
+function resolveProxyEnv() {
+  const proxy =
+    process.env.HTTPS_PROXY ||
+    process.env.HTTP_PROXY ||
+    process.env.https_proxy ||
+    process.env.http_proxy ||
+    (process.platform === "win32" ? resolveWindowsProxy() : "");
+
+  if (!proxy) {
+    return process.env;
+  }
+
+  return {
+    ...process.env,
+    HTTP_PROXY: proxy,
+    HTTPS_PROXY: proxy,
+    http_proxy: proxy,
+    https_proxy: proxy,
+    NO_PROXY: process.env.NO_PROXY || "127.0.0.1,localhost",
+    no_proxy: process.env.no_proxy || "127.0.0.1,localhost"
+  };
+}
@@
   const curl = spawn(CURL_BIN, createCurlArgs(authorization), {
+    env: PROXY_ENV,
     stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "pipe"],
     windowsHide: true
   });
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-15 14:12:34Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>
**Add: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\server\run-relay.ps1`**

```diff
+$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
+
+$projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$relayScript = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "relay.mjs"
+$configPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "relay.config.json"
+
+$existingProcess = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'node.exe'" |
+  Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like "*relay.mjs*" } |
+  Select-Object -First 1
+
+if ($existingProcess) {
+  exit 0
+}
+
+$listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 3888 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
+  Select-Object -First 1
+
+if ($listener) {
+  exit 0
+}
+
+if (Test-Path $configPath) {
+  try {
+    $config = Get-Content $configPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
+    if ($config.proxyUrl) {
+      $env:HTTP_PROXY = [string]$config.proxyUrl
+      $env:HTTPS_PROXY = [string]$config.proxyUrl
+      $env:NO_PROXY = "127.0.0.1,localhost"
+    }
+  } catch {
+    # Ignore invalid config and continue.
+  }
+}
+
+Set-Location $projectRoot
+$node = (Get-Command node).Source
+& $node $relayScript
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command**</summary>
```bash
@'
import { spawn } from 'node:child_process';
const payload = JSON.stringify({
  model: 'deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus',
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'тЈфтЏътцЇOK' }],
  temperature: 0,
  max_tokens: 16,
  stream: true
});
const env = {
  ...process.env,
  HTTP_PROXY: 'http://proxy.zte.com.cn:80',
  HTTPS_PROXY: 'http://proxy.zte.com.cn:80',
  http_proxy: 'http://proxy.zte.com.cn:80',
  https_proxy: 'http://proxy.zte.com.cn:80',
  NO_PROXY: '127.0.0.1,localhost',
  no_proxy: '127.0.0.1,localhost'
};
const child = spawn('curl.exe', [
  '-sS','-N','-f','-X','POST',
  '-H','Authorization: Bearer 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',
  '-H','Content-Type: application/json',
  '--data-binary','@-',
  'https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions'
], { env, stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'], windowsHide: true });
child.stdout.on('data', (chunk) => process.stdout.write(chunk));
child.stderr.on('data', (chunk) => process.stderr.write(chunk));
child.on('close', (code) => console.log('\nCLOSE', code));
child.stdin.end(payload);
'@ | node --input-type=module -

+
+function createRequestController(signal) {
+  const controller = new AbortController();
+
+  if (signal) {
+    if (signal.aborted) {
+      controller.abort();
+    } else {
+      signal.addEventListener("abort", () => controller.abort(), {
+        once: true
+      });
+    }
+  }
+
+  return controller;
+}
