```diff
+import { startTransition, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
+import {
+  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
+  PROVIDERS,
+  buildMessages,
+  loadBootstrapSettings,
+  loadNvidiaModels,
+  normalizeSettings,
+  streamCompletion,
+  streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks
+} from "./ai";
+import { renderMarkdownHtml } from "./markdown";
+import {
+  PROMPT_KEY,
+  SETTINGS_KEY,
+  loadStoredValue,
+  saveStoredValue
+} from "./storage";
+import {
+  createStreamingWriter,
+  hasWpsDocument,
+  readSelectionText
+} from "./wps";
+
+function createMessageId() {
+  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
+}
+
+function placeholderModel(providerId) {
+  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
+}
+
+function createModelEntry(item, previous = null) {
+  return {
+    id: item.id,
+    ownedBy: item.ownedBy,
+    benchmark: previous?.benchmark ?? null
+  };
+}
+
+function statusRank(entry, currentModel) {
+  if (entry.id === currentModel) {
+    return -1;
+  }
+
+  const status = entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested";
+  switch (status) {
+    case "ok":
+      return 0;
+    case "timeout":
+      return 2;
+    case "unsupported":
+    case "unauthorized":
+      return 3;
+    case "error":
+      return 4;
+    default:
+      return 5;
+  }
+}
+
+function compareModelEntries(left, right, currentModel) {
+  const rankDiff = statusRank(left, currentModel) - statusRank(right, currentModel);
+  if (rankDiff !== 0) {
+    return rankDiff;
+  }
+
+  const leftToken = left.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
+  const rightToken = right.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
+  if (
+    Number.isFinite(leftToken) &&
+    Number.isFinite(rightToken) &&
+    leftToken !== rightToken
+  ) {
+    return leftToken - rightToken;
+  }
+
+  if (Number.isFinite(leftToken) && !Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
+    return -1;
+  }
+
+  if (!Number.isFinite(leftToken) && Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
+    return 1;
+  }
+
+  return left.id.localeCompare(right.id);
+}
+
+function applyBenchmarkResult(entries, result) {
+  return entries.map((entry) =>
+    entry.id === result.model
+      ? {
+          ...entry,
+          benchmark: {
+            status: result.status,
+            ok: Boolean(result.ok),
+            firstByteMs: result.firstByteMs,
+            firstTokenMs: result.firstTokenMs,
+            totalMs: result.totalMs,
+            message: result.message || ""
+          }
+        }
+      : entry
+  );
+}
+
+function formatLatency(value) {
+  if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return `${Math.round(value)} ms`;
+}
+
+function benchmarkLabel(entry) {
+  const status = entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested";
+
+  switch (status) {
+    case "ok":
+      return entry.benchmark?.firstTokenMs
+        ? `First token ${formatLatency(entry.benchmark.firstTokenMs)}`
+        : "Ready";
+    case "timeout":
+      return "Timeout";
+    case "unsupported":
+      return "Unsupported";
+    case "unauthorized":
+      return "Restricted";
+    case "error":
+      return "Error";
+    default:
+      return "Not tested";
+  }
+}
+
+function benchmarkClassName(entry) {
+  const status = entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested";
+  return `status-pill ${status}`;
+}
+
+function Icon({ name }) {
+  const common = {
+    width: 18,
+    height: 18,
+    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
+    fill: "none",
+    xmlns: "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
+    stroke: "currentColor",
+    strokeWidth: 1.8,
+    strokeLinecap: "round",
+    strokeLinejoin: "round"
+  };
+
+  switch (name) {
+    case "settings":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M12 3L13.4 5.7L16.4 6.1L14.2 8.2L14.7 11.2L12 9.8L9.3 11.2L9.8 8.2L7.6 6.1L10.6 5.7L12 3Z" />
+          <path d="M4 14.5L5.8 14.8L6.7 16.4L5.6 17.9L6.8 19.2L8.3 18.1L9.9 19L10.2 20.8H12" />
+          <path d="M20 14.5L18.2 14.8L17.3 16.4L18.4 17.9L17.2 19.2L15.7 18.1L14.1 19L13.8 20.8H12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "context":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="3" />
+          <path d="M8 9H16" />
+          <path d="M8 12H16" />
+          <path d="M8 15H13" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "clear":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M5 7H19" />
+          <path d="M9 7V5.5C9 4.7 9.7 4 10.5 4H13.5C14.3 4 15 4.7 15 5.5V7" />
+          <path d="M8 10V17" />
+          <path d="M12 10V17" />
+          <path d="M16 10V17" />
+          <path d="M6.5 7L7.2 18.2C7.3 19.2 8.1 20 9.1 20H14.9C15.9 20 16.7 19.2 16.8 18.2L17.5 7" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "send":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 4L11 13" />
+          <path d="M20 4L14 20L11 13L4 10L20 4Z" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "stop":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <rect x="6" y="6" width="12" height="12" rx="2" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "close":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M6 6L18 18" />
+          <path d="M18 6L6 18" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "provider":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <ellipse cx="12" cy="6" rx="6.5" ry="2.8" />
+          <path d="M5.5 6V12C5.5 13.5 8.4 14.8 12 14.8C15.6 14.8 18.5 13.5 18.5 12V6" />
+          <path d="M5.5 12V18C5.5 19.5 8.4 20.8 12 20.8C15.6 20.8 18.5 19.5 18.5 18V12" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "refresh":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M20 11A8 8 0 1 0 17.7 16.7" />
+          <path d="M20 5V11H14" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    case "flask":
+      return (
+        <svg {...common}>
+          <path d="M10 3V8L5.5 15.5A3 3 0 0 0 8.1 20H15.9A3 3 0 0 0 18.5 15.5L14 8V3" />
+          <path d="M9 3H15" />
+          <path d="M8 13H16" />
+        </svg>
+      );
+    default:
+      return null;
+  }
+}
+
+function AssistantMessage({ content, streaming }) {
+  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(content);
+
+  if (!html) {
+    return <div className="bubble-placeholder">{streaming ? "..." : ""}</div>;
+  }
+
+  return <div className="bubble-markdown" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }} />;
+}
+
+export default function App() {
+  const [settings, setSettings] = useState(() =>
+    normalizeSettings(loadStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, DEFAULT_SETTINGS))
+  );
+  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState(() => loadStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, ""));
+  const [selectionText, setSelectionText] = useState("");
+  const [error, setError] = useState("");
+  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
+  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
+  const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false);
+  const [showContext, setShowContext] = useState(false);
+  const [showModelLab, setShowModelLab] = useState(false);
+  const [modelCatalog, setModelCatalog] = useState([]);
+  const [modelSearch, setModelSearch] = useState("");
+  const [isLoadingModels, setIsLoadingModels] = useState(false);
+  const [isBenchmarkingModels, setIsBenchmarkingModels] = useState(false);
+  const [modelLabError, setModelLabError] = useState("");
+  const [benchmarkProgress, setBenchmarkProgress] = useState({
+    completed: 0,
+    total: 0
+  });
+
+  const abortRef = useRef(null);
+  const benchmarkAbortRef = useRef(null);
+  const promptRef = useRef(null);
+  const threadRef = useRef(null);
+  const shouldStickToBottomRef = useRef(true);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(SETTINGS_KEY, settings);
+  }, [settings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    saveStoredValue(PROMPT_KEY, prompt);
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (hasWpsDocument()) {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+    }
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+
+    void loadBootstrapSettings(controller.signal).then((bootstrapSettings) => {
+      if (!bootstrapSettings) {
+        return;
+      }
+
+      setSettings((current) => {
+        const normalizedCurrent = normalizeSettings(current);
+        const looksUnconfigured =
+          !normalizedCurrent.apiKey.trim() ||
+          !normalizedCurrent.model.trim() ||
+          normalizedCurrent.providerId === "openrouter" ||
+          normalizedCurrent.baseUrl === PROVIDERS.nvidia.directBaseUrl ||
+          normalizedCurrent.model === "meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct";
+
+        if (looksUnconfigured) {
+          return normalizeSettings({
+            ...normalizedCurrent,
+            ...bootstrapSettings
+          });
+        }
+
+        return normalizeSettings({
+          ...normalizedCurrent,
+          firstTokenTimeoutMs:
+            normalizedCurrent.firstTokenTimeoutMs ||
+            bootstrapSettings.firstTokenTimeoutMs,
+          apiKey: normalizedCurrent.apiKey || bootstrapSettings.apiKey,
+          model: normalizedCurrent.model || bootstrapSettings.model,
+          baseUrl: normalizedCurrent.baseUrl || bootstrapSettings.baseUrl
+        });
+      });
+    });
+
+    return () => controller.abort();
+  }, []);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const textarea = promptRef.current;
+    if (!textarea) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    textarea.style.height = "0px";
+    textarea.style.height = `${Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 220)}px`;
+  }, [prompt]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    const thread = threadRef.current;
+    if (!thread || !shouldStickToBottomRef.current) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    thread.scrollTop = thread.scrollHeight;
+  }, [messages]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showSettings && !showContext && !showModelLab) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    function onKeyDown(event) {
+      if (event.key === "Escape") {
+        setShowSettings(false);
+        setShowContext(false);
+        setShowModelLab(false);
+      }
+    }
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+  }, [showContext, showModelLab, showSettings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showModelLab || settings.providerId !== "nvidia" || modelCatalog.length > 0) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    void handleLoadModels();
+  }, [showModelLab, settings.providerId]);
+
+  const visibleModelCatalog = useMemo(() => {
+    const query = modelSearch.trim().toLowerCase();
+    const sorted = [...modelCatalog].sort((left, right) =>
+      compareModelEntries(left, right, settings.model)
+    );
+
+    if (!query) {
+      return sorted;
+    }
+
+    return sorted.filter((entry) => {
+      const haystack = `${entry.id} ${entry.ownedBy}`.toLowerCase();
+      return haystack.includes(query);
+    });
+  }, [modelCatalog, modelSearch, settings.model]);
+
+  function updateSetting(key, value) {
+    setSettings((current) => normalizeSettings({ ...current, [key]: value }));
+  }
+
+  function switchProvider(providerId) {
+    setSettings((current) =>
+      normalizeSettings({
+        ...current,
+        providerId,
+        baseUrl: PROVIDERS[providerId].defaultBaseUrl
+      })
+    );
+  }
+
+  function refreshSelection() {
+    try {
+      setSelectionText(readSelectionText());
+      setError("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setError(caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to read selection.");
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handleThreadScroll() {
+    const thread = threadRef.current;
+    if (!thread) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const distanceToBottom =
+      thread.scrollHeight - thread.scrollTop - thread.clientHeight;
+    shouldStickToBottomRef.current = distanceToBottom < 40;
+  }
+
+  function stopGeneration() {
+    abortRef.current?.abort();
+    abortRef.current = null;
+    setIsGenerating(false);
+  }
+
+  function stopBenchmarking() {
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current?.abort();
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);
+  }
+
+  async function handleLoadModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before loading NVIDIA models.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsLoadingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+
+    try {
+      const items = await loadNvidiaModels({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        signal: undefined
+      });
+
+      setModelCatalog((current) => {
+        const currentMap = new Map(current.map((entry) => [entry.id, entry]));
+        return items.map((item) => createModelEntry(item, currentMap.get(item.id)));
+      });
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setModelLabError(
+        caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+      );
+    } finally {
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function handleBenchmarkModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before benchmarking.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    let items = modelCatalog;
+    if (items.length === 0) {
+      setIsLoadingModels(true);
+      try {
+        const fetched = await loadNvidiaModels({
+          apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+          signal: undefined
+        });
+        items = fetched.map((item) => createModelEntry(item));
+        setModelCatalog(items);
+      } catch (caught) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+        );
+        setIsLoadingModels(false);
+        return;
+      }
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = controller;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+    setBenchmarkProgress({
+      completed: 0,
+      total: items.length
+    });
+
+    try {
+      for await (const event of streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        models: items.map((entry) => entry.id),
+        timeoutMs: 12000,
+        concurrency: 6,
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        if (event.type === "start") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "result" && event.result) {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+
+          setModelCatalog((current) => applyBenchmarkResult(current, event.result));
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "done") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || items.length,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+        }
+      }
+    } catch (caught) {
+      if (!(caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError")) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Benchmark failed."
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+      setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function applyModel(modelId) {
+    updateSetting("model", modelId);
+    setShowModelLab(false);
+    setModelSearch("");
+  }
+
+  async function handleGenerate() {
+    const trimmedPrompt = prompt.trim();
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setError("API key is required.");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!settings.model.trim()) {
+      setError("Model ID is required.");
+      setShowSettings(true);
+      return;
+    }
+
+    if (!trimmedPrompt) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setError("");
+    setIsGenerating(true);
+
+    let latestSelectionText = selectionText;
+    if (settings.useSelectionAsContext) {
+      latestSelectionText = readSelectionText();
+      setSelectionText(latestSelectionText);
+    }
+
+    const writer = createStreamingWriter({
+      replaceSelection: settings.replaceSelection
+    });
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    const userMessageId = createMessageId();
+    const assistantMessageId = createMessageId();
+
+    abortRef.current = controller;
+    shouldStickToBottomRef.current = true;
+
+    setMessages((current) => [
+      ...current,
+      { id: userMessageId, role: "user", content: trimmedPrompt },
+      { id: assistantMessageId, role: "assistant", content: "", streaming: true }
+    ]);
+
+    try {
+      let aggregate = "";
+      let lastUiUpdateAt = 0;
+
+      for await (const chunk of streamCompletion({
+        settings,
+        messages: buildMessages({
+          prompt: trimmedPrompt,
+          selectionText: latestSelectionText,
+          settings
+        }),
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        aggregate += chunk;
+        writer.update(aggregate);
+
+        const now = Date.now();
+        if (now - lastUiUpdateAt >= 50) {
+          lastUiUpdateAt = now;
+          startTransition(() => {
+            setMessages((current) =>
+              current.map((message) =>
+                message.id === assistantMessageId
+                  ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: true }
+                  : message
+              )
+            );
+          });
+        }
+      }
+
+      await writer.finish(aggregate);
+      setMessages((current) =>
+        current.map((message) =>
+          message.id === assistantMessageId
+            ? { ...message, content: aggregate, streaming: false }
+            : message
+        )
+      );
+      setPrompt("");
+    } catch (caught) {
+      const aborted =
+        caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError";
+
+      if (aborted) {
+        writer.cancel();
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((message) =>
+            message.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? { ...message, streaming: false }
+              : message
+          )
+        );
+      } else {
+        const message = caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Generation failed.";
+        setError(message);
+        setMessages((current) =>
+          current.map((entry) =>
+            entry.id === assistantMessageId
+              ? {
+                  ...entry,
+                  content: entry.content || "Request failed",
+                  streaming: false,
+                  error: true
+                }
+              : entry
+          )
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      abortRef.current = null;
+      setIsGenerating(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function handlePromptKeyDown(event) {
+    if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      if (!isGenerating) {
+        void handleGenerate();
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  function clearConversation() {
+    if (isGenerating) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setMessages([]);
+    setError("");
+  }
+
+  return (
+    <>
+      <main className="minimal-shell">
+        <header className="minimal-toolbar">
+          <div className="toolbar-group">
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowContext(true)}
+              aria-label="Context"
+              title="Context"
+            >
+              <Icon name="context" />
+            </button>
+            <button
+              className="icon-button"
+              type="button"
+              onClick={() => setShowSettings(true)}
+              aria-label="Settings"
+              title="Settings"
+            >
+              <Icon name="settings" />
+            </button>
+          </div>
+
+          <button
+            className="icon-button"
+            type="button"
+            onClick={clearConversation}
+            disabled={isGenerating || messages.length === 0}
+            aria-label="Clear"
+            title="Clear"
+          >
+            <Icon name="clear" />
+          </button>
+        </header>
+
+        <section className="minimal-thread">
+          <div
+            ref={threadRef}
+            className="message-list"
+            onScroll={handleThreadScroll}
+          >
+            {messages.map((message) => (
+              <article
+                key={message.id}
+                className={`bubble-row ${message.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant"}`}
+              >
+                <div className={`bubble ${message.error ? "error" : ""}`}>
+                  {message.role === "assistant" && !message.error ? (
+                    <AssistantMessage
+                      content={message.content}
+                      streaming={message.streaming}
+                    />
+                  ) : (
+                    <div className="bubble-plain">
+                      {message.content || (message.streaming ? "..." : "")}
+                    </div>
+                  )}
+                </div>
+              </article>
+            ))}
+          </div>
+        </section>
+
+        <footer className="minimal-composer">
+          {error ? <div className="tiny-error">{error}</div> : null}
+
+          <div className="composer-card">
+            <textarea
+              ref={promptRef}
+              value={prompt}
+              rows="1"
+              onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
+              onKeyDown={handlePromptKeyDown}
+              placeholder=""
+            />
+
+            <div className="composer-actions">
+              {isGenerating ? (
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button ghost"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={stopGeneration}
+                  aria-label="Stop"
+                  title="Stop"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="stop" />
+                </button>
+              ) : null}
+              <button
+                className="icon-button primary"
+                type="button"
+                disabled={isGenerating || !prompt.trim()}
+                onClick={() => void handleGenerate()}
+                aria-label="Send"
+                title="Send"
+              >
+                <Icon name="send" />
+              </button>
+            </div>
+          </div>
+        </footer>
+      </main>
+
+      {showSettings ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="provider" />
+                </span>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowSettings(false)}
+                aria-label="Close settings"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="provider-switch">
+              {Object.values(PROVIDERS).map((provider) => (
+                <button
+                  key={provider.id}
+                  type="button"
+                  className={`provider-chip ${
+                    settings.providerId === provider.id ? "active" : ""
+                  }`}
+                  onClick={() => switchProvider(provider.id)}
+                >
+                  {provider.label}
+                </button>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="field-grid">
+              <input
+                type="password"
+                value={settings.apiKey}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("apiKey", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="API Key"
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.model}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("model", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder={placeholderModel(settings.providerId) || "Model"}
+              />
+              <input
+                value={settings.baseUrl}
+                onChange={(event) => updateSetting("baseUrl", event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="Base URL"
+              />
+            </div>
+
+            {settings.providerId === "nvidia" ? (
+              <div className="utility-row">
+                <button
+                  className="secondary-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => setShowModelLab(true)}
+                >
+                  <Icon name="flask" />
+                  <span>Model Lab</span>
+                </button>
+              </div>
+            ) : null}
+
+            <details className="details-panel">
+              <summary>Advanced</summary>
+              <div className="field-grid advanced">
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  max="2"
+                  step="0.1"
+                  value={settings.temperature}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("temperature", Number(event.target.value || 0))
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Temperature"
+                />
+                <input
+                  type="number"
+                  min="0"
+                  step="1"
+                  value={settings.maxTokens}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("maxTokens", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                  placeholder="Max Tokens (auto)"
+                />
+                <textarea
+                  rows="4"
+                  value={settings.systemPrompt}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("systemPrompt", event.target.value)
+                  }
+                  placeholder="System Prompt"
+                />
+                {settings.providerId === "openrouter" ? (
+                  <>
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.referer}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("referer", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="HTTP-Referer"
+                    />
+                    <input
+                      value={settings.title}
+                      onChange={(event) =>
+                        updateSetting("title", event.target.value)
+                      }
+                      placeholder="X-Title"
+                    />
+                  </>
+                ) : null}
+              </div>
+            </details>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      {showModelLab ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowModelLab(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact wide"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="flask" />
+                </span>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowModelLab(false)}
+                aria-label="Close model lab"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="lab-toolbar">
+              <input
+                className="model-search-input"
+                value={modelSearch}
+                onChange={(event) => setModelSearch(event.target.value)}
+                placeholder="Search model"
+              />
+
+              <div className="lab-actions">
+                <button
+                  className="secondary-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() => void handleLoadModels()}
+                  disabled={isLoadingModels || isBenchmarkingModels}
+                >
+                  <span>{isLoadingModels ? "Loading..." : "Reload"}</span>
+                </button>
+
+                <button
+                  className="secondary-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={() =>
+                    isBenchmarkingModels
+                      ? stopBenchmarking()
+                      : void handleBenchmarkModels()
+                  }
+                  disabled={isLoadingModels || modelCatalog.length === 0}
+                >
+                  <span>
+                    {isBenchmarkingModels
+                      ? `Stop ${benchmarkProgress.completed}/${benchmarkProgress.total}`
+                      : "Benchmark"}
+                  </span>
+                </button>
+              </div>
+            </div>
+
+            <div className="micro-copy">
+              NVIDIA official model list comes from `GET /v1/models`. Benchmark sorts by
+              first token latency.
+            </div>
+
+            {modelLabError ? <div className="tiny-error">{modelLabError}</div> : null}
+
+            <div className="model-list">
+              {visibleModelCatalog.map((entry) => (
+                <article
+                  key={entry.id}
+                  className={`model-row ${settings.model === entry.id ? "active" : ""}`}
+                >
+                  <div className="model-meta">
+                    <div className="model-id">{entry.id}</div>
+                    <div className="model-subline">
+                      {entry.ownedBy || "nvidia"} ┬и {benchmarkLabel(entry)}
+                    </div>
+                    {entry.benchmark?.message ? (
+                      <div className="model-note">{entry.benchmark.message}</div>
+                    ) : null}
+                  </div>
+
+                  <div className="model-actions">
+                    <span className={benchmarkClassName(entry)}>
+                      {entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested"}
+                    </span>
+                    <button
+                      className="secondary-button slim"
+                      type="button"
+                      onClick={() => applyModel(entry.id)}
+                    >
+                      <span>Use</span>
+                    </button>
+                  </div>
+                </article>
+              ))}
+            </div>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+
+      {showContext ? (
+        <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}>
+          <section
+            className="modal-card compact"
+            onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}
+          >
+            <header className="modal-toolbar">
+              <div className="modal-icons">
+                <span className="icon-badge">
+                  <Icon name="context" />
+                </span>
+                <button
+                  className="icon-button"
+                  type="button"
+                  onClick={refreshSelection}
+                  aria-label="Refresh selection"
+                >
+                  <Icon name="refresh" />
+                </button>
+              </div>
+              <button
+                className="icon-button"
+                type="button"
+                onClick={() => setShowContext(false)}
+                aria-label="Close context"
+              >
+                <Icon name="close" />
+              </button>
+            </header>
+
+            <div className="toggle-stack">
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Use selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.useSelectionAsContext}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("useSelectionAsContext", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+
+              <label className="toggle-item">
+                <span>Replace selection</span>
+                <input
+                  type="checkbox"
+                  checked={settings.replaceSelection}
+                  onChange={(event) =>
+                    updateSetting("replaceSelection", event.target.checked)
+                  }
+                />
+              </label>
+            </div>
+
+            <pre className="selection-box">{selectionText || ""}</pre>
+          </section>
+        </div>
+      ) : null}
+    </>
+  );
+}

**Update: `d:\cursor_dev\wps_ai\src\taskpane\App.jsx`**

```diff
@@
 import {
   DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
   PROVIDERS,
   buildMessages,
   loadBootstrapSettings,
+  loadNvidiaModels,
   normalizeSettings,
-  streamCompletion
+  streamCompletion,
+  streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks
 } from "./ai";
@@
 function placeholderModel(providerId) {
   return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
 }
+
+function createModelEntry(item, previous = null) {
+  return {
+    id: item.id,
+    ownedBy: item.ownedBy,
+    benchmark: previous?.benchmark ?? null
+  };
+}
+
+function statusRank(entry, currentModel) {
+  if (entry.id === currentModel) {
+    return -1;
+  }
+
+  switch (entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested") {
+    case "ok":
+      return 0;
+    case "timeout":
+      return 2;
+    case "unsupported":
+    case "unauthorized":
+      return 3;
+    case "error":
+      return 4;
+    default:
+      return 5;
+  }
+}
+
+function compareModelEntries(left, right, currentModel) {
+  const rankDiff = statusRank(left, currentModel) - statusRank(right, currentModel);
+  if (rankDiff !== 0) {
+    return rankDiff;
+  }
+
+  const leftToken = left.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
+  const rightToken = right.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
+
+  if (
+    Number.isFinite(leftToken) &&
+    Number.isFinite(rightToken) &&
+    leftToken !== rightToken
+  ) {
+    return leftToken - rightToken;
+  }
+
+  if (Number.isFinite(leftToken) && !Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
+    return -1;
+  }
+
+  if (!Number.isFinite(leftToken) && Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
+    return 1;
+  }
+
+  return left.id.localeCompare(right.id);
+}
+
+function applyBenchmarkResult(entries, result) {
+  return entries.map((entry) =>
+    entry.id === result.model
+      ? {
+          ...entry,
+          benchmark: {
+            status: result.status,
+            ok: Boolean(result.ok),
+            firstByteMs: result.firstByteMs,
+            firstTokenMs: result.firstTokenMs,
+            totalMs: result.totalMs,
+            message: result.message || ""
+          }
+        }
+      : entry
+  );
+}
+
+function formatLatency(value) {
+  if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
+    return "";
+  }
+
+  return `${Math.round(value)} ms`;
+}
+
+function benchmarkLabel(entry) {
+  switch (entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested") {
+    case "ok":
+      return entry.benchmark?.firstTokenMs
+        ? `First token ${formatLatency(entry.benchmark.firstTokenMs)}`
+        : "Ready";
+    case "timeout":
+      return "Timeout";
+    case "unsupported":
+      return "Unsupported";
+    case "unauthorized":
+      return "Restricted";
+    case "error":
+      return "Error";
+    default:
+      return "Not tested";
+  }
+}
+
+function benchmarkClassName(entry) {
+  return `status-pill ${entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested"}`;
+}
```

 228: function AssistantMessage({ content, streaming }) {
 229:   const html = renderMarkdownHtml(content);
 230: 
 231:   if (!html) {
 232:     return <div className="bubble-placeholder">{streaming ? "..." : ""}</div>;
 233:   }
 234: 
 235:   return <div className="bubble-markdown" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }} />;
 236: }

   function stopGeneration() {

+
+  function stopBenchmarking() {
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current?.abort();
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);
+  }
+
+  async function handleLoadModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before loading NVIDIA models.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsLoadingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+
+    try {
+      const items = await loadNvidiaModels({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        signal: undefined
+      });
+
+      setModelCatalog((current) => {
+        const currentMap = new Map(current.map((entry) => [entry.id, entry]));
+        return items.map((item) => createModelEntry(item, currentMap.get(item.id)));
+      });
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setModelLabError(
+        caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+      );
+    } finally {
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function handleBenchmarkModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before benchmarking.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    let items = modelCatalog;
+    if (items.length === 0) {
+      setIsLoadingModels(true);
+      try {
+        const fetched = await loadNvidiaModels({
+          apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+          signal: undefined
+        });
+        items = fetched.map((item) => createModelEntry(item));
+        setModelCatalog(items);
+      } catch (caught) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+        );
+        setIsLoadingModels(false);
+        return;
+      }
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = controller;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+    setBenchmarkProgress({
+      completed: 0,
+      total: items.length
+    });
+
+    try {
+      for await (const event of streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        models: items.map((entry) => entry.id),
+        timeoutMs: 12000,
+        concurrency: 6,
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        if (event.type === "start") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "result" && event.result) {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+          setModelCatalog((current) => applyBenchmarkResult(current, event.result));
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "done") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || items.length,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+        }
+      }
+    } catch (caught) {
+      if (!(caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError")) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Benchmark failed."
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+      setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function applyModel(modelId) {
+    updateSetting("model", modelId);
+    setShowModelLab(false);
+    setModelSearch("");
+  }

+    if (!showSettings && !showContext && !showModelLab) {
+      return undefined;
+    }
+
+    function onKeyDown(event) {
+      if (event.key === "Escape") {
+        setShowSettings(false);
+        setShowContext(false);
+        setShowModelLab(false);
+      }
+    }
+
+    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKeyDown);
+  }, [showContext, showModelLab, showSettings]);
+
+  useEffect(() => {
+    if (!showModelLab || settings.providerId !== "nvidia" || modelCatalog.length > 0) {
+      return;
+    }
+
+    void handleLoadModels();
+  }, [showModelLab, settings.providerId]);

   function stopGeneration() {

+  function stopBenchmarking() {

+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);

+
+  async function handleLoadModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before loading NVIDIA models.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    setIsLoadingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+
+    try {
+      const items = await loadNvidiaModels({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        signal: undefined
+      });
+
+      setModelCatalog((current) => {
+        const currentMap = new Map(current.map((entry) => [entry.id, entry]));
+        return items.map((item) => createModelEntry(item, currentMap.get(item.id)));
+      });
+    } catch (caught) {
+      setModelLabError(
+        caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+      );
+    } finally {
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function handleBenchmarkModels() {
+    if (!settings.apiKey.trim()) {
+      setModelLabError("API key is required before benchmarking.");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    let items = modelCatalog;
+    if (items.length === 0) {
+      setIsLoadingModels(true);
+      try {
+        const fetched = await loadNvidiaModels({
+          apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+          signal: undefined
+        });
+        items = fetched.map((item) => createModelEntry(item));
+        setModelCatalog(items);
+      } catch (caught) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Failed to load models."
+        );
+        setIsLoadingModels(false);
+        return;
+      }
+      setIsLoadingModels(false);
+    }
+
+    const controller = new AbortController();
+    benchmarkAbortRef.current = controller;
+    setIsBenchmarkingModels(true);
+    setModelLabError("");
+    setBenchmarkProgress({
+      completed: 0,
+      total: items.length
+    });
+
+    try {
+      for await (const event of streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks({
+        apiKey: settings.apiKey,
+        models: items.map((entry) => entry.id),
+        timeoutMs: 12000,
+        concurrency: 6,
+        signal: controller.signal
+      })) {
+        if (event.type === "start") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "result" && event.result) {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || 0,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+          setModelCatalog((current) => applyBenchmarkResult(current, event.result));
+          continue;
+        }
+
+        if (event.type === "done") {
+          setBenchmarkProgress({
+            completed: Number(event.completed) || items.length,
+            total: Number(event.total) || items.length
+          });
+        }
+      }
+    } catch (caught) {
+      if (!(caught instanceof DOMException && caught.name === "AbortError")) {
+        setModelLabError(
+          caught instanceof Error ? caught.message : "Benchmark failed."
+        );
+      }
+    } finally {
+      benchmarkAbortRef.current = null;
+      setIsBenchmarkingModels(false);
+    }
+  }
+
+  function applyModel(modelId) {
+    updateSetting("model", modelId);
+    setShowModelLab(false);
+    setModelSearch("");
+  }
 
   async function handleGenerate() {

+
+.utility-row {
+  margin-top: 10px;
+}
+
+.secondary-button {
+  min-height: 40px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  justify-content: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  color: var(--text);
+  background: #fff;
+  cursor: pointer;
+}
+
+.secondary-button:disabled {
+  opacity: 0.45;
+  cursor: not-allowed;
+}
+
+.secondary-button.slim {
+  min-height: 34px;
+  padding: 0 12px;
+}
 
 .modal-backdrop {
   position: fixed;
   inset: 0;
   z-index: 40;
@@
 .modal-card {
   width: min(560px, 100%);
   max-height: min(88vh, 820px);
   overflow: auto;
   border: 1px solid var(--line);
@@
 }
 
 .modal-card.compact {
   padding: 14px;
 }
+
+.modal-card.wide {
+  width: min(760px, 100%);
+}
@@
 .modal-icons {
   display: flex;
   align-items: center;
   gap: 8px;
 }
@@
 .selection-box {
   min-height: 160px;
   max-height: 42vh;
   margin: 10px 0 0;
@@
   line-height: 1.6;
   overflow: auto;
 }
+
+.lab-toolbar {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 10px;
+  margin-bottom: 10px;
+}
+
+.lab-actions {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+}
+
+.model-search-input {
+  flex: 1;
+  min-height: 44px;
+  padding: 0 14px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 16px;
+  outline: none;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.micro-copy {
+  margin-bottom: 10px;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.5;
+}
+
+.model-list {
+  display: grid;
+  gap: 10px;
+  max-height: 58vh;
+  overflow: auto;
+  padding-right: 2px;
+}
+
+.model-row {
+  padding: 12px 14px;
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: flex-start;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 12px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  border-radius: 18px;
+  background: #fff;
+}
+
+.model-row.active {
+  border-color: #111;
+  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #111 inset;
+}
+
+.model-meta {
+  min-width: 0;
+  flex: 1;
+}
+
+.model-id {
+  font-weight: 600;
+  line-height: 1.5;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.model-subline {
+  margin-top: 4px;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.5;
+  word-break: break-word;
+}
+
+.model-note {
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  color: var(--muted);
+  line-height: 1.5;
+}
+
+.model-actions {
+  display: flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-shrink: 0;
+}
+
+.status-pill {
+  min-height: 28px;
+  padding: 0 10px;
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid var(--line);
+  color: var(--muted);
+  background: var(--surface);
+  text-transform: capitalize;
+}
+
+.status-pill.ok {
+  color: #0f766e;
+  border-color: #bde4df;
+  background: #f0fdfa;
+}
+
+.status-pill.timeout,
+.status-pill.error,
+.status-pill.unsupported,
+.status-pill.unauthorized {
+  color: var(--danger);
+  border-color: #f2d1cc;
+  background: #fff7f6;
+}
 
 @media (max-width: 720px) {
   .minimal-shell {
     padding: 10px;
     gap: 10px;
@@
   .provider-switch {
     flex-direction: column;
   }
 
   .bubble {
     max-width: 100%;
   }
+
+  .lab-toolbar,
+  .lab-actions,
+  .model-row,
+  .model-actions {
+    flex-direction: column;
+  }
+
+  .lab-actions .secondary-button,
+  .model-actions .secondary-button {
+    width: 100%;
+  }
 }
```
</details></tool-use>

 275: export function readSelectionText() {
 276:   const app = getApplication();
 277:   if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
 278:     return "";
 279:   }

 282:   return range?.Text ? String(range.Text) : "";

 285: export function hasWpsDocument() {

 290: export function createStreamingWriter({ replaceSelection }) {
 291:   const app = getApplication();
 292:   if (!app?.ActiveDocument) {
 293:     return {
 294:       locationLabel: "Preview only",
 295:       finish() {},
 296:       update() {},
 297:       cancel() {}
 298:     };
 299:   }
 300: 
 301:   const doc = app.ActiveDocument;
 302:   const selectionRange = getSelectionRange(app);
 303: 
 304:   if (!selectionRange) {
 305:     throw new Error("Unable to access the current selection.");
 306:   }
 307: 
 308:   const start = Number(selectionRange.Start);
 309:   const end = Number(selectionRange.End);
 310:   const originalText = String(selectionRange.Text || "");
 311:   const anchor = replaceSelection ? start : end;

 313:   let currentPlainText = "";

 315:   let pendingMarkdown = "";
 316:   let flushTimer = null;
 317:   let flushing = false;

 319:   if (replaceSelection && end > start) {

 323:   function replaceInsertedText(text) {
 324:     const target = doc.Range(anchor, anchor + currentLength);
 325:     target.Text = text;

 327:     currentPlainText = text;

 331:     if (!text) {
 332:       return;

 336:     insertionPoint.InsertAfter(text);
 337:     currentLength += text.length;
 338:     currentPlainText += text;
 339:   }

 342:     if (flushing || flushedMarkdown === pendingMarkdown) {

 354:         } else {
 355:           replaceInsertedText(nextPlainText);
 356:         }
 357:       }

 359:       flushedMarkdown = nextMarkdown;
 360:     } finally {
 361:       flushing = false;
 362:     }
 363:   }

 366:     locationLabel: replaceSelection ? "Replace selection" : "Insert at cursor",

 369:       if (flushTimer !== null) {
 370:         return;
 371:       }

 375:         void flushNow();
 376:       }, 60);
 377:     },

 384:       }

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command** `Get-Content server\install-local-addon.ps1`</summary>
```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 5 seconds
Output:
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$projectRoot = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
$packageJsonPath = Join-Path $projectRoot "package.json"
$buildDir = Join-Path $projectRoot "wps-addon-build"
$addonRoot = Join-Path $env:APPDATA "kingsoft\wps\jsaddons"
$runKeyPath = "HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run"
$runValueName = "WPS AI Relay"
$runVbsPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "run-relay-hidden.vbs"

if (!(Test-Path $packageJsonPath)) {
  throw "package.json not found."
}

if (!(Test-Path $buildDir)) {
  throw "wps-addon-build not found. Run the build step first."
}

$package = Get-Content $packageJsonPath -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$addonName = [string]$package.name
$addonType = [string]$package.addonType
$addonVersion = [string]$package.version
$offlineFolderName = "${addonName}_${addonVersion}"
$offlineTarget = Join-Path $addonRoot $offlineFolderName
$publishXmlPath = Join-Path $addonRoot "publish.xml"

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $addonRoot -Force | Out-Null
Remove-Item $offlineTarget -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Copy-Item $buildDir $offlineTarget -Recurse -Force

[xml]$xml = if (Test-Path $publishXmlPath) {
  Get-Content $publishXmlPath -Raw
} else {
  '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><jsplugins />'
}

if (-not $xml.DocumentElement) {
  $xml.LoadXml('<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><jsplugins />')
}

$root = $xml.DocumentElement

$nodesToRemove = @()
foreach ($node in $root.ChildNodes) {
  if ($node.NodeType -ne [System.Xml.XmlNodeType]::Element) {
    continue
  }

  if ($node.Attributes["name"] -and $node.Attributes["name"].Value -eq $addonName) {
    $nodesToRemove += $node
  }
}

foreach ($node in $nodesToRemove) {
  $root.RemoveChild($node) | Out-Null
}

$pluginNode = $xml.CreateElement("jsplugin")
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("name", $addonName)
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("type", $addonType)
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("url", $offlineFolderName)
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("version", $addonVersion)
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("enable", "enable_dev")
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("install", "null")
$pluginNode.SetAttribute("customDomain", "")
$root.AppendChild($pluginNode) | Out-Null

$settings = New-Object System.Xml.XmlWriterSettings
$settings.Indent = $true
$settings.Encoding = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false)
$writer = [System.Xml.XmlWriter]::Create($publishXmlPath, $settings)
$xml.Save($writer)
$writer.Close()

New-Item -Path $runKeyPath -Force | Out-Null
Set-ItemProperty -Path $runKeyPath -Name $runValueName -Value "wscript.exe `"$runVbsPath`""

& powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "start-relay.ps1")

Write-Output "Installed addon to $offlineTarget"
Write-Output "Updated publish.xml at $publishXmlPath"
Write-Output "Registered relay auto-start in $runKeyPath"
```
</details></tool-use>

import { startTransition, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {
  DEFAULT_SETTINGS,
  PROVIDERS,
  buildMessages,
  loadBootstrapSettings,
  loadNvidiaModels,
  normalizeSettings,
  streamCompletion,
  streamNvidiaModelBenchmarks
} from "./ai";
import { renderMarkdownHtml } from "./markdown";
import {
  PROMPT_KEY,
  SETTINGS_KEY,
  loadStoredValue,
  saveStoredValue
} from "./storage";
import {
  createStreamingWriter,
  hasWpsDocument,
  readSelectionText
} from "./wps";

function createMessageId() {
  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;
}

function placeholderModel(providerId) {
  return PROVIDERS[providerId]?.placeholderModel ?? "";
}

function createModelEntry(item, previous = null) {
  return {
    id: item.id,
    ownedBy: item.ownedBy,
    benchmark: previous?.benchmark ?? null
  };
}

function statusRank(entry, currentModel) {
  if (entry.id === currentModel) {
    return -1;
  }

  switch (entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested") {
    case "ok":
      return 0;
    case "timeout":
      return 2;
    case "unsupported":
    case "unauthorized":
      return 3;
    case "error":
      return 4;
    default:
      return 5;
  }
}

function compareModelEntries(left, right, currentModel) {
  const rankDiff = statusRank(left, currentModel) - statusRank(right, currentModel);
  if (rankDiff !== 0) {
    return rankDiff;
  }

  const leftToken = left.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
  const rightToken = right.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;

  if (
    Number.isFinite(leftToken) &&
    Number.isFinite(rightToken) &&
    leftToken !== rightToken
  ) {
    return leftToken - rightToken;
  }

  if (Number.isFinite(leftToken) && !Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
    return -1;
  }

  if (!Number.isFinite(leftToken) && Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
    return 1;
  }

  return left.id.localeCompare(right.id);
}

function applyBenchmarkResult(entries, result) {
  return entries.map((entry) =>
    entry.id === result.model
      ? {
          ...entry,
          benchmark: {
            status: result.status,
            ok: Boolean(result.ok),
            firstByteMs: result.firstByteMs,
            firstTokenMs: result.firstTokenMs,
            totalMs: result.totalMs,
            message: result.message || ""
          }
        }
      : entry
  );
}

function formatLatency(value) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(value)) {
    return "";
  }

  return `${Math.round(value)} ms`;
}

function benchmarkLabel(entry) {
  switch (entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested") {
    case "ok":
      return entry.benchmark?.firstTokenMs
        ? `First token ${formatLatency(entry.benchmark.firstTokenMs)}`
        : "Ready";
    case "timeout":
      return "Timeout";
    case "unsupported":
      return "Unsupported";
    case "unauthorized":
      return "Restricted";
    case "error":
      return "Error";
    default:
      return "Not tested";
  }
}

function benchmarkClassName(entry) {
  return `status-pill ${entry.benchmark?.status ?? "untested"}`;
}

function Icon({ name }) {
  const common = {
    width: 18,
    height: 18,
    viewBox: "0 0 24 24",
    fill: "none",
    xmlns: "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
    stroke: "currentColor",
    strokeWidth: 1.8,
    strokeLinecap: "round",

import { createMarkdownDocument, markdownToPlainText } from "./markdown";

const HEADING_SIZES = {
  H1: 18,
  H2: 16,
  H3: 15,
  H4: 14,
  H5: 13,
  H6: 13
};

const INLINE_DEFAULTS = Object.freeze({
  bold: false,
  code: false,
  italic: false,
  size: null,
  underline: false
});

function getApplication() {
  if (window.Application) {
    return window.Application;
  }

  if (window.wps?.Application) {
    return window.wps.Application;
  }

  if (window.instance?.Application) {
    return window.instance.Application;
  }

  return null;
}

function getSelectionRange(app) {
  return app.Selection?.Range || app.ActiveDocument?.ActiveWindow?.Selection?.Range || null;
}

function mergeStyle(baseStyle, patch) {
  return { ...baseStyle, ...patch };
}

function applyTextStyle(range, style) {
  const font = range.Font;

  font.Bold = style.bold ? 1 : 0;
  font.Italic = style.italic ? 1 : 0;

  if (style.size) {
    font.Size = style.size;
  }

  if (style.code) {
    font.Name = "Consolas";
    font.NameAscii = "Consolas";
  }

  if ("underline" in style) {
    range.Underline = style.underline ? 1 : 0;
  }
}

function updateTrailingBreaks(state, text) {
  const match = text.match(/\r+$/);
  state.trailingBreaks = match ? match[0].length : 0;
}

function insertStyledText(state, text, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
  const normalized = String(text ?? "").replace(/\r?\n/g, "\r");
  if (!normalized) {
    return;
  }

  const start = state.anchor + state.length;
  state.doc.Range(start, start).InsertAfter(normalized);

  const end = start + normalized.length;
  const inserted = state.doc.Range(start, end);
  applyTextStyle(inserted, style);

  state.length += normalized.length;
  updateTrailingBreaks(state, normalized);
}

function ensureBreaks(state, count = 1) {
  while (state.trailingBreaks < count) {
    insertStyledText(state, "\r");
  }
}

function trimTrailingBreaks(state, maxCount = 0) {
  while (state.trailingBreaks > maxCount && state.length > 0) {
    const start = state.anchor + state.length - 1;
    state.doc.Range(start, start + 1).Text = "";
    state.length -= 1;
    state.trailingBreaks -= 1;
  }
}

function renderInlineChildren(node, state, style) {
  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
    renderNode(child, state, style);
  }
}

function renderListItem(node, state, marker) {
  insertStyledText(state, marker);

  for (const child of Array.from(node.childNodes)) {
    if (child.nodeType === 1 && child.tagName === "P") {
      renderInlineChildren(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
      continue;
    }

    if (child.nodeType === 1 && /^(UL|OL)$/.test(child.tagName)) {
      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
      renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
      continue;
    }

    renderNode(child, state, INLINE_DEFAULTS);
  }

  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
  ensureBreaks(state, 1);
}

function renderBlock(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS, breaks = 2) {
  renderInlineChildren(node, state, style);
  trimTrailingBreaks(state, 0);
  ensureBreaks(state, breaks);
}

function renderNode(node, state, style = INLINE_DEFAULTS) {
  if (node.nodeType === 3) {
    const content = style.code
      ? node.textContent ?? ""
      : (node.textContent ?? "").replace(/\s+/g, " ");
    insertStyledText(state, content, style);
    return;
  }

  if (node.nodeType !== 1) {
    return;
  }

  switch (node.tagName) {
    case "STRONG":
    case "B":
      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { bold: true }));
      return;
    case "EM":
    case "I":
      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { italic: true }));
      return;
    case "A":
      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { underline: true }));
      return;
    case "CODE":
      renderInlineChildren(node, state, mergeStyle(style, { code: true }));
      return;
    case "BR":
      insertStyledText(state, "\r");
      return;
    case "P":
      renderBlock(node, state, style);
      return;
    case "H1":
    case "H2":
    case "H3":
    case "H4":
    case "H5":
    case "H6":
      renderBlock(
        node,
        state,
        mergeStyle(style, {
          bold: true,
          size: HEADING_SIZES[node.tagName]
        })
      );
      return;
    case "UL":
      for (const item of Array.from(node.children)) {
        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
          renderListItem(item, state, "\u2022 ");
        }
      }
      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
      return;
    case "OL":
      Array.from(node.children).forEach((item, index) => {
        if (item.tagName === "LI") {
          renderListItem(item, state, `${index + 1}. `);
        }
      });
      ensureBreaks(state, 1);
      return;
    case "BLOCKQUOTE": {
      const text = (node.textContent ?? "").trim(

const RELAY_BOOTSTRAP_URL = "http://127.0.0.1:3888/bootstrap";
const RELAY_NVIDIA_MODELS_URL = "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1/models";
const RELAY_NVIDIA_BENCHMARK_URL =
  "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1/models/benchmark";

export const PROVIDERS = {
  openrouter: {
    id: "openrouter",
    label: "OpenRouter",
    defaultBaseUrl: "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
    placeholderModel: "openai/gpt-4.1-mini"
  },
  nvidia: {
    id: "nvidia",
    label: "NVIDIA Build",
    defaultBaseUrl: "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1",
    directBaseUrl: "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1",
    placeholderModel: "deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus",
    recommendedModel: "deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus"
  }
};

export const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
  providerId: "nvidia",
  baseUrl: PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl,
  apiKey: "",
  model: PROVIDERS.nvidia.recommendedModel,
  temperature: 0.5,
  maxTokens: "",
  systemPrompt:
    "You are a WPS writing assistant. Reply with clean Markdown that can be inserted directly into the document. Use headings, lists, bold, and italic only when they improve readability. Do not add meta commentary or preambles.",
  referer: "https://localhost",
  title: "WPS AI",
  useSelectionAsContext: true,
  replaceSelection: true,
  firstTokenTimeoutMs: 120000
};

function normalizeMaxTokens(value) {
  if (value === "" || value === null || value === undefined) {
    return "";
  }

  const parsed = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
    return "";
  }

  return String(Math.floor(parsed));
}

function normalizeFirstTokenTimeout(value) {
  const parsed = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
    return DEFAULT_SETTINGS.firstTokenTimeoutMs;
  }

  return Math.min(Math.floor(parsed), 10 * 60 * 1000);
}

export function normalizeSettings(input) {
  const settings = { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...input };

  if (
    settings.providerId === "nvidia" &&
    (!settings.baseUrl || settings.baseUrl === PROVIDERS.nvidia.directBaseUrl)
  ) {
    settings.baseUrl = PROVIDERS.nvidia.defaultBaseUrl;
  }

  if (settings.providerId === "nvidia" && !String(settings.model || "").trim()) {
    settings.model = PROVIDERS.nvidia.recommendedModel;
  }

  settings.maxTokens = normalizeMaxTokens(settings.maxTokens);
  settings.firstTokenTimeoutMs = normalizeFirstTokenTimeout(
    settings.firstTokenTimeoutMs
  );

  return settings;
}

function createAuthorizationHeaders(apiKey) {
  return {
    Authorization: `Bearer ${String(apiKey ?? "").trim()}`
  };
}

export async function loadBootstrapSettings(signal) {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(RELAY_BOOTSTRAP_URL, {
      method: "GET",
      cache: "no-store",
      signal
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      return null;
    }

    const payload = await response.json();
    const settings =
      payload?.settings && typeof payload.settings === "object"
        ? payload.settings
        : payload;

    return normalizeSettings(settings);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function normalizeContent(content) {
  if (typeof content === "string") {
    return content;
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(content)) {
    return "";
  }

  return content
    .map((item) => {
      if (typeof item === "string") {
        return item;
      }

      if (item && typeof item === "object" && "text" in item) {
        return String(item.text ?? "");
      }

      return "";
    })
    .join("");
}

function extractChunk(payload) {
  const choice = payload?.choices?.[0];
  if (!choice) {
    return "";
  }

  return (
    normalizeContent(choice.delta?.content) ||
    normalizeContent(choice.message?.content) ||
    ""
  );
}

async function buildError(response) {
  const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";

  try {
    if (contentType.includes("application/json")) {
      const json = await response.json();
      return json?.error?.message || JSON.stringify(json);
    }

    return await response.text();
  } catch {
    return `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
  }
}

function createRequestBody(settings, messages) {
  const payload = {
    model: settings.model.trim(),
    messages,
    temperature: Number(settings.temperature),
    stream: true
  };

  if (Number(settings.maxTokens) > 0) {
    payload.max_tokens = Number(settings.maxTokens);
  }

  return payload;
}

async function waitForLocalRelay(settings, signal) {
  if (
    settings.providerId !== "nvidia" ||
    !settings.baseUrl.includes("127.0.0.1:3888")
  ) {

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 8; attempt += 1) {
    if (signal?.aborted) {
      return;
    }

    try {
      const response = await fetch(healthUrl, {
        method

:root {
  color-scheme: light;
  --bg: #ffffff;
  --panel: #ffffff;
  --surface: #fafafa;
  --surface-strong: #f4f4f4;
  --line: #ececec;
  --line-strong: #d8d8d8;
  --text: #171717;
  --muted: #737373;
  --accent: #111111;
  --danger: #b42318;
  --shadow: 0 18px 46px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
  --radius-lg: 24px;
  --radius-md: 18px;
  --radius-sm: 14px;
  --font-ui: "Segoe UI Variable Text", "Bahnschrift", "Microsoft YaHei",
    sans-serif;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body,
#root {
  height: 100%;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: var(--font-ui);
  font-size: 13px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03), transparent 38%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #fbfbfb 100%);
}

button,
input,
textarea,
select {
  font: inherit;
}

button {
  padding: 0;
  background: none;
}

.minimal-shell {
  width: min(840px, 100%);
  height: 100vh;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 14px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 14px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.minimal-toolbar {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
}

.toolbar-group {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--text);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    transform 140ms ease,
    border-color 140ms ease,
    background-color 140ms ease,
    opacity 140ms ease,
    box-shadow 140ms ease;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  border-color: var(--line-strong);
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.05);
}

.icon-button:disabled {
  opacity: 0.34;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  transform: none;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.icon-button.primary {
  color: #fff;
  border-color: #111;
  background: #111;
}

.icon-button.primary:hover {
  background: #1a1a1a;
  border-color: #1a1a1a;
}

.icon-button.ghost {
  background: #fff;
}

.minimal-thread {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.message-list {
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 2px 2px 6px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  scrollbar-gutter: stable;
}

.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar,
.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar,
.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar,
.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
}

.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,
.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #d8d8d8;
}

.message-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
.selection-box::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
.modal-card::-webkit-scrollbar-track,
.composer-card textarea::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}

.bubble-row {
  display: flex;
}

.bubble-row.user {
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.bubble {
  max-width: min(100%, 680px);
  padding: 12px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92);
  line-height: 1.68;
  font-size: 13px;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.03);
}

.bubble-row.user .bubble {
  background: #111;
  border-color: #111;
  color: #fff;
}

.bubble.error {
  color: var(--danger);
  border-color: #f2d1cc;
  background: #fff7f6;
}

.bubble-plain {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
}

.bubble-placeholder {
  min-height: 20px;
}

.bubble-markdown {
  color: inherit;
}

.bubble-markdown > :first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.bubble-markdown > :last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.bubble-markdown p,
.bubble-markdown ul,
.bubble-markdown ol,
.bubble-markdown pre,
.bubble-markdown blockquote,
.bubble-markdown table,
.bubble-markdown hr {
  margin: 0 0 0.82em;
}

.bubble-markdown h1,
.bubble-markdown h2,
.bubble-markdown h3,
.bubble-markdown h4,
.bubble-markdown h5,
.bubble-markdown h6 {
  margin: 0 0 0.7em;
  line-height: 1.35;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.bubble-markdown h1 {
  font-size: 16px;
}

.bubble-markdown h2 {
  font-size: 15px;
}

.bubble-markdown h3,
.bubble-markdown h4,
.bubble-markdown h5,
.bubble-markdown h6 {
  font-size: 14px;
}

.bubble-markdown ul,
.bubble-markdown ol {
  padding-left: 1.2em;
}

.bubble-markdown li + li {
  margin-top: 0.28em;
}

.bubble-markdown a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration-thickness: 1px;
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
}

.bubble-markdown blockquote {
  padding: 0.1em 0 0.1em 0.9em;
  border-left: 2px solid rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.14);
  color: va

import { execFileSync, spawn } from "node:child_process";
import { existsSync, readFileSync } from "node:fs";
import { createServer } from "node:http";

const PORT = 3888;
const NVIDIA_CHAT_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions";
const NVIDIA_MODELS_UPSTREAM = "https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/models";
const CURL_BIN = process.platform === "win32" ? "curl.exe" : "curl";
const RELAY_CONFIG_URL = new URL("./relay.config.json", import.meta.url);
const DEFAULT_BENCHMARK_TIMEOUT_MS = 12000;
const DEFAULT_BENCHMARK_CONCURRENCY = 6;
const BENCHMARK_MESSAGES = [
  {
    role: "user",
    content: "Reply with OK only."
  }
];
const DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS = Object.freeze({
  providerId: "nvidia",
  baseUrl: "http://127.0.0.1:3888/nvidia/v1",
  apiKey: "",
  model: "deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.1-terminus",
  temperature: 0.5,
  maxTokens: "",
  systemPrompt:
    "You are a WPS writing assistant. Reply with clean Markdown that can be inserted directly into the document. Use headings, lists, bold, and italic only when they improve readability. Do not add meta commentary or preambles.",
  useSelectionAsContext: true,
  replaceSelection: true,
  firstTokenTimeoutMs: 120000
});

function normalizeProxyUrl(value) {
  const trimmed = String(value ?? "").trim();
  if (!trimmed) {
    return "";
  }

  if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(trimmed)) {
    return trimmed;
  }

  return `http://${trimmed}`;
}

function readRelayConfig() {
  try {
    if (!existsSync(RELAY_CONFIG_URL)) {
      return {};
    }

    return JSON.parse(readFileSync(RELAY_CONFIG_URL, "utf8"));
  } catch {
    return {};
  }
}

function resolveConfigProxy(config) {
  return normalizeProxyUrl(
    config.proxyUrl ||
      config.httpsProxy ||
      config.httpProxy ||
      config.HTTPS_PROXY ||
      config.HTTP_PROXY ||
      ""
  );
}

function resolveWindowsProxy() {
  try {
    const output = execFileSync(
      "reg.exe",
      [
        "query",
        "HKCU\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings",
        "/v",
        "ProxyServer"
      ],
      {
        encoding: "utf8",
        stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "ignore"],
        windowsHide: true
      }
    );

    const match = output.match(/ProxyServer\s+REG_\w+\s+(.+)$/im);
    if (!match) {
      return "";
    }

    const raw = match[1].trim();
    if (!raw) {
      return "";
    }

    if (!raw.includes("=")) {
      return normalizeProxyUrl(raw);
    }

    const map = Object.fromEntries(
      raw
        .split(";")
        .map((part) => part.trim())
        .filter(Boolean)
        .map((part) => {
          const [key, value] = part.split("=", 2);
          return [key.toLowerCase(), normalizeProxyUrl(value)];
        })
    );

    return map.https || map.http || Object.values(map)[0] || "";
  } catch {
    return "";
  }
}

function resolveProxyEnv(config) {
  const proxy =
    resolveConfigProxy(config) ||
    process.env.HTTPS_PROXY ||
    process.env.HTTP_PROXY ||
    process.env.https_proxy ||
    process.env.http_proxy ||
    (process.platform === "win32" ? resolveWindowsProxy() : "");

  if (!proxy) {
    return process.env;
  }

  return {
    ...process.env,
    HTTP_PROXY: proxy,
    HTTPS_PROXY: proxy,
    http_proxy: proxy,
    https_proxy: proxy,
    NO_PROXY: process.env.NO_PROXY || "127.0.0.1,localhost",
    no_proxy: process.env.no_proxy || "127.0.0.1,localhost"
  };
}

function normalizeBootstrapSettings(config) {
  const defaults =
    config.defaults && typeof config.defaults === "object" ? config.defaults : {};

  return {
    ...DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS,
    ...defaults,
    providerId: "nvidia",
    baseUrl:
      defaults.baseUrl && String(defaults.baseUrl).trim()
        ? String(defaults.baseUrl).trim()
        : DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.baseUrl,
    apiKey: String(defaults.apiKey ?? ""),
    model:
      String(defaults.model ?? "").trim() ||
      DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.model,
    temperature: Number.isFinite(Number(defaults.temperature))
      ? Number(defaults.temperature)
      : DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.temperature,
    maxTokens:
      defaults.maxTokens === "" || defaults.maxTokens === null
        ? ""
        : String(defaults.maxTokens ?? ""),
    systemPrompt:
      String(defaults.systemPrompt ?? "").trim() ||
      DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.systemPrompt,
    useSelectionAsContext:
      typeof defaults.useSelectionAsContext === "boolean"
        ? defaults.useSelectionAsContext
        : DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.useSelectionAsContext,
    replaceSelection:
      typeof defaults.replaceSelection === "boolean"
        ? defaults.replaceSelection
        : DEFAULT_BOOTSTRAP_SETTINGS.replaceSelection,
    firstTokenTimeoutMs: Number.isFinite(Number(defaults.firstTokenTimeoutMs)

import DOMPurify from "dompurify";
import { marked } from "marked";

marked.setOptions({
  async: false,
  breaks: true,
  gfm: true
});

function normalizeMarkdown(markdown) {
  return String(markdown ?? "").replace(/\r\n/g, "\n");
}

export function renderMarkdownHtml(markdown) {
  const source = normalizeMarkdown(markdown).trim();
  if (!source) {
    return "";
  }

  const rawHtml = marked.parse(source);
  return DOMPurify.sanitize(rawHtml, {
    USE_PROFILES: { html: true }
  });
}

export function createMarkdownDocument(markdown) {
  const parser = new DOMParser();
  const html = renderMarkdownHtml(markdown);
  return parser.parseFromString(html || "<p></p>", "text/html");
}

export function markdownToPlainText(markdown) {
  return normalizeMarkdown(markdown)
    .replace(/```[^\n]*\n?/g, "")
    .replace(/```/g, "")
    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "$1")
    .replace(/!\[([^\]]*)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
    .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]*\)/g, "$1")
    .replace(/^>\s?/gm, "")
    .replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm, "")
    .replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/gm, "\u2022 ")
    .replace(/^(\s*)\d+\.\s+/gm, (_, indent) => `${indent}1. `)
    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "$1")
    .replace(/__([^_]+)__/g, "$1")
    .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, "$1")
    .replace(/_([^_]+)_/g, "$1")
    .replace(/~~([^~]+)~~/g, "$1")
    .replace(/\n{3,}/g, "\n\n")
    .trim();
}
```

const SETTINGS_KEY = "wps-ai.settings";
const PROMPT_KEY = "wps-ai.prompt";

export function loadStoredValue(key, fallbackValue) {
  try {
    const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(key);
    return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : fallbackValue;
  } catch {
    return fallbackValue;
  }
}

export function saveStoredValue(key, value) {
  try {
    window.localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  } catch {
    // Ignore local storage failures in host environments with tighter quotas.
  }
}

export { SETTINGS_KEY, PROMPT_KEY };
```

  41: function statusRank(entry, currentModel) {
  42:   if (entry.id === currentModel) {

  45:

  50:       return 2;
  51:     case "unsupported":

  54:     case "error":

  56:     default:

  60: 
  61: function compareModelEntries(left, right, currentModel) {
  62:   const rankDiff = statusRank(left, currentModel) - statusRank(right, currentModel);
  63:   if (rankDiff !== 0) {
  64:     return rankDiff;
  65:   }
  66: 
  67:   const leftToken = left.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;
  68:   const rightToken = right.benchmark?.firstTokenMs;

  70:   if (

  72:     Number.isFinite(rightToken) &&
  73:     leftToken !== rightToken

  76:   }
  77: 
  78:   if (Number.isFinite(leftToken) && !Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
  79:     return -1;
  80:   }
  81: 
  82:   if (!Number.isFinite(leftToken) && Number.isFinite(rightToken)) {
  83:     return 1;
  84:   }
  85:

  34: function createModelEntry(item, previous = null) {
